verses.anvaya_skt: ह वै वाजश्रवसः उषन् सर्ववेदसं ददौ। तस्य ह नचिकेताः नाम पुत्र आस ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ha vai vājaśravasaḥ uṣan sarvavedasaṁ dadau | tasya ha naciketāḥ nāma putra āsa ||
verses.auro_md: Vajashravasa, desiring, gave all he had. Now Vajashravasa had a son named Nachiketas.

glossary.meaning_en: Vajasravasa (one with an abundance of inspiration)
a particle for emphasizing a preceding word and often translatable by indeed, assuredly, verily, of course, then &c. It is often used with other particles like tveva, u, sma, vai &c.
a particle of emphasis and affirmation, (it is usually translatable by indeed, truly, certainly, verily, just &c.

verses.hindi_explain: वाजश्रवस ने (यज्ञफल की) कामना करते हुए अपना सर्वस्व दान कर दिया । और वाजश्रवस का नचिकेता नाम का एक पुत्र था ।
verses.meaning_en: Vajasravasa, desiring, gave all he had. Now Vajasravasa had a son named Nachiketas.
verses.verse_skt:
ॐ उशन्‌ ह वै वाजश्रवसः सर्ववेदसं ददौ।
तस्य ह नचिकेता नाम पुत्र आस ॥
verses.verse_tl:
om uśan ha vai vājaśravasaḥ sarvavedasaṁ dadau |
tasya ha naciketā nāma putra āsa ||

verses.anvaya_skt: कुमारं सन्तं तं दक्षिणासु नीयमानसु श्रद्धा आविवेश ह। सः अमयन्त ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: kumāraṁ santaṁ taṁ dakṣiṇāsu nīyamānasu śraddhā āviveśa ha | saḥ amayanta ||
verses.auro_md: As the gifts were led past, faith took possession of him who was yet a boy unwed and he pondered:
verses.hindi_explain: जब दक्षिणाएँ ले जायी जा रही थीं, तब नचिकेता के भीतर, जो अभी कुमार ही था, श्रद्धा का आवेश हो गया और उसने सोचा।
verses.meaning_en: As the gifts were led past, faith took possession of him who was yet a boy unwed and he pondered:
verses.verse_skt: तं  ह कुमारं सन्तं दक्षिणासु नीयमानासु श्रद्धाऽऽविवेश। सोऽमन्यत ॥
verses.verse_tl: taṁ  ha kumāraṁ santaṁ dakṣiṇāsu nīyamānāsu śraddhā''viveśa |  so'manyata ||

verses.anvaya_skt: पीतोदकाः जग्धतृणाः दुग्धदोहाः निरिन्द्रियाः ताः ददत् सः तान् गच्छति ते लोकाः अनन्दाः नाम ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: pītodakāḥ jagdhatṛṇāḥ dugdhadohāḥ nirindriyāḥ tāḥ dadat saḥ tān gacchati te lokāḥ anandāḥ nāma ||
verses.auro_md: "Cattle that have drunk their water, eaten their grass, yielded their milk, worn out their organs, of undelight are the worlds which he reaches who gives such as these."

glossary.meaning_en: (cattle that have) worn out their organs

verses.hindi_explain: "जो गायें जल पी चुकी हैं, घास खा चुकी हैं, जिनका दूध दुहा जा चुका है, जो इन्द्रियहीन हो रही हैं, ऐसी गायों का दान देने वाला आनन्दविहीन लोकों मे जाता है ।"
verses.meaning_en: “Cattle that have drunk their water, eaten their grass, yielded their milk, worn out their organs, of undelight are the worlds which he reaches who gives such as these.”
verses.verse_skt:
पीतोदका जग्धतृणा दुग्धदोहा निरिन्द्रियाः।
अनन्दा नाम ते लोकास्तान्स गच्छति ता ददत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
pītodakā jagdhatṛṇā dugdhadohā nirindriyāḥ |
anandā nāma te lokāstānsa gacchati tā dadat ||

verses.anvaya_skt: सः पितरम् उवाच ह तत कस्मै मां दास्यसि इति। द्वितीयं तृत्रीयं। तं ह  पिता  उवाच त्वा मृत्यवे ददामि इति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: saḥ pitaram uvāca ha tata kasmai māṁ dāsyasi iti | dvitīyaṁ tṛtrīyaṁ | taṁ ha ( pitā ) uvāca tvā mṛtyave dadāmi iti ||
verses.auro_md: He said to his father, "Me, O my father, to whom wilt thou give?" A second time and a third he said it, and he replied, "To Death I give thee."
verses.hindi_explain: उसने अपने पिता से कहा, ''हे पिता ! आप मुझे किसको देंगे ?" दूसरी बार और पुनः तीसरी बार उसने वही कहा, और पिता ने प्रत्युत्तर मे कहा, '' मैं तुम्हें 'मृत्यु' को देता हूं ।''
verses.meaning_en: He said to his father, “Me, O my father, to whom wilt thou give?” A second time and a third he said it, and he replied, “To Death I give thee.”
verses.verse_skt:
स होवाच पितरं तत कस्मै मां दास्यसीति।
द्वितीयं तृतीयं तं होवाच मृत्यवे त्वा ददामीति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
sa hovāca pitaraṁ tata kasmai māṁ dāsyasīti |
dvitīyaṁ tṛtīyaṁ taṁ hovāca mṛtyave tvā dadāmīti ||

verses.anvaya_skt: बहूनां प्रथमः एमि। बहूनां मध्यमः एमि। यमस्य किंस्वित् कर्तव्यं यत् मया अद्य करिष्यति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: bahūnāṁ prathamaḥ emi | bahūnāṁ madhyamaḥ emi | yamasya kiṁsvit kartavyaṁ yat mayā adya kariṣyati ||
verses.auro_md: "Among many I walk the first, among many I walk the mid-most; something Death means to do which today by me he will accomplish.
verses.hindi_explain: "बहुतो मे मैं अग्रगामी हूँ, बहुतों में मैं मध्यगामी रहता हूँ । ऐसा क्या हो सकता है जो यम करना चाहते हैं जिसे वे आज मेरे द्वारा सम्पन्न करेंगे ।
verses.meaning_en: “Among many I walk the first, among many I walk the midmost; something Death means to do which today by me he will accomplish.
verses.verse_skt:
बहूनामेमि प्रथमो  बहूनामेमि मध्यमः।
किं स्विद्यमस्य कर्तव्यं यन्मयाद्य करिष्यति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
bahūnāmemi prathamo  bahūnāmemi madhyamaḥ |
kiṁ svidyamasya kartavyaṁ yanmayādya kariṣyati ||

verses.anvaya_skt: पूर्वे यथा अनुपश्य। तथा अपरे प्रतिपश्य। मर्त्यः सत्यम् इव पच्यते पुनः सत्यम् इव अजायते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: pūrve yathā anupaśya | tathā apare pratipaśya | martyaḥ satyam iva pacyate punaḥ satyam iva ajāyate ||
verses.auro_md: "Look back and see, even as were the men of old,—look round!—even so are they that have come after. Mortal man withers like the fruits of the field and like the fruits of the field he is born again."

glossary.meaning_en: even as were the men of old
are they that have come after
like the fruits of the field
like the fruits of the field

verses.hindi_explain: ''पहले मनुष्य जैसे थे पीछे मुडकर देखिये; अपने चारों ओर देखिये उनके पश्चात् भी अन्यान्य मनुष्य आये हैं। मर्त्य मनुष्य खेत मे उत्पन्न अन्न के दानों के समान पककर झड जाता है तथा खेत मे अन्न के दानों के समान पुनः उत्पन्न हो जाता है ।''
verses.meaning_en: “Look back and see, even as were the men of old,-look round!-even so are they that have come after. Mortal man withers like the fruits of the field and like the fruits of the field he is born again.”
verses.verse_skt:
अनुपश्य यथा पूर्वे प्रतिपश्य तथाऽपरे।
सस्यमिव मर्त्यः पच्यते सस्यमिवाजायते पुनः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
anupaśya yathā pūrve pratipaśya tathā'pare |
sasyamiva martyaḥ pacyate sasyamivājāyate punaḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: ब्राह्मणः अतिथिः  सन्  वैश्वानरः  इव  गृहान् प्रविशति। तस्य एतां शान्तिं कुर्वन्ति। वैवस्वत उदकं हर ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: brāhmaṇaḥ atithiḥ ( san ) vaiśvānaraḥ ( iva ) gṛhān praviśati | tasya etāṁ śāntiṁ kurvanti | vaivasvata udakaṁ hara ||
verses.auro_md:
*His attendants say to Yama:*

7) "Fire is the Brahmin who enters as a guest the houses of men; him thus they appease. Bring, O son of Vivasvan,[^1] the water of the guest-rite.

[^1]: Yama, lord of death, is also the master of the Law in the world, and he is therefore the child of the Sun, luminous Master of Truth from which the Law is born.
verses.hindi_explain: ''अतिथि के रूप में लोगों के घरों मे प्रवेश करने वाला ब्राह्मण साक्षात् वैश्वानर अग्नि-स्वरूप है । इस भाव से ही लोग उसे शान्त एवं प्रसन्न किया करते हैं । हे विवस्वान्-पुत्र,<sup>१</sup> आप आतिथेय जल ले आइये ।
verses.meaning_en: “Fire is the Brahmin who enters as a guest the houses of men; him thus they appease. Bring, O son of Vivasvan, the water of the guest-rite.
verses.verse_skt:
वैश्वानरः प्रविशत्यतिथिर्ब्राह्मणो गृहान्‌।
तस्यैतां शान्तिं कुर्वन्ति हर वैवस्वतोदकम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
vaiśvānaraḥ praviśatyatithirbrāhmaṇo gṛhān |
tasyaitāṁ śāntiṁ kurvanti hara vaivasvatodakam ||

verses.anvaya_skt: ब्राह्मणः अनश्नन् यस्य गृहे वसति  तस्य  अल्पमेधसः पुरुषस्य आशाप्रतिक्षे सङ्गतम् सुनृताम् इष्टापूर्ते पुत्रपशून् सर्वान् एतत्  सर्वं  वृङ्क्ते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: brāhmaṇaḥ anaśnan yasya gṛhe vasati ( tasya ) alpamedhasaḥ puruṣasya āśāpratikṣe saṅgatam sunṛtām iṣṭāpūrte putrapaśūn sarvān etat ( sarvaṁ ) vṛṅkte ||
verses.auro_md: "That man of little understanding in whose house a Brahmin dwells fasting, all his hope and his expectation and all he has gained and the good and truth that he has spoken and the wells he has dug and the sacrifices he has offered and all his sons and his cattle are torn from him by that guest unhonoured."

glossary.meaning_en: all that has been gained by speaking the good and truth
the wells dug and the sacrifices offered
are torn (from him by that guest unhonoured)

verses.hindi_explain: "जिसके घर मे ब्राह्मण बिना खाए रहता है, उस अल्पबुद्धि मनुष्य की सारी आशा-प्रतीक्षाएँ, जो कुछ उसने पाया है, जो सत्य और शुभ उसने बोला है, जो कुएँ खुदवाए हैं तथा जो यज्ञ किये हैं, और उसके सब पुत्र एवं पशु उस अनादृत ब्राह्मण के द्वारा विनष्ट कर दिये जाते हैं ।''
verses.meaning_en: “That man of little understanding in whose house a Brahmin dwells fasting, all his hope and his expectation and all he has gained and the good and truth that he has spoken and the wells he has dug and the sacrifices he has offered and all his sons and his cattle are torn from him by that guest unhonoured.”
verses.verse_skt:
आशाप्रतीक्षे संगतं सूनृतां चेष्टापूर्वे पुत्रपशूंश्च सर्वान्‌।
एतद्‌ वृङ्क्ते पुरुषस्याल्पमेधसो यस्यानश्नन्वसति ब्राह्मणो गृहे ॥
verses.verse_tl:
āśāpratīkṣe saṁgataṁ sūnṛtāṁ ceṣṭāpūrve putrapaśūṁśca sarvān |
etad vṛṅkte puruṣasyālpamedhaso yasyānaśnanvasati brāhmaṇo gṛhe ||

verses.anvaya_skt: ब्रह्मन् अतिथिः  त्वं  नमस्यः यत् मे गृहे तिस्रः रात्रीः अनश्नन् अवात्सीः तस्मात् प्रति त्रीन् वरान् वृणीष्व। ब्रह्मन् ते नमः अस्तु। मे स्वस्ति अस्तु ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: brahman atithiḥ ( tvaṁ ) namasyaḥ yat me gṛhe tisraḥ rātrīḥ anaśnan avātsīḥ tasmāt prati trīn varān vṛṇīṣva | brahman te namaḥ astu | me svasti astu ||
verses.auro_md: "Because for three nights thou hast dwelt in my house, O Brahmin, a guest worthy of reverence,—salutation to thee, O Brahmin, on me let there be the weal,—therefore three boons do thou choose, for each night a boon."
verses.hindi_explain:
(यम कहते हैं)
''हे ब्राह्मण! तुम नमनयोग्य समादरणीय अतिथि हो, मैं तुम्हें प्रणाम करता हूं, ब्राह्मणवर्य ! मेरा कल्याण हो, तुमने मेरे घर में तीन रात बिना कृछ खाए वास किया, इसलिए तुम तीन वरों का, प्रतिरात्रि के लिए एक वर का, चयन करो ।'' <sup>१</sup> यम, मृत्यु का अधिष्ठाता, इस सृष्टि मे 'विधान' का भी स्वामी है । अतः वह सत्य के 'ज्योतिर्मय प्रभु', सूर्य का भी पुत्र है, जिससे समस्त 'विधान' का जन्म होता है ।
verses.meaning_en: “Because for three nights thou hast dwelt in my house, O Brahmin, a guest worthy of reverence,-salutation to thee, O Brahmin, on me let there be the weal,-therefore three boons do thou choose; for each night a boon.”
verses.verse_skt:
तिस्रो रात्रीर्यदवात्सीर्गृहे मेऽनश्नन्ब्रह्मन्नतिथिर्नमस्यः।
नमस्तेऽस्तु ब्रह्मन्स्वस्ति मेऽस्तु तस्मात्प्रति त्रीन्वरान्वृणीष्व ॥
verses.verse_tl:
tisro rātrīryadavātsīrgṛhe me'naśnanbrahmannatithirnamasyaḥ |
namaste'stu brahmansvasti me'stu tasmātprati trīnvarānvṛṇīṣva ||

verses.anvaya_skt: मृत्यो गौतमः शान्तसङ्कल्पः सुमनाः मा अभि वीतमन्युः यथा स्यात् प्रतीतः त्वत्प्रसृष्टं अभिवदेत् एतत् त्रयाणां प्रथमं वरं वृणे ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: mṛtyo gautamaḥ śāntasaṅkalpaḥ sumanāḥ mā abhi vītamanyuḥ yathā syāt pratītaḥ tvatprasṛṣṭaṁ abhivadet etat trayāṇāṁ prathamaṁ varaṁ vṛṇe ||
verses.auro_md: "Tranquillised in his thought and serene of mind be the Gautama, my father, let his passion over me pass away from him; assured in heart let him greet me from thy grasp delivered; this boon I choose, the first of three."
verses.hindi_explain:
(नचिकेता कहता है)
''हे यमराज ! मेरे पिता गौतम शान्तचित्त तथा प्रसन्नमना हो जायें और उनका मेरे प्रति जो क्षोभ है, वह न रहे; आपके द्वारा छोडे जाने पर वे आश्वस्त हृदय से मेरा अभिवादन करे-तीन वरों में से मैं यह प्रथम वर चुनता हूँ ।''
verses.meaning_en: “Tranquillised in his thought and serene of mind be the Gautama, my father, let his passion over me pass away from him; assured in heart let him greet me from thy grasp delivered; this boon I choose, the first of three.”
verses.verse_skt:
शान्तसंकल्पः सुमना यथा स्याद्वीतमन्युर्गौतमो माभि मृत्यो।
त्वत्प्रसृष्टं माभिवदेत्प्रतीत एतत्त्रयाणां प्रथमं वरं वृणे ॥
verses.verse_tl:
śāntasaṁkalpaḥ sumanā yathā syādvītamanyurgautamo mābhi mṛtyo |
tvatprasṛṣṭaṁ mābhivadetpratīta etattrayāṇāṁ prathamaṁ varaṁ vṛṇe ||

verses.anvaya_skt: आरुणिः औद्दालकिः पुरस्तात्  त्वयि  यथा मत्प्रसृष्टः   तथैव  प्रतीतः भविता।  सः  त्वां मृत्युमुखात् प्रमुक्तं ददृशिवान् वीतमन्युः रात्रीः सुखं शयिता ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: āruṇiḥ auddālakiḥ purastāt ( tvayi ) yathā matprasṛṣṭaḥ  ( tathaīva ) pratītaḥ bhavitā   | ( saḥ ) tvāṁ mṛtyumukhāt pramuktaṁ dadṛśivān vītamanyuḥ rātrīḥ sukhaṁ śayitā ||
verses.auro_md: "Even as before assured in heart and by me released, shall he be, Auddalaki Aruni, thy father; sweetly shall he sleep through the nights and his passion shall pass away from him, having seen thee from death's jaws delivered."

glossary.meaning_en: all passion being passed away (from him)

verses.hindi_explain:
(यम कहते हैं)
''तुम्हारे पिता, औद्दालकि आरुणि, पूर्ववत् आश्वस्त-हृदय होंगे तथा मेरे द्वारा विमुक्त होंगे । तुम्हें मृत्यु के मुख से मुक्त हुआ देखकर उनका क्षोभ शान्त हो जायेगा और वे रातो को सुखपूर्वक सोयेंगे ।''
verses.meaning_en: “Even as before assured in heart and by me released shall he be, Auddalaki Aruni, thy father; sweetly shall he sleep through the nights and his passion shall pass away from him, having seen thee from death's jaws delivered.”
verses.verse_skt:
यथा पुरस्ताद्‌ भविता प्रतीत औद्दालकिरारुणिर्मत्प्रसृष्टः।
सुखं रात्रीः शयिता वीतमन्युस्त्वां ददृशिवान्मृत्युमुखात्प्रमुक्तम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yathā purastād bhavitā pratīta auddālakirāruṇirmatprasṛṣṭaḥ |
sukhaṁ rātrīḥ śayitā vītamanyustvāṁ dadṛśivānmṛtyumukhātpramuktam ||

verses.anvaya_skt: स्वर्गे लोके किञ्चन भयं न अस्ति। तत्र त्वं   न असि  न जरया बिभेति। उभे अशनायापिपासे तीर्त्वा शोकातिगः स्वर्गेलोके मोदते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: svarge loke kiñcana bhayaṁ na asti | tatra tvaṁ  ( na asi ) na jarayā bibheti | ubhe aśanāyāpipāse tīrtvā śokātigaḥ svargeloke modate ||
verses.auro_md: "In heaven fear is not at all, in heaven, O Death, thou art not, nor old age and its terrors; crossing over hunger and thirst as over two rivers, leaving sorrow behind the soul in heaven rejoices.

glossary.meaning_en: nor old age and its terrors

verses.hindi_explain:
(नचिकेता कहता है)
''स्वर्गलोक मे किञ्चित्-मात्र भय नहीं है, हे मृत्चुदेव ! आप भी वहाँ नहीं हैं और न जरावस्था है न उसका भय है; भूख और प्यास दोनों को नदियों के समान पार कर, शोक का अतिक्रमण करके आत्मा स्वर्गलोक में आनन्दित रहती है ।
verses.meaning_en: “In heaven fear is not at all, in heaven, O Death, thou art not, nor old age and its terrors; crossing over hunger and thirst as over two rivers, leaving sorrow behind, the soul in heaven rejoices.
verses.verse_skt:
स्वर्गे लोके न भयं किञ्चनास्ति न तत्र त्वं न जरया बिभेति।
उभे तीर्त्वाऽशनायापिपासे शोकातिगो मोदते स्वर्गलोके ॥
verses.verse_tl:
svarge loke na bhayaṁ kiñcanāsti na tatra tvaṁ na jarayā bibheti |
ubhe tīrtvā'śanāyāpipāse śokātigo modate svargaloke ||

verses.anvaya_skt: मृत्यो सः त्वं स्वर्ग्यम् अग्निम् अध्येषि तं श्रद्धधानाय मह्यं प्रब्रूहि। स्वर्गलोकाः अमृतत्वं भजन्ते। एतत् द्वितीयेन वरेण वृणे ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: mṛtyo saḥ tvaṁ svargyam agnim adhyeṣi taṁ śraddhadhānāya mahyaṁ prabrūhi | svargalokāḥ amṛtatvaṁ bhajante | etat dvitīyena vareṇa vṛṇe ||
verses.auro_md:
"Therefore that heavenly Flame[^2] which thou, O Death, studiest, expound unto me, for I believe. They who win their world of heaven, have immortality for their portion. This for the second boon I have chosen."

[^2]: The celestial force concealed subconsciently in man's mortality by the kindling of which and its right ordering man transcends his earthly nature; not the physical flame of the external sacrifice to which these profound phrases are inapplicable.

glossary.meaning_en: they who win their world of heaven

verses.hindi_explain:
<sup>२</sup>वह स्वर्गिक शक्ति (अग्नि) जो मनुष्य की मर्त्यता में अवचेतन रूप में निहित है, जिसके प्रदीपन तथा जिसकी यथायुक्त व्यवस्था से मनुष्य अपनी पार्थिव प्रकृति का अतिक्रमण कर जाता है; बाह्य यज्ञ की भौतिक अग्निशिखा नहीं, जिसके लिए ये गहन-गम्भीर वचन अनुपयुक्त हैं।
 अतव हे मृत्युदेव आप निस स्वर्गिक अग्नि ' का अध्ययन करते हैं उसका मुझ श्रद्धावान् के प्रति प्रवचन करिये । जो स्वर्गलोक को प्राप्त करते हैं वे अमृतत्व के भागी होते हैं। यह मैं द्वितीय वर में वरण करता हूँ ।''
verses.meaning_en: “Therefore that heavenly Flame2 which thou, O Death, studiest, expound unto me, for I believe. They who win their world of heaven, have immortality for their portion. This for the second boon I have chosen.”
verses.verse_skt:
स त्वमग्निं स्वर्ग्यमध्येषि मृत्यो प्रब्रूहि त्वं श्रद्दधानाय मह्यम्‌।
स्वर्गलोका अमृतत्वं भजन्त एतद्‌ द्वितीयेन वृणे वरेण ॥
verses.verse_tl:
sa tvamagniṁ svargyamadhyeṣi mṛtyo prabrūhi tvaṁ śraddadhānāya mahyam |
svargalokā amṛtatvaṁ bhajanta etad dvitīyena vṛṇe vareṇa ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अहं  स्वर्ग्यम् अग्निं प्रजानं प्रब्रवीमि तत् उ मे निबोध। नचिकेतः त्वम् एतम् अनन्तलोकाप्तिम् अथो प्रतिष्ठानां गुहायां निहितं विद्धि ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ( ahaṁ ) svargyam agniṁ prajānaṁ prabravīmi tat u me nibodha | naciketaḥ tvam etam anantalokāptim atho pratiṣṭhānāṁ guhāyāṁ nihitaṁ viddhi ||
verses.auro_md: "Hearken to me and understand, O Nachiketas; I declare to thee that heavenly Flame, for I know it. Know this to be the possession of infinite existence and the foundation and the thing hidden in the secret cave of our being."

glossary.meaning_en: in the secret cave of our being

verses.hindi_explain:
(यम कहते हैं)
'' हे नचिकेता ! उस स्वर्गिक अग्नि का मैं तुम्हारे प्रति कथन करता हूँ, क्योंकि मैं उसे जानता हूँ। तुम उसे सुनो और समझो। इसे तुम अनन्त लोकों की प्राप्ति एवं प्रतिष्ठा तथा हमारी सत्ता की गुहा में निहित तत्त्व के रूप में जानो।''
verses.meaning_en: “Hearken to me and understand, O Nachiketas; I declare to thee that heavenly Flame, for I know it. Know this to be the possession of infinite existence and the foundation and the thing hidden in the secret cave of our being.”
verses.verse_skt:
प्र ते ब्रवीमि तदु मे निबोध स्वर्ग्यमग्निं नचिकेतः प्रजानन्‌।
अनन्तलोकाप्तिमथो प्रतिष्ठां विद्धि त्वमेतं निहितं गुहायाम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
pra te bravīmi tadu me nibodha svargyamagniṁ naciketaḥ prajānan |
anantalokāptimatho pratiṣṭhāṁ viddhi tvametaṁ nihitaṁ guhāyām ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यमः  तस्मै लोकादिं तम् अग्निम् उवाच। याः यावतीः वा इष्टकाः यथा वा सः च अपि तत् यथोक्तं प्रत्यवदत्। अथ मृत्युः अस्य तुष्टः पुन एव आह ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ( yamaḥ ) tasmai lokādiṁ tam agnim uvāca| yāḥ yāvatīḥ vā iṣṭakāḥ yathā vā saḥ ca api tat yathoktaṁ pratyavadat| atha mṛtyuḥ asya tuṣṭaḥ puna eva āha ||
verses.auro_md:
Of the Flame that is the world's beginning[^3] he told him and what are the bricks to him and how many and the way of their setting; and Nachiketas too repeated it even as it was told; then Death was pleased and said to him yet farther;

[^3]: The Divine Force, concealed in the subconscient, is that which has originated and built up the worlds. At the other end in the superconscient it reveals itself as the Divine Being, Lord and Knower who has manifested Himself out of the Brahman.

glossary.meaning_en: that which is the world's beginning
and as those should be set

verses.hindi_explain: उन्होंने (यम ने) उसे लोकों की आदिकारण<sup>३</sup>-स्वरूपा अग्नि के विषय में तथा उसके लिए इटँ क्या हैं, कितनी हैं एवं किस प्रकार व्यवस्थित की जाती हैं, सब बताया। नचिकेता ने भी जैसा-जैसा उसे बताया गया वैसा-वैसा प्रतिकथन कर दिया। मृत्युदेव यम सन्तुष्ट हो गए और उन्होंने उससे आगे कहा;
verses.meaning_en: Of the Flame that is the world's beginning he told him and what are the bricks and how many and the way of their setting; and Nachiketas too repeated it even as it was told; then Death was pleased and said to him yet farther;
verses.verse_skt:
लोकादिमग्निं तमुवाच तस्मै या इष्टका यावतीर्वा यथा वा।
स चापि तत्प्रत्यवदद्यथोक्तमथास्य मृत्युः पुनरेवाह तुष्टः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
lokādimagniṁ tamuvāca tasmai yā iṣṭakā yāvatīrvā yathā vā |
sa cāpi tatpratyavadadyathoktamathāsya mṛtyuḥ punarevāha tuṣṭaḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: महात्मा प्रीयमाणः तम् अव्रवीत् इह एव अद्य तव भूयः वरं ददामि। अयम् अग्निः तव एव नाम्ना भविता। इमाम् अनेकरूपां सङ्कां च गृहाण ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: mahātmā prīyamāṇaḥ tam avravīt iha eva adya tava bhūyaḥ varaṁ dadāmi| ayam agniḥ tava eva nāmnā bhavitā| imām anekarūpāṁ saṅkāṁ ca gṛhāṇa ||
verses.auro_md:
Yea, the Great Soul was gratified and said to him, "Yet a farther boon today I give thee; for even by thy name shall this Fire be called; this necklace also take unto thee, a necklace[^4] of many figures.

[^4]: The necklace of many figures is Prakriti, creative Nature which comes under the control of the soul that has attained to the divine existence.
verses.hindi_explain:
प्यार भरे भाव से प्रसन्न 'महात्मा' यम ने उससे कहा, ''मैं आज फिर से तुम्हें एक वर और देता हूँ। यह 'अग्नि' भविष्य में तुम्हारे ही नाम से पुकारी जायेगी। और इस अनेकरूपा माला <sup>४</sup> को भी तुम ग्रहण करो।
 <sup>३</sup>जो 'दिव्यशक्ति' अवचेतन मे छिपी हुई है वह वही शक्ति है जिसने लोकों की उत्पत्ति और उनका निर्माण किया है। दूसरी ओर अतिचेतन में यह अपने आपको उस 'दिव्यतिदिव्य परमतत्त्व', 'परमेश्वर' तथा 'सर्वज्ञाता' के स्वरूप में प्रकाशित करती है, जिसने 'स्वयं' को 'ब्रह्म' से प्रकट किया है। 
<sup>४</sup>अनेकरूपा माला 'प्रकृति' है, वह सर्जनकारिणी 'प्रकृति', जो उस आत्मा के अधीन हो जाती है जिसने दिव्यसत्ता की प्राप्ति कर ली है।
verses.meaning_en: Yea; the Great Soul was gratified and said to him, “Yet a farther boon today I give thee; for even by thy name shall this Fire be called; this necklace also take unto thee, a necklace of many figures.
verses.verse_skt:
तमब्रवीत्प्रीयमाणो महात्मा वरं तवेहाद्य ददामि भूयः।
तवैव नाम्ना भविताऽयमग्निः सृङ्कां चेमामनेकरूपां गृहाण ॥
verses.verse_tl:
tamabravītprīyamāṇo mahātmā varaṁ tavehādya dadāmi bhūyaḥ |
tavaiva nāmnā bhavitā'yamagniḥ sṛṅkāṁ cemāmanekarūpāṁ gṛhāṇa ||

verses.anvaya_skt: त्रिभिः सन्धिम् एत्य त्रिणचिकेतः त्रिकर्मकृत् जन्ममृत्यू तरति। ईड्यं ब्रह्मजज्ञं देवं विदित्वा निचाय्य इमाम् अत्यन्तं शान्तिम् एति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: tribhiḥ sandhim etya triṇaciketaḥ trikarmakṛt janmamṛtyū tarati| īḍyaṁ brahmajajñaṁ devaṁ viditvā nicāyya imām atyantaṁ śāntim eti ||
verses.auro_md:
"Whoso lights the three fires[^5] of Nachiketas and comes to union with the Three[^6] and does the triple works,[^7] beyond birth and death he crosses; for he finds the God of our adoration, the Knower[^8] who is born from the Brahman, whom having beheld he attains to surpassing peace.

[^5]: Probably, the divine force utilised to raise to divinity the triple being of man.

[^6]: Possibly, the three Purushas, soul-states or Personalities of the divine Being, indicated by the three letters A U M. The highest Brahman is beyond the three letters of the mystic syllable.

[^7]: The sacrifice of the lower existence to the divine, consummated on the three planes of man's physical, vital and mental consciousness.

[^8]: The Purusha or Divine Being, Knower of the Field, who dwells within all and for whose pleasure Prakriti fulfils the cosmic play.

glossary.meaning_en: whoso lights the three fires of Nachiketas (Probably, the Divine Force utilised to raise to divinity the triple being of man.)

with the Three (Possibly, the three Purushas, soul-states or Personalities of the Divine Being, indicated by the three letters A U M. The highest Brahman is beyond the three letters of the mystic syllable.)
one who does the triple works (The sacrifice of the lower existence to the divine, consummated on the three planes of man's physical, vital and mental consciousness.)
the Knower who is born from the Brahman (The Purusha or Divine Being, Knower of the Field, who dwells within all and for whose pleasure Prakriti fulfils the cosmic play.)

verses.hindi_explain: "जो तीन नचिकेता- अग्निर्यो<sup>५</sup> को प्रदीप्त करता है तीनों<sup>६</sup> के साथ संयुक्त हो जाता है, त्रिविध कर्म७ 'करता है, वह जन्म और मृत्यु को पार कर जाता है; क्योंकि वह उस आराध्य 'देव' को जान जाता है जो 'ब्रह्म' से उत्पन्न है, 'ज्ञाता'' है तथा उसका दर्शन पाकर वह परा-शान्ति को प्राप्त करता है।
verses.meaning_en: “Whoso lights the three fires of Nachiketas and comes to union with the Three and does the triple works, beyond birth and death he crosses; for he finds the God of our adoration, the Knower who is born from the Brahman, whom having beheld he attains to surpassing peace.
verses.verse_skt:
त्रिणाचिकेतस्त्रिभिरेत्य सन्धिं त्रिकर्मकृत्तरति जन्ममृत्यू।
ब्रह्मजज्ञं देवमीड्यं विदित्वा निचाय्येमां शान्तिमत्यन्तमेति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
triṇāciketastribhiretya sandhiṁ trikarmakṛttarati janmamṛtyū |
brahmajajñaṁ devamīḍyaṁ viditvā nicāyyemāṁ śāntimatyantameti ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यः त्रिणाचिकतः विद्वान् एतत् त्रयं विदित्वा नाचिकेतम् एव चिनुते स पुरतः मृत्युपाशान् प्रणोद्य शोकतिगः स्वर्गलोके मोदते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yaḥ triṇācikataḥ vidvān etat trayaṁ viditvā nāciketam eva cinute sa purataḥ mṛtyupāśān praṇodya śokatigaḥ svargaloke modate ||
verses.auro_md: "When a man has the three flames of Nachiketas and knows this that is Triple, when so knowing he beholds the Flame of Nachiketas, then he thrusts from in front of him the meshes of the snare of death; leaving sorrow behind him he in heaven rejoices.

glossary.meaning_en: has the three flames of Nachiketas
the meshes of the snare of death

verses.hindi_explain: ''जब मनुष्य तीन नचिकेता- अग्नियों को प्राप्त करके यह जान जाता है कि ये 'त्रयात्मक' हैं, तथा ऐसा जानते हुए जब 'नचिकेता- अग्नि' का दर्शन करता है, तब वह अपने सामने सें मृत्यु-पाश के जालों का उच्छेदन कर डालता है, वह शोक का अतिक्रमण करके स्वर्गलोक में हर्षित होता है।
verses.meaning_en: “When a man has the three flames of Nachiketas and knows this that is Triple, when so knowing he beholds the Flame of Nachiketas, then he thrusts from in front of him the meshes of the snare of death; leaving sorrow behind him he in heaven rejoices.
verses.verse_skt:
त्रिणाचिकेतस्त्रयमेतद्विदित्वा य एवं विद्वांश्चिनुते नाचिकेतम्‌।
स मृत्युपाशान्पुरतः प्रणोद्य शोकातिगो मोदते स्वर्गलोके ॥
verses.verse_tl:
triṇāciketastrayametadviditvā ya evaṁ vidvāṁścinute nāciketam |
sa mṛtyupāśānpurataḥ praṇodya śokātigo modate svargaloke ||

verses.anvaya_skt: नचिकेतः एषः ते स्वर्ग्यः अग्निः यम् द्वितीयन वरेन अवॄणीथाह्। जनासः एतम् अग्निं तव एव  नाम्ना प्रवक्षामि। नचिकेतः   अथ  तॄतीयं वरम् वृणीस्व ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: naciketaḥ eṣaḥ te svargyaḥ agniḥ yam dvitīyana varena avṝṇīthāh| janāsaḥ etam agniṁ tava eva  (nāmnā) pravakṣāmi| naciketaḥ  ( atha ) tṝtīyaṁ varam vṛiṇīsva ||
verses.auro_md: "This is the heavenly Flame, O Nachiketas, which thou hast chosen for the second boon; of this Flame the peoples shall speak that it is thine indeed. A third boon choose, O Nachiketas."
verses.hindi_explain:
''हे नचिकेता ! यह है स्वर्गिक 'अग्नि' जिसका तुमने द्वितीय वर के रूप में वरण किया है। इस 'अग्नि' के सम्बन्ध में सभी लोग कहेंगे, यह तुम्हारी ही अग्नि है। हे नचिकेता ! अब तृतीय वर का वरण करो।''
<sup>५</sup>सम्भवतः मनुष्य की त्रिविध सत्ता को दिव्यता में उठाने के लिए प्रयुक्त दिव्यशक्ति ।
<sup>६</sup>सम्भवतः, तीन 'पुरुष', दिव्य 'सत्तत्त्व' की तीन आत्मागत- अवस्थाएँ अथवा तीन दिव्य 'व्यक्तित्व' जिनका 'अ उ-म्', इन तीन अक्षरों से संकेत होता है। परमोच्च 'ब्रह्म' ॐकार ध्वनि के तीन अक्षरों से परे है। 
<sup>७</sup> निम्न सत्ता का दिव्य के प्रति आत्म-यज्ञ जो मनुष्य की भौतिक, प्राणिक तथा मानसिक चेतना की तीन भूमिकाओं पर सम्पन्न होता है। 
 <sup>८</sup>'पुरुष' अथवा 'दिव्य सत्तत्त्व', 'क्षेत्रज्ञ' जो सबके अन्तर में निवास करता है और जिसके भोग (आनन्द) के लिए 'प्रकृति' विश्व-लीला को सम्पन्न करती है।
verses.meaning_en: “This is the heavenly Flame, O Nachiketas, which thou hast chosen for the second boon; of this Flame the peoples shall speak that it is thine indeed. A third boon choose, O Nachiketas.”
verses.verse_skt:
एष तेऽग्निर्नचिकेतः स्वर्ग्यो यमवृणीथा द्वितीयेन वरेण।
एतमग्निं तवैव प्रवक्श्यन्ति जनासस्तृतीयं वरं नचिकेतो वृणीष्व ॥
verses.verse_tl:
eṣa te'gnirnaciketaḥ svargyo yamavṛṇīthā dvitīyena vareṇa |
etamagniṁ tavaiva pravakśyanti janāsastṛtīyaṁ varaṁ naciketo vṛṇīṣva ||

verses.anvaya_skt: मनुष्य प्रेते या  इयं विचिकित्सा एके अयं अस्ति इति  आहुः  एके अयं न सति इति च  आहुः । त्वया अनुशिष्टः एतत् अहं विद्याम् एषः वराणाम् तॄतीयः वरः
verses.anvaya_tl: manuṣya prete yā  iyaṁ viucikitsā eke ayaṁ asti iti ( āhuḥ ) eke ayaṁ na sati iti ca ( āhuḥ )| tvayā anuśiṣṭaḥ etat ahaṁ vidyām eṣaḥ varāṇām tṝtīyaḥ varaḥ
verses.auro_md: "This debate that there is over the man who has passed and some say 'This he is not' and some that 'he is', that, taught by thee, I would know; this is the third boon of the boons of my choosing."

glossary.meaning_en: over the man who has passed away

verses.hindi_explain:
(नचिकेता कहता हैː)
"प्रयाण किये हुए मनुष्य के विषय में यह जो संशयात्मक विवाद है, कोई कहता है 'वह 'यह' नहीं है' और कोई कहता है कि 'वह है'। इसे आपसे शिक्षा लेकर मैं जान लूँ; वरों में यह मेरा तृतीय वर है।''
verses.meaning_en: “This debate that there is over the man who has passed and some say 'This he is not' and some that he is, that, taught by thee, I would know; this is the third boon of the boons of my choosing.”
verses.verse_skt:
येयं प्रेते विचिकित्सा मनुष्येऽस्तीत्येके नायमस्तीति चैके।
एतद्विद्यामनुशिष्टस्त्वयाऽहं वराणामेष वरस्तृतीयः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yeyaṁ prete vicikitsā manuṣye'stītyeke nāyamastīti caike |
etadvidyāmanuśiṣṭastvayā'haṁ varāṇāmeṣa varastṛtīyaḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: देवैः अपि अत्र पुरा विचिकित्सितं हि  इदं  न सुज्ञेयम्। एषः धर्मः अणुः नचिकेतः अन्यं वरं वृणिष्व। मा मा उपरोत्सीः। मा एवम् अतिसृज ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: devaiḥ api atra purā vicikitsitaṁ hi ( idaṁ ) na sujñeyam| eṣaḥ dharmaḥ aṇuḥ naciketaḥ anyaṁ varaṁ vṛṇiṣva | mā mā uparotsīḥ| mā evam atisṛja ||
verses.auro_md: "Even by the gods was this debated of old; for it is not easy of knowledge, since very subtle is the law of it. Another boon choose, O Nachiketas; importune me not, nor urge me; this, this abandon."

glossary.meaning_en: it is not easy of knowledge

verses.hindi_explain:
(यम कहते हैं ː)
''पूर्वकाल में देवगणो में भी इस विषय में संशयात्मक विवाद हुआ था; यह सरलता से जानने योग्य नहीं है, क्योंकि इसका धर्म बहुत सूक्ष्म है। हे नचिकेता! तुम अन्य कोई वर चुन लो; इस वर के लिए मुझसे आग्रह मत करो, अनुरोध मत करो, इसे छोड़ दो।''
verses.meaning_en: “Even by the gods was this debated of old; for it is not easy of knowledge, since very subtle is the law of it. Another boon choose, O Nachiketas; importune me not, nor urge me; this, this abandon.”
verses.verse_skt:
देवैरत्रापि विचिकित्सितं पुरा न हि सुविज्ञेयमणुरेष धर्मः।
अन्यं वरं नचिकेतो वृणीष्व मा मोपरोत्सीरति मा सृजैनम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
devairatrāpi vicikitsitaṁ purā na hi suvijñeyamaṇureṣa dharmaḥ |
anyaṁ varaṁ naciketo vṛṇīṣva mā moparotsīrati mā sṛjainam ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अत्र देवैः अपि विचिकित्सितं किल मृत्यो यत् च त्वं न सुज्ञेयम्। अथ त्वादृक् अन्यः अस्य वक्ता च न लम्यः।  अतः एतस्य तुल्यः अन्यः कश्चित् वरः न अस्ति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: atra devaiḥ api vicikitsitaṁ kila mṛotyo yat ca tvaṁ na sujñeyam| atha tvādṛk anyaḥ asya vaktā ca na lamyaḥ| ( ataḥ) etasya tulyaḥ anyaḥ kaścit varaḥ na asti ||
verses.auro_md:
"Even by the gods was this debated, it is sure, and thou thyself hast said that it is not easy of knowledge; never shall I find another like thee[^9] to tell of it, nor is there any other boon that is equal."

[^9]: Yama is the knower and keeper of the cosmic Law through which the soul has to rise by death and life to the freedom of Immortality.

glossary.meaning_en: it is not easy of knowledge
speaker of this / one to tell of this

verses.hindi_explain: ''निश्चय ही देवगणो में भी इस विषय में संशयात्मक विवाद हुआ था और आपने ही कहा कि यह तथ्य सरलता से जानने योग्य नहीं है; आपके<sup>१</sup> सदृश वक्ता मुझे अन्य कोई नहीं मिलेगा और न इस वर के तुल्य अन्य कोई वर है।''
verses.meaning_en: “Even by the gods was this debated, it is sure, and thou thyself hast said that it is not easy of knowledge; never shall I find another like thee to tell of it, nor is there any other boon that is its equal.”
verses.verse_skt:
देवैरत्रापि विचिकित्सितं किल त्वं च मृत्यो यन्न सुज्ञेयमात्थ।
वक्ता चास्य त्वादृगन्यो न लभ्यो नान्यो वरस्तुल्य एतस्य कश्चित्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
devairatrāpi vicikitsitaṁ kila tvaṁ ca mṛtyo yanna sujñeyamāttha |
vaktā cāsya tvādṛganyo na labhyo nānyo varastulya etasya kaścit ||

verses.anvaya_skt: शतायुषः पुत्रपौत्रान् वृणीष्व। अहून् पशून् हस्तिहिरण्यम् अश्वान् भूमेः महत् आयतनं वॄणिष्व। स्वयं च यावत् शरदः  जीवितुम्  इछसि  तावत्  जीव ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: śatāyuṣaḥ putrapautrān vṛṇīṣva| ahūn paśūn hastihiraṇyam aśvān bhūmeḥ mahat āyatanaṁ vṝṇiṣva| svayaṁ ca yāvat śaradaḥ ( jīvitum ) ichasi ( tāvat ) jīva ||
verses.auro_md: "\"Choose sons and grandsons who shall live each a hundred years, choose much cattle and elephants and gold and horses; choose a mighty reach of earth and thyself live for as many years as thou listest.\"
verses.hindi_explain:
(यम कहते हैं)
<sup>१</sup>यमराज उस वैश्व 'विधान' के ज्ञाता और संरक्षक हैं जिसके द्वारा आत्मा को जन्म तथा मृत्यु के माध्यम से 'अमरत्व' की मुक्तावस्था में आरोहण करना है। ''शतायु पुत्रों तथा पौत्रों का वरण कर लो; बहुत से पशुओं (गायों आदि का) हाथियों, स्वर्णराशि तथा घोड़ों का वरण कर लो; अतिविस्तृत भूमिखण्ड का वरण कर लो तथा स्वयं जितने वर्ष इच्छा हो, जीवित रहो।
verses.meaning_en: “Choose sons and grandsons who shall live each a hundred years, choose much cattle and elephants and gold and horses; choose a mighty reach of earth and thyself live for as many years as thou listest.
verses.verse_skt:
शतायुषः पुत्रपौत्रान्वृणीष्व बहून्पशून्हस्तिहिरण्यमश्वान्‌।
भूमेर्महदायतनं वृणीष्व स्वयं च जीव शरदो यावदिच्छसि ॥
verses.verse_tl:
śatāyuṣaḥ putrapautrānvṛṇīṣva bahūnpaśūnhastihiraṇyamaśvān |
bhūmermahadāyatanaṁ vṛṇīṣva svayaṁ ca jīva śarado yāvadicchasi ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यदि एतत् तुल्यं वरं मन्यसे  यथा  वित्तं चिरजीविकां च वृणिस्व। नचिकेतः महाभुमौ त्वम् एधिः। त्वा कामानां कामभाजं करोमि ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yadi etat tulyaṁ varaṁ manyase ( yathā ) vittaṁ cirajīvikāṁ ca vṛṇisva| naciketaḥ mahābhumau tvam edhiḥ| tvā kāmānāṁ kāmabhājaṁ karomi ||
verses.auro_md: "This boon if thou deemest equal to that of thy asking, choose wealth and long living; possess thou; O Nachiketas, a mighty country; I give thee thy desire of all desirable things for thy portion.
verses.hindi_explain: ''यदि तुम इसे अपने वर के तुल्य मान लो, तो धन और चिरजीवन का वरण कर लो; हे नचिकेता! तुम विशाल भूमि का आधिपत्य ले लो; मैं तुम्हारी सभी इष्ट वस्तुओं की कामनाओं की पूर्ति करता हूँ।
verses.meaning_en: “This boon if thou deemest equal to that of thy asking, choose wealth and long living; possess thou, O Nachiketas, a mighty country; I give thee thy desire of all desirable things for thy portion.
verses.verse_skt:
एतत्तुल्यं यदि मन्यसे वरं वृणीष्व वित्तं चिरजीविकां च।
महाभूमौ नचिकेतस्त्वमेधि कामानां त्वां कामभाजं करोमि ॥
verses.verse_tl:
etattulyaṁ yadi manyase varaṁ vṛṇīṣva vittaṁ cirajīvikāṁ ca |
mahābhūmau naciketastvamedhi kāmānāṁ tvāṁ kāmabhājaṁ karomi ||

verses.anvaya_skt: ये ये कामाः मर्त्यलोके दुर्लभः  तान्  सर्वान् कामान् छन्दतः प्रार्तयस्व। इमं सरथाः सतूर्याः रामाः ईदृशाः मनुष्यैः नहि लम्भनीयाः मत्प्रत्तभिः अभिः परिचारयस्व। नचिकेतः मरणम् मा अनुप्राक्षिः ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ye ye kāmāḥ martyaloke durlabhaḥ ( tān ) sarvān kāmān chandataḥ prārtayasva| imaṁ sarathāḥ satūryāḥ rāmāḥ īdṛśāḥ manuṣyaiḥ nahi lambhanīyāḥ matprattabhiḥ abhiḥ paricārayasva| naciketaḥ maraṇam mā anuprākṣiḥ ||
verses.auro_md: "Yea, all desires that are hard to win in the world of mortals, all demand at thy pleasure; lo, these delectable women with their chariots and their bugles, whose like are not to be won by men, these I will give thee, live with them for thy hand-maidens. But of death question not, O Nachiketas."

glossary.meaning_en: whose like are, these I will give thee;. But of death question not,.”

verses.hindi_explain: '' जिन-जिन कामनाओं की पूर्ति मर्त्यलोक में दुर्लभ है, उन सभी कामनाओं को तुम सहर्ष माँग लो। देखो! अपने रथों एवं वाद्यो सहित ये मनोहारिणी रमणीयां हैं, मनुष्यों के लिए इस प्रकार की रमणीयां अलभ्य हैं, मैं इन्हें तुम्हें दूँगा। हे नचिकेता! (मेरे द्वारा प्रदत्त)<sup>*</sup> इन्हें अपनी परिचारिकाओं के रूप में स्वीकार करके इनके साथ सुख सें रहो। किन्तु, मृत्यु के विषय में प्रश्न मत करो।"
verses.meaning_en: ye ye kämäù martyaloke durlabhäù (tän) sarvän kämän chandataù prärthayasva| imäù sarathäù satüryäù rämäù édåçäù manuñyaiù na hi lambhanéyäù | matprattäbhiù äbhiù paricärayasva| naciketaù maraëam mä anupräkñéù ||
verses.verse_skt:
ये ये कामा दुर्लभा मर्त्यलोके सर्वान्कामांश्छन्दतः प्रार्थयस्व।
इमा रामाः सरथाः सतूर्या न हीदृशा लम्भनीया मनुष्यैः।
आभिर्मत्प्रत्ताभिः परिचारयस्व नचिकेतो मरणं माऽनुप्राक्शीः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
ye ye kāmā durlabhā martyaloke sarvānkāmāṁśchandataḥ prārthayasva |
imā rāmāḥ sarathāḥ satūryā na hīdṛśā lambhanīyā manuṣyaiḥ |
ābhirmatprattābhiḥ paricārayasva naciketo maraṇaṁ mā'nuprākśīḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अन्तक  त्वदुक्ताः भोगः  श्वोभाबाः  किञ्च  मर्त्यस्य सर्वेन्द्रियाणां यत् तेजः एतत् जरयन्ति अपि सर्वम् जीवितम् अल्पम् एव। तव वाहाः नृत्यगीते  तव एव   तिष्ठन्तु ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: antaka ( tvaduktāḥ bhogaḥ ) śvobhābāḥ ( kiñca ) martyasya sarvendriyāṇāṁ yat tejaḥ etat jarayanti api sarvam jīvitam alpam eva| tava vāhāḥ nṛtyagīte  tava eva  ( tiṣṭhantu ) ||
verses.auro_md: "Until the morrow mortal man has these things, O Ender, and they wear away all this keenness and glory of his senses; nay, all life is even for a little. Thine are these chariots and thine the dancing of these women and their singing.

glossary.meaning_en: the dancing of these women and their singing

verses.hindi_explain:
(नचिकेता कहता है)
'' हे अन्तक! (अन्त करने वाले देव) मर्त्य मनुष्य के ये सब भोग पदार्थ कल तक ही रहने वाले हैं, ये सब इन्द्रियों की आतुरता तथा उनके तेज को जीर्णशीर्णं कर देते हैं, सम्पूर्ण जीवन भी स्वल्प मात्र ही है। आपके लिए ही हैं ये रथादि वाहन, आपके लिए ही हैं ये रमणीयों के नृत्य तथा गीत। <sup>*</sup>यह वाक्यांश संस्कृत के मूलपाठ में हैं, श्रीअरविन्द ने इसको शब्दशः अनुवाद में नहीं लिखा है।-अनुवादक
verses.meaning_en: “Until the morrow mortal man has these things, O Ender, and they wear away all this keenness and glory of his senses; nay, all life is even for a little. Thine are these chariots and thine the dancing of these women and their singing.
verses.verse_skt:
श्वोभावा मर्त्यस्य यदन्तकैतत्सर्वेन्द्रियाणां जरयन्ति तेजः।
अपि सर्वं जीवितमल्पमेव तवैव वाहास्तव नृत्यगीते ॥
verses.verse_tl:
śvobhāvā martyasya yadantakaitatsarvendriyāṇāṁ jarayanti tejaḥ |
api sarvaṁ jīvitamalpameva tavaiva vāhāstava nṛtyagīte ||

verses.anvaya_skt: मनुष्यः वित्तेन न तर्पणीयः।  वयं  त्वा अद्राक्षाम चेत् वित्तं लप्स्यामहे।  तथा  यावत् त्वं ईशिष्यति जीविष्यामः। सः तु वरः एव मे वरणीयः ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: manuṣyaḥ vittena na tarpaṇīyaḥ| ( vayaṁ ) tvā adrākṣāma cet vittaṁ lapsyāmahe| ( tathā ) yāvat tvaṁ īśiṣyati jīviṣyāmaḥ| saḥ tu varaḥ eva me varaṇīyaḥ ||
verses.auro_md:
"Man is not to be satisfied by riches, and riches we shall have if we have beheld thee and shall live as long as thou shall be lord of us.[^10] This boon and no other is for my choosing.

[^10]: Life being a figure of death and Death of life, the only true existence is the infinite, divine and immortal.
verses.hindi_explain: ''मनुष्य को धन से तृप्त नहीं किया जा सकता और अगर हमने आपके दर्शन कर लिये तो धन हमे मिल ही जाएगा तथा जब तक आपका हम पर<sup>१०</sup>  प्रभुत्व रहेगा तब तक हम जीते भी रहेंगे। मेरे वरण करने योग्य वर तो वही है।
verses.meaning_en: “Man is not to be satisfied by riches, and riches we shall have if we have beheld thee and shall live as long as thou shalt be lord of us. This boon and no other is for my choosing.
verses.verse_skt:
न वित्तेन तर्पणीयो मनुष्यो लप्स्यामहे वित्तमद्राक्श्म चेत्त्वा।
जीविष्यामो यावदीशिष्यसि त्वं वरस्तु मे वरणीयः स एव ॥
verses.verse_tl:
na vittena tarpaṇīyo manuṣyo lapsyāmahe vittamadrākśma cettvā |
jīviṣyāmo yāvadīśiṣyasi tvaṁ varastu me varaṇīyaḥ sa eva ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अजीर्यताम् अमॄतानां  सकाशं  उपेत्य प्रजानम् क्वधस्थः जीर्यन् कः मर्त्यः  अपि च  वर्णरतिप्रमोदान् अभिध्यायन् अतिदिर्घे जीविते रमेत ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ajīryatām amṝtānāṁ ( sakāśaṁ ) upetya prajānam kvadhasthaḥ jīryan kaḥ martyaḥ ( api ca ) varṇaratipramodān abhidhyāyan atidirghe jīvite rameta ||
verses.auro_md: "Who that is a mortal man and grows old and dwells down upon the unhappy earth, when he has come into the presence of the ageless Immortals and knows, yea, who when he looks very close at beauty and enjoyment and pleasure, can take delight in overlong living?

glossary.meaning_en: dwelling down upon the unhappy earth
having come close to or into the presence of

verses.hindi_explain: ''कौन ऐसा मर्त्य मनुष्य होगा जो जरावस्था को प्राप्त होते हुए, इस दुःखमय भूतल पर वास करते हुए जब अजर-अमृत पुरुषों के सान्निध्य में आ जाता है और ज्ञानवान् हो जाता है तो रूप-रंग के सौन्दर्य, रति तथा आमोद-प्रमोदो को बहुत समीपता से निरीक्षण करते हुए, अतिदीर्घ जीवन मे रमेगा?
verses.meaning_en: “Who that is a mortal man and grows old and dwells down upon the unhappy earth, when he has come into the presence of the ageless Immortals and knows, yea, who when he looks very close at beauty and enjoyment and pleasure, can take delight in overlong living?
verses.verse_skt:
अजीर्यताममृतानामुपेत्य जीर्यन्मर्त्यः क्वधःस्थः प्रजानन्‌।
अभिध्यायन्वर्णरतिप्रमोदानतिदीर्घे जीविते को रमेत ॥
verses.verse_tl:
ajīryatāmamṛtānāmupetya jīryanmartyaḥ kvadhaḥsthaḥ prajānan |
abhidhyāyanvarṇaratipramodānatidīrghe jīvite ko rameta ||

verses.anvaya_skt: मृत्यो यस्मिन् महति साम्पराये यत् इदं विचिकित्सन्ति नः तत् ब्रूहि। यः अयं गूढम् अनुप्रविष्टः वरः  विद्यते  नचिकेताः तस्मात् अन्यम् न वृणिते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: mṛtyo yasmin mahati sāmparāye yat idaṁ vicikitsanti naḥ tat brūhi | yaḥ ayaṁ gūḍham anupraviṣṭaḥ varaḥ ( vidyate ) naciketāḥ tasmāt anyam na vṛṇite ||
verses.auro_md: "This of which they thus debate, O Death, declare to me, even that which is in the great passage; than this boon which enters in into the secret that is hidden from us, no other chooses Nachiketas."

glossary.meaning_en: the secret that is hidden from us

verses.hindi_explain: ''हे मृत्युदेव! यह, जिसके विषय में सब संशयात्मक विवाद करते हैं, तथा वह, जो महती प्रयाणगति (परलोकयात्रा) में है, उसे मुझे बताइये। यह वर जो उस गूढ रहस्य में प्रवेश करता है जिसे हम नहीं जानते हैं, उसके अतिरिक्त नचिकेता अन्य किसी वर का वरण नहीं करता।''
verses.meaning_en: “This of which they thus debate, O Death, declare to me, even that which is in the great passage; than this boon which enters in into the secret that is hidden from us, no other chooses Nachiketas.”
verses.verse_skt:
यस्मिन्निदं विचिकित्सन्ति मृत्यो यत्साम्पराये महति ब्रूहि नस्तत्‌।
योऽयं वरो गूढमनुप्रविष्टो नान्यं तस्मान्नचिकेता वृणीते ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yasminnidaṁ vicikitsanti mṛtyo yatsāmparāye mahati brūhi nastat |
yo'yaṁ varo gūḍhamanupraviṣṭo nānyaṁ tasmānnaciketā vṛṇīte ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अन्यत् श्रेयः उत अन्यत् एव प्रेयः। ते उभे नानार्थे   सती  पुरुषं सिनीतः। तयोः श्रेयः आददानस्य साधु भवति उ  सः  अर्थात् हीयते यः प्रेयः वृणीते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: anyat śreyaḥ uta anyat eva preyaḥ| te ubhe nānārthe  ( satī ) puruṣaṁ sinītaḥ| tayoḥ śreyaḥ ādadānasya sāadhu bhavati u ( saḥ ) arthāt hīyate yaḥ preyaḥ vṛṇīte ||
verses.auro_md:
*Yama speaks:*

1) One thing is the good and quite another thing is the pleasant, and both seize upon a man with different meanings. Of these whoso takes the good, it is well with him; he falls from the aim of life who chooses the pleasant.
verses.hindi_explain:
यम कहते हैंː
<sup>१०</sup>'जीवन' मृत्यु का ही एक रूप, और 'मृत्यु' जीवन का ही एक रूप होने के नाते एकमात्र सत्य अस्तित्व अनन्त है, दिव्य तथा अमर है ।
''श्रेय एक वस्तु है और उससे सर्वथा भिन्न वस्तु है प्रेय, और ये दोनों मनुष्यों को भिन्न-भिन्न अर्थों में बाँधते हैं। इन दोनों में से जो व्यक्ति श्रेय को ग्रहण करता है उसका कल्याण होता है और जो प्रेय का वरण करता है वह जीवन के लक्ष्य से च्युत हो जाता है।
verses.meaning_en: One thing is the good and quite another thing is the pleasant, and both seize upon a man with different meanings. Of these whoso takes the good, it is well with him; he falls from the aim of life who chooses the pleasant.
verses.verse_skt:
अन्यच्छ्रेयोऽन्यदुतैव प्रेयस्ते उभे नानार्थे पुरुषं सिनीतः।
तयोः श्रेय आददानस्य साधुर्भवति हीयतेऽर्थाद्य उ प्रेयो वृणीते ॥
verses.verse_tl:
anyacchreyo'nyadutaiva preyaste ubhe nānārthe puruṣaṁ sinītaḥ |
tayoḥ śreya ādadānasya sādhurbhavati hīyate'rthādya u preyo vṛṇīte ||

verses.anvaya_skt: श्रेयः च प्रेयः च मनुष्यम् एतः। धीरः तौ सम्परीत्य विविनक्ति। धीरः हि प्रेयसः श्रेयः अभिवृणीते। मन्दः योगक्षेमात् प्रेयः वृणिते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: śreyaḥ ca preyaḥ ca manuṣyam etaḥ| dhīraḥ tau samparītya vivinakti| dhīraḥ hi preyasaḥ śreyaḥ abhivṛṇīte| mandaḥ yogakṣemāt preyaḥ vṛṇite ||
verses.auro_md: The good and the pleasant come to a man and the thoughtful mind turns all around them and distinguishes. The wise chooses out the good from the pleasant, but the dull soul chooses the pleasant rather than the getting of his good and its having.

glossary.meaning_en: rather than the getting of good and its having

verses.hindi_explain: ''श्रेय और प्रेय मनुष्य के पास आते हैं; विचारशील (धीर) पुरुष सब ओर से उनको परखता है और उनमें विवेक करता है। वह ज्ञानी पुरुष प्रेय की अपेक्षा श्रेय का ही वरण करता है, किन्तु मन्दबुद्धि व्यक्ति अपने श्रेय की प्राप्ति एवं उसको बनाये रखने (योग- क्षेम) की अपेक्षा प्रेय का चयन करता है।
verses.meaning_en: çreyaù ca preyaù ca manuñyam etaù| dhéraù tau samparétya vivinakti| dhéraù hi preyasaù çreyaù abhivåëéte| mandaù yogakñemät preyaù våëéte ||
verses.verse_skt:
श्रेयश्च प्रेयश्च मनुष्यमेतस्तौ सम्परीत्य विविनक्ति धीरः।
श्रेयो हि धीरोऽभि प्रेयसो वृणीते प्रेयो मन्दो योगक्शेमाद्‌वृणीते ॥
verses.verse_tl:
śreyaśca preyaśca manuṣyametastau samparītya vivinakti dhīraḥ |
śreyo hi dhīro'bhi preyaso vṛṇīte preyo mando yogakśemādvṛṇīte ||

verses.anvaya_skt: नचिकेतः सः त्वं प्रियान् प्रियरूपान् च कामान् अभिध्यायन् अत्यस्नाक्षीः वित्तमयीम् एतां सङ्कां न अवाप्तः यस्यां बहवः मनुष्याः मज्जन्ति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: naciketaḥ saḥ tvaṁ priyān priyarūpān ca kāmān abhidhyāyan atyasnākṣīḥ vittamayīm etāṁ saṅkāṁ na avāptaḥ yasyāṁ bahavaḥ manuṣyāḥ majjanti ||
verses.auro_md: And thou, O Nachiketas, hast looked close at the objects of desire, at pleasant things and beautiful, and thou hast cast them from thee: thou hast not entered into the net of riches in which many men sink to perdition.

glossary.meaning_en: thou hast cast them from thee

verses.hindi_explain: ''हे नचिकेता! तुमने काम्य पदार्थों का, प्रिय पदार्थों एवं प्रिय रूपों का गहराई से निरीक्षण करके, उनका परित्याग कर दिया है। तुम धन-ऐश्वर्य के उस जाल में नहीं फँसे जिसमें फँस कर बहुत से मनुष्य नष्ट हो जाते हैं।
verses.meaning_en: And thou, O Nachiketas, hast looked close at the objects of desire, at pleasant things and beautiful, and thou hast cast them from thee; thou hast not entered into the net of riches in which many men sink to perdition.
verses.verse_skt:
स त्वं प्रियान्प्रियरूपांश्च कामानभिध्यायन्नचिकेतोऽत्यस्राक्षीः।
नैतां सृङ्कां वित्तमयीमवाप्तो यस्यां मज्जन्ति बहवो मनुष्याः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
sa tvaṁ priyānpriyarūpāṁśca kāmānabhidhyāyannaciketo'tyasrākṣīḥ |
naitāṁ sṛṅkāṁ vittamayīmavāpto yasyāṁ majjanti bahavo manuṣyāḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: या च अविद्या विद्या इति  च या  ज्ञाता एते दूरं वीपरिते विषुची। नचिकेतसं विद्याभीप्सिनं मन्ये।  यतः  बहवः कामाः त्वा न अलोलुपन्त ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yā ca avidyā vidyā iti ( ca yā ) jñātā ete dūraṁ vīparite viṣucīī| naciketasaṁ vidyābhīpsinaṁ manye| ( yataḥ ) bahavaḥ kāmāḥ tvā na alolupanta ||
verses.auro_md: For far apart are these, opposite, divergent, the one that is known as the Ignorance and the other the Knowledge. But Nachiketas I deem truly desirous of the knowledge whom so many desirable things could not make to lust after them.

glossary.meaning_en: could not make to lust after them

verses.hindi_explain: ''कारण, परस्पर सर्वथा भिन्न, विपरीत, अलग-अलग दिशाओं में जाने वाली ये, एक 'अविद्या' नाम से जानी जाती है तथा दूसरी 'विद्या' । परन्तु, हे नचिकेता! मैं तुम्हें विद्या का सच्चा अभीप्सु मानता हूं जिसे बहुविध काम्य वस्तुऐं भी अपने प्रति लोलुप नहीं बना सकीं।
verses.meaning_en: For far apart are these, opposite, divergent, the one that is known as the Ignorance and the other the Knowledge. But Nachiketas I deem truly desirous of the knowledge whom so many desirable things could not make to lust after them.
verses.verse_skt:
दूरमेते विपरीते विषूची अविद्या या च विद्येति ज्ञाता।
विद्याभीप्सिनं नचिकेतसं मन्ये न त्वा कामा बहवोऽलोलुपन्त ॥
verses.verse_tl:
dūramete viparīte viṣūcī avidyā yā ca vidyeti jñātā |
vidyābhīpsinaṁ naciketasaṁ manye na tvā kāmā bahavo'lolupanta ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अविद्यायाम् अन्तरे वर्तमानाः स्वयं धीराः पण्डितं मन्यमानाः दन्द्रम्यमाणाः मूढाः परियन्ति यथा अन्धेन एव नीयमानाः अन्धाः ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: avidyāyām antare vartamānāḥ svayaṁ dhīrāḥ paṇḍitaṁ manyamānāḥ dandramyamāṇāḥ mūḍhāḥ pariyanti yathā andhena eva nīyamānāḥ andhāḥ ||
verses.auro_md: They who dwell in the ignorance, within it, wise in their own wit and deeming themselves very learned, men bewildered are they who wander about stumbling round and round helplessly like blind men led by the blind.
verses.hindi_explain: "जो लोग अविद्या में, उसके भीतर ही वास करते हैं, अपनी बुद्धि में स्वयं को ज्ञानी तथा महापण्डित मानते हैं, वे मूढ होते हैं, वे उसी प्रकार ठोकरें खाते हुए चक्करों में भटकते रहते हैं जैसे अन्धे के द्वारा ले जाये जाने वाले अन्धे होते हैं।
verses.meaning_en: They who dwell in the ignorance, within it, wise in their own wit and deeming themselves very learned, men bewildered are they who wander about round and round circling like blind men led by the blind.
verses.verse_skt:
अविद्यायामन्तरे वर्तमानाः स्वयं धीराः पण्डितम्मन्यमानाः।
दन्द्रम्यमाणाः परियन्ति मूढा अन्धेनैव नीयमाना यथान्धाः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
avidyāyāmantare vartamānāḥ svayaṁ dhīrāḥ paṇḍitammanyamānāḥ |
dandramyamāṇāḥ pariyanti mūḍhā andhenaiva nīyamānā yathāndhāḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: साम्परायः  वित्तमोहेन मूढं वित्तमोहेन प्रमाद्यन्तं बालं न प्रतिभाति। अयं लोकः  अस्ति  परः न अस्ति इति मानी पुनः पुनः मे वशम् आपद्यते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: sāmparāyaḥ  vittamohena mūḍhaṁ vittamohena pramādyantaṁ bālaṁ na pratibhāti| ayaṁ lokaḥ ( asti ) paraḥ na asti iti mānī punaḥ punaḥ me vaśam āpadyate ||
verses.auro_md: The childish wit bewildered and drunken with the illusion of riches cannot open its eyes to see the passage to heaven: for he that thinks this world is and there is no other, comes again and again into Death's thraldom.
verses.hindi_explain: ''बाल-बुद्धि व्यक्ति को, जो वित्तमोह से मूढ हो गया है, प्रमाद में डूबा हुआ है, परलोक यात्रा का प्रतिबोध नहीं होताː मात्र यह लोक ही है, परलोक होता ही नहीं, ऐसा मानने वाला व्यक्ति 'मृत्यु' के वशीभूत होता रहता है।
verses.meaning_en: The childish wit bewildered and drunken with the illusion of riches cannot open its eyes to see the passage to heaven; for he that thinks this world is and there is no other, comes again and again into Death's thraldom.
verses.verse_skt:
न साम्परायः प्रतिभाति बालं प्रमाद्यन्तं वित्तमोहेन मूढम्‌।
अयं लोको नास्ति पर इति मानी पुनः पुनर्वशमापद्यते मे ॥
verses.verse_tl:
na sāmparāyaḥ pratibhāti bālaṁ pramādyantaṁ vittamohena mūḍham |
ayaṁ loko nāsti para iti mānī punaḥ punarvaśamāpadyate me ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यः बहुभिः श्रवणाय अपि न लम्यः बहवः शृण्वन्तः अपि यम् न विद्युः  अस्य  वक्ता आश्चर्यः अस्य लब्धा कुशलः कुशलानुशिष्टः ज्ञाता आश्चर्यः ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yaḥ bahubhiḥ śravaṇāya api na lamyaḥ bahavaḥ śṛṇvantaḥ api yam na vidyuḥ ( asya ) vaktā āścaryaḥ asya labdhā kuśalaḥ kuśalānuśiṣṭaḥ jñātā āścaryaḥ ||
verses.auro_md: He that is not easy to be heard of by many, and even of those that have heard, they are many who have not known Him,—a miracle is the man that can speak of Him wisely or is skilful to win Him, and when one is found, a miracle is the listener who can know Him even when taught of Him by the knower.

glossary.meaning_en: not easy to be found or known
the one skillful to find Him

verses.hindi_explain: '''वह' (परतत्त्व) जिसका श्रवण भी बहुतों के लिए सुलभ नहीं है श्रवण करने वालों में से भी बहुत से लोग 'जिसे' जान नहीं पाते। 'उसका' ज्ञानपूर्वक कथन करने वाला व्यक्ति अथवा कुशलता से 'उसे' उपलब्ध करने वाला व्यक्ति होना एक आश्चर्यभरा चमत्कार है, तथा जब ऐसा कोई मिल जाये तो ऐसा श्रोता होना भी आश्चर्यपूर्ण है जो ज्ञानीजन से 'उसके' विषय में उपदेश ग्रहण करके भी 'ईश्वर' को जान सके।
verses.meaning_en: He that is not easy even to be heard of by many, and even of those that have heard they are many who have not known Him,-a miracle is the man that can speak of Him wisely or is skilful to win Him, and when one is found, a miracle is the listener who can know God even when taught of Him by the knower.
verses.verse_skt:
श्रवणायापि बहुभिर्यो न लभ्यः शृण्वन्तोऽपि बहवो यं न विद्युः।
आश्चर्यो वक्ता कुशलोऽस्य लब्धाश्चर्यो ज्ञाता कुशलानुशिष्टः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
śravaṇāyāpi bahubhiryo na labhyaḥ śṛṇvanto'pi bahavo yaṁ na vidyuḥ |
āścaryo vaktā kuśalo'sya labdhāāścaryo jñātā kuśalānuśiṣṭaḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: एषः अवरेण नरेण प्रोक्तः न सुविज्ञेयः  भवति  अनन्यप्रोक्ते अत्र गतिः न अस्ति। हि  एषः  अणुप्रमाणात् अणीयान्  अपि च  अतर्क्यम् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: eṣaḥ avareṇa nareṇa proktaḥ na suvijñeyaḥ ( bhavati ) ananyaprokte atra gatiḥ na asti | hi ( eṣaḥ ) aṇupramāṇāt aṇīyān ( api ca ) atarkyam ||
verses.auro_md: An inferior man cannot tell you of Him; for thus told thou canst not truly know Him, since He is thought of in many aspects. Yet unless told of Him by another thou canst not find thy way to Him; for He is subtler than subtlety and that which logic cannot reach.
verses.hindi_explain: ''अवर व्यक्ति (अल्पबुद्धिः ज्ञानहीन) तुम्हें 'उसके' विषय में बता नहीं सकता; उसके कथन किये जाने पर भी तुम वस्तुतː 'उसे' जान नहीं सकते क्योंकि 'उसका' बहुविध रूपों में चिन्तन किया जाता है। तथापि अन्य किसी के द्वारा 'उसके' विषय मे कथन के बिना तुम 'उस' तक पहुँचने का मार्ग भी नहीं पा सकोगे। कारण, 'वह' सूक्ष्मता से भी सूक्ष्मतर है तथा तर्क के द्वारा प्राप्य नहीं है।
verses.meaning_en: An inferior man cannot tell you of Him; for thus told thou canst not truly know Him, since He is thought of in many aspects. Yet unless told of Him by another thou canst not find thy way there to Him; for He is subtler than subtlety and that which logic cannot reach.
verses.verse_skt:
न नरेणावरेण प्रोक्त एष सुविज्ञेयो बहुधा चिन्त्यमानः।
अनन्यप्रोक्ते गतिरत्र नास्त्यणीयान् ह्यतर्क्यमणुप्रमाणात्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
na nareṇāvareṇa prokta eṣa suvijñeyo bahudhā cintyamānaḥ |
ananyaprokte gatiratra nāstyaṇīyān hyatarkyamaṇupramāṇāt ||

verses.anvaya_skt: प्रेष्ठ त्वं याम् आप एषा मतिः तर्केण न आपनेया  भवति ।  अन्येन प्रोक्ता सुज्ञानाय एव  भवति । नचिकेतः सत्यधृतिः असि बत। नः त्वादृक् प्रष्टा भूयात् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: preṣṭha tvaṁ yām āpa eṣā matiḥ tarkeṇa na āpaneyā ( bhavati )|  anyena proktā sujñānāya eva ( bhavati ) | naciketaḥ satyadhṛtiḥ asi bata| naḥ tvādṛk praṣṭā bhūyāt ||
verses.auro_md: This wisdom is not to be had by reasoning, O beloved Nachiketas; only when told thee by another it brings real knowledge,—the wisdom which thou hast gotten. Truly thou art steadfast in the Truth! Even such a questioner as thou art may I meet with always.
verses.hindi_explain: ''हे प्रियतम नचिकेता! यह प्रज्ञा (मति) जिसे तुमने प्राप्त कर लिया है, तर्क के द्वारा प्राप्तव्य नहीं है, केवल अन्य के द्वारा तुम्हारे प्रति कथन किये जाने पर ही यह सत्यज्ञान (सुज्ञान) का साधन बनती है। तुम सचमुच सत्य में दृढनिष्ठ हो; मुझे तुम्हारे जैसे प्रश्नकर्ता सदैव मिलते रहें।''
verses.meaning_en: This wisdom is not to be had by reasoning, O beloved Nachiketas; only when told thee by another it brings real knowledge,-the wisdom which thou hast gotten. Truly thou art steadfast in the Truth! Even such a questioner as thou art may I meet with always.
verses.verse_skt:
नैषा तर्केण मतिरापनेया प्रोक्तान्येनैव सुज्ञानाय प्रेष्ठ।
यां त्वमापः सत्यधृतिर्बतासि त्वादृङ नो भूयान्नचिकेतः प्रष्टा ॥
verses.verse_tl:
naiṣā tarkeṇa matirāpaneyā proktānyenaiva sujñānāya preṣṭha |
yāṁ tvamāpaḥ satyadhṛtirbatāsi tvādṛṅa no bhūyānnaciketaḥ praṣṭā ||

verses.anvaya_skt: शेवधिः अनित्यं इति अहं जानामि हि धृवम् हि तत् अधृवैः न हि प्राप्यते। ततः मया अनित्यैः द्रव्यैः नचिकेतः अग्निः चितः  तेन  नित्यं प्राप्तवान् अस्मि ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: śevadhiḥ anityaṁ iti ahaṁ jānāmi hi dhṛvam hi tat adhṛvaiḥ na hi prāpyate| tataḥ mayā anityaiḥ dravyaiḥ naciketaḥ agniḥ citaḥ ( tena ) nityaṁ prāptavān asmi ||
verses.auro_md:
*Nachiketas speaks:*

10) I know of treasure that it is not for ever; for not by things unstable shall one attain That One which is stable; therefore I heaped the fire of Nachiketas, and by the sacrifice of momentary things I won the Eternal.

glossary.meaning_en: by the sacrifice of transitory things

verses.hindi_explain: ''मैं धनकोष के विषय मे जानता हूँ कि वह अनित्य है; अनित्य (अध्रुव) पदार्थो से उस 'तत्त्व' की प्राप्ति नहीं होती जो नित्य (ध्रुव) है। इसलिए मैंने नचिकेता- अग्नि को संचित किया है तथा अनित्य पदार्थों की हवि देकर 'नित्य' तत्त्व को प्राप्त किया है।''
verses.meaning_en: I know of treasure that it is not for ever; for not by things unstable shall one attain That which is stable; therefore I heaped the fire of Nachiketas, and by the sacrifice of transitory things I won the Eternal.
verses.verse_skt:
जानाम्यहं शेवधिरित्यनित्यं न ह्यध्रुवैः प्राप्यते हि ध्रुवं तत्‌।
ततो मया नाचिकेतश्चितोऽग्निरनित्यैर्द्रव्यैः प्राप्तवानस्मि नित्यम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
jānāmyahaṁ śevadhirityanityaṁ na hyadhruvaiḥ prāpyate hi dhruvaṁ tat |
tato mayā nāciketaścito'gniranityairdravyaiḥ prāptavānasmi nityam ||

verses.anvaya_skt: नचिकेतः कामस्य आप्तिं जगतः प्रतिष्ठां क्रतोः आनन्त्यम् अभयस्य पारं स्तोमम् महत् उरुगायं प्रतिष्ठां दृष्ट्वा  त्वं  धृत्या  तत्  अत्यस्नाक्षीः ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: naciketaḥ kāmasya āptiṁ jagataḥ pratiṣṭhāṁ kratoḥ ānantyam abhayasya pāraṁ stomam mahat urugāyaṁ pratiṣṭhāṁ dṛṣṭvā ( tvaṁ ) dhṛtyā ( tat ) atyasnākṣīḥ ||
verses.auro_md:
When thou hast seen in thy grasp, O Nachiketas, the possession of desire and the firm foundation of this world and an infinity of power and the other shore of security and great praise and wide-moving foundation,[^11] wise and strong in steadfastness thou didst cast these things from thee.

[^11]: Or, "and great fame chanted through widest regions".

glossary.meaning_en: thou didst cast (these things from thee)

verses.hindi_explain: ''हे नचिकेता! कामना की प्राप्ति को, इस जगत् की दृढ प्रतिष्ठा को, शक्ति की अनन्तता को, अभय के दूसरे पार को, महती स्तुति को एवं विस्तृत प्रतिष्ठा<sup>११</sup> को अपने अधिकार मे आया देखकर भी, विवेक एवं धैर्य मे दृढ रहकर, तुमने इन सबका परित्याग कर दिया है।
verses.meaning_en: When thou hast seen in thy grasp, O Nachiketas, the possession of desire and firm foundation of this world and an infinity of power and the other shore of security and praise and scope and wide moving and firm foundation, wise and strong in steadfastness thou didst cast these things from thee.
verses.verse_skt:
कामस्याप्तिं जगतः प्रतिष्ठां क्रतोरानन्त्यमभयस्य पारम्‌।
स्तोमं अहदुरुगायं प्रतिष्ठां दृष्ट्वा धृत्या धीरो नचिकेतोऽत्यस्राक्षीः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
kāmasyāptiṁ jagataḥ pratiṣṭhāṁ kratorānantyamabhayasya pāram |
stomaṁ ahadurugāyaṁ pratiṣṭhāṁ dṛṣṭvā dhṛtyā dhīro naciketo'tyasrākṣīḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: दुर्दर्शं गूधम् अनुप्रविष्टं गुहाहितं गह्वरेष्ठं पुराणं तम् देवं अध्यात्मयोगाधिगमेन मत्वा धीरः हर्षशोकौ जहाति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: durdarśaṁ gūdham anupraviṣṭaṁ guhāhitaṁ gahvareṣṭhaṁ purāṇaṁ tam devaṁ adhyātmayogādhigamena matvā dhīraḥ harṣaśokau jahāti ||
verses.auro_md: Realising the God by attainment to Him through spiritual Yoga, even the Ancient of Days who hath entered deep into that which is hidden and is hard to see, for he is established in our secret being and lodged in the cavern heart of things, the wise and steadfast man casts away from him joy and sorrow.

glossary.meaning_en: the one who has entered deep into that which is hidden
lodged in the cavern heart of things
by attainment to Him through spiritual Yoga

verses.hindi_explain: ''अध्यात्मयोग के द्वारा उस 'देव' का बोध प्राप्त करके, जो 'पुराण' (पुरातन) है तथा जिसका दर्शन दुर्लभ है, कारण, वह हमारी गृढता में प्रविष्ट हो गया है, गुह्य-सत्ता में निहित है एवं पदार्थो की हृद्गुहा में स्थित है; ज्ञानी एवं धीर पुरुष हर्ष और शोक का परित्याग कर देता है।
verses.meaning_en: Realising God by attainment to Him through spiritual Yoga, even the Ancient of Days who hath entered deep into that which is hidden and is hard to see, for he is established in our secret being and lodged in the cavern heart of things, the wise and steadfast man casts far from him joy and sorrow.
verses.verse_skt:
तं दुर्दर्शं गूढमनुप्रविष्टं गुहाहितं गह्वरेष्ठं पुराणम्‌।
अध्यात्मयोगाधिगमेन देवं मत्वा धीरो हर्षशोकौ जहाति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
taṁ durdarśaṁ gūḍhamanupraviṣṭaṁ guhāhitaṁ gahvareṣṭhaṁ purāṇam |
adhyātmayogādhigamena devaṁ matvā dhīro harṣaśokau jahāti ||

verses.anvaya_skt: मर्त्यः एतत् श्रुत्वा अणुम् धर्म्यम् प्रब्रुह्य सम्परिगृह्य सः एतम् आप्य मोदनीयम् लब्ध्वा मोदते हि नचिकेतसम् प्रति  सद्म विवृतम् मन्ये ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: martyaḥ etat śrutvā aṇum dharmyam prabruhya samparigṛhya saḥ etam āpya modanīyam labdhvā modate hi naciketasam( prati ) sadma vivṛtam manye ||
verses.auro_md: When a mortal man has heard, when he has grasped, when he has forcefully separated the Righteous One from his body and won that subtle Being, then he has delight, for he has got that which one can indeed delight in. Verily, I deem of Nachiketas as a house wide open.

glossary.meaning_en: having forcefully separated from his body
that which one can indeed delight in

verses.hindi_explain:
<sup>११</sup>अथवा, ''तथा उस महिमामय यश को, जिसका गान विशालतम देशो में हो।''
''जब मर्त्यशील मनुष्य इस 'धर्म्य-तत्त्व' का श्रवण करके उसे प्राप्त कर लेता है तथा उसे अपने शरीर से पूर्णतया पृथक् करके उस 'अणुरूप सूक्ष्म सत्ता' को प्राप्त कर लेता है, तब वह आनन्दित होता है, क्योकि तब उसने उस 'तत्त्व' को प्राप्त कर लिया है जो वस्तुतः आनन्द का विषय है। निश्चय ही मैं नचिकेता को एक खुले हुए सदन के समान मानता हूँ।''
verses.meaning_en: When mortal man has heard, when he has grasped, when he has forcefully separated the Righteous One from his body and won that subtle Being, then he has delight, for he has got that which one can indeed delight in. Verily I deem of Nachiketas as a house wide open.
verses.verse_skt:
एतच्छ्रुत्वा सम्परिगृह्य मर्त्यः प्रवृह्य धर्म्यमणुमेतमाप्य।
स मोदते मोदनीयं हि लब्ध्वा विवृतं सद्म नचिकेतसं मन्ये ॥
verses.verse_tl:
etacchrutvā samparigṛhya martyaḥ pravṛhya dharmyamaṇumetamāpya |
sa modate modanīyaṁ hi labdhvā vivṛtaṁ sadma naciketasaṁ manye ||

verses.anvaya_skt: धर्मात् अन्यत्र अधर्मात् अन्यत्र अस्मात् कृतकृतात् अन्यत्र भूयात् भव्यात् अन्यत्र यत् पश्यसि तत् वद ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: dharmāt anyatra adharmāt anyatra asmāt kṛtakṛtāt anyatra bhūyāt bhavyāt anyatra yat paśyasi tat vada ||
verses.auro_md:
*Nachiketas speaks:*

14) Tell me of That which thou seest otherwhere than in virtue and otherwhere than in unrighteousness, otherwhere than in this created and this uncreated, otherwhere than in that which has been and that which shall be.

glossary.meaning_en: otherwhere than in the created and the uncreated
otherwhere than in that which has been and that which shall be

verses.hindi_explain:
नचिकेता कहता हैː
"मुझे उस 'परतत्त्व' के विषय में बताइये जिसे आप धर्म से परे (अन्यत्र), अधर्म से परे इस सृष्ट (कृत) तथा असृष्ट (अकृत) से अन्यत्र, भूत तथा भविष्यत् से भी अन्यत्र देखते हैं।''
verses.meaning_en: Tell me of That which thou seest otherwhere than in virtue and otherwhere than in unrighteousness, otherwhere than in the created and the uncreated, otherwhere than in that which has been and that which shall be.
verses.verse_skt:
अन्यत्र धर्मादन्यत्राधर्मादन्यत्रास्मात्कृताकृतात्‌।
अन्यत्र भूताच्च भव्याच्च यत्तत्पश्यसि तद्वद ॥
verses.verse_tl:
anyatra dharmādanyatrādharmādanyatrāsmātkṛtākṛtāt |
anyatra bhūtācca bhavyācca yattatpaśyasi tadvada ||

verses.anvaya_skt: सर्वे वेदाः यत् पदम् आमनन्ति सर्वाणि तपांसि च यत् वदन्ति यत् इच्छन्तः ब्रह्मचर्यं चरन्ति तत् पदं ते सङ्ग्रहेण ब्रवीमि ॐ इति एतत् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: sarve vedāḥ yat padam āmananti sarvāṇi tapāṁsi ca yat vadanti yat icchantaḥ brahmacaryaṁ caranti tat padaṁ te saṅgraheṇa bravīmi om iti etat ||
verses.auro_md:
*Yama speaks:*

15) The seat or goal that all the Vedas glorify and which austerities declare, for the desire of which men practise holy living, of That will I tell thee in brief compass. OM is that goal, O Nachiketas.
verses.hindi_explain:
यम कहते हैं ː
''जिस (परम) पद का सभी वेद महिमागान करते हैं तथा सभी तपस्याएं जिसके विषय में बताती हैं, जिसकी इच्छा करते हुए मनुष्य ब्रह्मचर्य का आचरण करते हैं, 'उसे' मैं तुम्हें संक्षेप से बताता हूँ। हे नचिकेता! वह परम पद है 'ॐ'।
verses.meaning_en: The seat and goal that all the Vedas glorify and which all austerities declare, for the desire of which men practise holy living, of That will I tell thee in brief compass. OM is that goal, O Nachiketas.
verses.verse_skt:
सर्वे वेदा यत्पदमामनन्ति तपांसि सर्वाणि च यद्वदन्ति।
यदिच्छन्तो ब्रह्मचर्यं चरन्ति तत्ते पदं संग्रहेण ब्रवीम्योमित्येतत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
sarve vedā yatpadamāmananti tapāṁsi sarvāṇi ca yadvadanti |
yadicchanto brahmacaryaṁ caranti tatte padaṁ saṁgraheṇa bravīmyomityetat ||

verses.anvaya_skt: एतेत् एव  हि अक्षरं ब्रह्म एतत् एव हि अक्षरं परम्। एतत् एव हि अक्सरं ज्ञात्वा यः यत् इच्छति तस्य तत् सिध्यति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: etet eva  hi akṣaraṁ brahma etat eva hi akṣaraṁ param| etat eva hi aksaraṁ jñātvā yaḥ yat icchati tasya tat ( sidhyati ) ||
verses.auro_md: For this Syllable is Brahman, this Syllable is the Most High: this Syllable if one knows, whatsoever one shall desire, it is his.
verses.hindi_explain: "यही 'अक्षर' है 'ब्रह्म', यही 'अक्षर' है 'परम-तत्त्व'। यदि इस 'अक्षर' को कोई जान ले, तो वह जिसकी भी इच्छा करता है, वही उसे प्राप्त हो जाता है।
verses.meaning_en: For, this Syllable is the Most High: this Syllable if one know, whatsoever one shall desire, it is his.
verses.verse_skt:
एतद्‌ध्येवाक्षरं ब्रह्म एतद्‌ध्येवाक्षरं परम्‌।
एतद्‌ध्येवाक्षरं ज्ञात्वा यो यदिच्छति तस्य तत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
etaddhyevākṣaraṁ brahma etaddhyevākṣaraṁ param |
etaddhyevākṣaraṁ jñātvā yo yadicchati tasya tat ||

verses.anvaya_skt: एतत् श्रेष्ठम् आलम्बनं। एतत् परम् आलम्बनं ज्ञात्वा ब्रह्मलोके महीयते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: etat śreṣṭham ālambanaṁ| etat param ālambanaṁ jñātvā brahmaloke mahīyate ||
verses.auro_md: This support is the best, this support is the highest, knowing this support one grows great in the world of the Brahman.

glossary.meaning_en: in the world of the Brahman

verses.hindi_explain: ''यह श्रेष्ठ आलम्बन है, यह परम आलम्बन है। इस आलम्बन को जानकर व्यक्ति ब्रह्मलोक में महिमान्वित होता है।
verses.meaning_en: This support is the best, this support is the highest, knowing this support one grows great in the world of the Brahman.
verses.verse_skt:
एतदालम्बनं श्रेष्ठमेतदालम्बनं परम्‌।
एतदालम्बनं ज्ञात्वा ब्रह्मलोके महीयते ॥
verses.verse_tl:
etadālambanaṁ śreṣṭhametadālambanaṁ param |
etadālambanaṁ jñātvā brahmaloke mahīyate ||

verses.anvaya_skt: विपश्चित् न जायते म्रियते वा। अयं कुतश्चित् न बभूब।  अस्मात्  न कश्चित्  बभूब । अयम् अजः नित्यः शाश्वतः पुराणः। शरीरे हन्यमाने न हन्यते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: vipaścit na jāyate mriyate vā| ayaṁ kutaścit na babhūba| ( asmāt ) na kaścit ( babhūba )| ayam ajaḥ nityaḥ śāśvataḥ purāṇaḥ| śarīre hanyamāne na hanyate ||
verses.auro_md: The Wise One is not born, neither does he die: he came not from anywhere, neither is he any one: he is unborn, he is everlasting, he is ancient and sempiternal: he is not slain in the slaying of the body.
verses.hindi_explain: ''इस 'प्रज्ञामय' का न जन्म होता है न मरण; न यह कहीं से आया है, न यह कोई व्यक्ति-विशेष है; यह अज है, नित्य है, शाश्वत है, पुराण है, शरीर का हनन होने पर इसका हनन नहीं होता।
verses.meaning_en: That Wise One is not born, neither does he die; he came not from anywhere, neither is he anyone; he is unborn, he is everlasting, he is ancient and sempiternal, he is not slain in the slaying of the body.
verses.verse_skt:
न जायते म्रियते वा विपश्चिन्नायं कुतश्चिन्न बभूव कश्चित्‌।
अजो नित्यः शाश्वतोऽयं पुराणो न हन्यते हन्यमाने शरीरे ॥
verses.verse_tl:
na jāyate mriyate vā vipaścinnāyaṁ kutaścinna babhūva kaścit |
ajo nityaḥ śāśvato'yaṁ purāṇo na hanyate hanyamāne śarīre ||

verses.anvaya_skt: हन्ता हन्तुं मन्यते चेत् हतः हतं मन्यते चेत् तौ उभौ न विजानीतः। अयं न हन्ति न हन्यते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: hantā hantuṁ manyate cet hataḥ hataṁ manyate cet tau ubhau na vijānītaḥ| ayaṁ na hanti na hanyate ||
verses.auro_md: If the slayer think that he slays, if the slain think that he is slain, both of these have not the knowledge. This slays not, neither is He slain.
verses.hindi_explain: ''यदि हन्ता यह मानता है कि वह हनन करता है, यदि हनन किया हुआ (हत) यह मानता है कि उसका हनन किया गया है तो उन दोनों को ही ज्ञान नहीं है; 'यह' न हनन करता है न 'इसका' हनन होता है।
verses.meaning_en: If the slayer think that he slays, if the slain think that he is slain, both of these have not the knowledge. This slays not, neither is He slain.
verses.verse_skt:
हन्ता चेन्मन्यते हन्तुं हतश्चेन्मन्यते हतम्‌।
उभौ तौ न विजानीतो नायं हन्ति न हन्यते ॥
verses.verse_tl:
hantā cenmanyate hantuṁ hataścenmanyate hatam |
ubhau tau na vijānīto nāyaṁ hanti na hanyate ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अणोः अणीयान् महतः महीयान् आत्मा अस्य जन्तोः गुहायां निहितः। अक्रतुः वीतशोकः धातुप्रसादात् आत्मनः तं महिमानं पश्यति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: aṇoḥ aṇīyān mahataḥ mahīyān ātmā asya jantoḥ guhāyāṁ nihitaḥ| akratuḥ vītaśokaḥ dhātuprasādāt ātmanaḥ taṁ mahimānaṁ paśyati ||
verses.auro_md: Finer than the fine, huger than the huge the self hides in the secret heart of the creature: when a man strips himself of will and is weaned from sorrow, then he beholds Him; purified from the mental elements he sees the greatness of the Self-being.

glossary.meaning_en: one who had stripped himself of will
one who is weaned from sorrow

verses.hindi_explain: ''अणु से भी सूक्ष्मतर, महान् से भी महत्तर, 'आत्मतत्त्व' प्राणी की हृद्-गुहा में निहित है। जब मनुष्य अपने आपको कामादि संकल्पों से मुक्त एवं शोक से रहित कर लेता है तब वह 'उसका' दर्शन करता है। मानसिक प्रवृत्तियों की शुद्धि के प्रसाद से वह 'आत्म-सत्ता' की महिमा का दर्शन करता है।
verses.meaning_en: Finer than the fine, huger than the huge the Self hides in the secret heart of the creature: when a man strips himself of will and is weaned from sorrow, then he beholds Him, purified from the mental elements he sees the greatness of the Self-being.
verses.verse_skt:
अणोरणीयान्महतो महीयानात्मास्य जन्तोर्निहितो गुहायाम्‌।
तमक्रतुः पश्यति वीतशोको धातुप्रसादान्महिमानमात्मनः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
aṇoraṇīyānmahato mahīyānātmāsya jantornihito guhāyām |
tamakratuḥ paśyati vītaśoko dhātuprasādānmahimānamātmanaḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अयं आत्मा  आसीनः दूरं व्रजति। शयानः सर्वतः याति। मदामदं तं देवं मदन्यः कः ज्ञातुं अर्हति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ( ayaṁ ātmā ) āsīnaḥ dūraṁ vrajati| śayānaḥ sarvataḥ yāti| madāmadaṁ taṁ devaṁ madanyaḥ kaḥ jñātuṁ arhati ||
verses.auro_md: Seated He journeys far off, lying down he goes everywhere. Who other than I is fit to know God, even Him who is rapture and the transcendence of rapture?

glossary.meaning_en: Him who is rapture and the transcendence of rapture

verses.hindi_explain: ''बैठा हुआ 'वह' दूरदूर की यात्रा करता है, लेटा हुआ 'वह' सर्वत्र जाता है। मेरे अतिरिक्त अन्य कौन है जो उस 'देव' को जानने में समर्थ है जो आनन्दस्वरूप है तथा आनन्दातीत है?
verses.meaning_en: Seated He journeys far off, lying down He goes everywhere. Who other than I is fit to know God, even Him who is rapture and the transcendence of rapture?
verses.verse_skt:
आसीनो दूरं व्रजति शयानो याति सर्वतः।
कस्तं मदामदं देवं मदन्यो ज्ञातुमर्हति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
āsīno dūraṁ vrajati śayāno yāti sarvataḥ |
kastaṁ madāmadaṁ devaṁ madanyo jñātumarhati ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अनवस्थेषु शरीरेसु अवस्थितम् अशरीरं महान्तं विभुम् आत्मानं मत्वा धीरः न शोचति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: anavastheṣu śarīresu avasthitam aśarīraṁ mahāntaṁ vibhum ātmānaṁ matvā dhīraḥ na śocati ||
verses.auro_md: Realising the Bodiless in bodies, the Established in things unsettled, the Great and Omnipresent Self, the wise and steadfast soul grieves no longer.
verses.hindi_explain: ''शरीरों में 'अशरीरी', अस्थिर पदार्थों में 'स्थित'-तत्त्व, 'महिमामय' 'विभुव्यापी आत्मा' का साक्षात्कार करके ज्ञानी एवं धीर पुरुष शोक नहीं करते।
verses.meaning_en: Realising the Bodiless in bodies, the Established in things unsettled, the Great and Omnipresent Self, the wise and steadfast soul grieves no longer.
verses.verse_skt:
अशरीरं शरीरेष्वनवस्थेष्ववस्थितम्‌।
महान्तं विभुमात्मानं मत्वा धीरो न शोचति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
aśarīraṁ śarīreṣvanavastheṣvavasthitam |
mahāntaṁ vibhumātmānaṁ matvā dhīro na śocati ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अयम् आत्मा प्रवचनेन न लभ्यः। न मेधया न बहुधा श्रुतेन। एषः यं एव वॄणुते तेन लभ्यः। तस्य एषः आत्मा त्वां तनूं विवृणुते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ayam ātmā pravacanena na labhyaḥ| na medhayāa na bahudhā śrutena| eṣaḥ yaṁ eva vṝṇute tena labhyaḥ| tasya eṣaḥ ātmā tvāṁ tanūṁ vivṛṇute ||
verses.auro_md: The Self is not to be won by eloquent teaching, nor by brain power, nor by much learning: but only he whom this Being chooses can win Him; for to him this Self bares His body.
verses.hindi_explain: "यह 'आत्मा' प्रवचन द्वारा लभ्य नहीं है, न मेधाशक्ति से, न बहुत शास्त्रों के श्रवण से 'यह' लभ्य है। यह आत्मा जिसका वरण करता है उसी के द्वारा 'यह' लभ्य है, उसी के प्रति यह 'आत्मा' अपने कलेवर को अनावृत करता है।
verses.meaning_en: The Self is not to be won by eloquent teaching, nor by brain power, nor by much learning: but only he whom this being chooses can win Him, for to him this Self bares His body.
verses.verse_skt:
नायमात्मा प्रवचनेन लभ्यो न मेधया न बहुना श्रुतेन।
यमेवैष वृणुते तेन लभ्यस्तस्यैष आत्मा विवृणुते तनूं स्वाम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
nāyamātmā pravacanena labhyo na medhayā na bahunā śrutena |
yamevaiṣa vṛṇute tena labhyastasyaiṣa ātmā vivṛṇute tanūṁ svām ||

verses.anvaya_skt: दुश्चरितां न अविरतः न अशान्तः न असमाहितः न वा अशान्तमानसः प्रज्ञानेन अपि एनम् आप्नुयात् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: duścaritāṁ na avirataḥ na aśāntaḥ na asamāhitaḥ na vā aśāntamānasaḥ prajñānena api enam āpnuyāt ||
verses.auro_md: None who has not ceased from doing evil, or who is not calm, or not concentrated in his being, or whose mind has not been tranquillised, can by wisdom attain to Him.

glossary.meaning_en: none who is not concentrated in his being
none whose mind has not been tranquillised

verses.hindi_explain: ''जो दुष्कर्मों से विरत नहीं हुआ है, जो शान्त नहीं है, जो अपने में एकाग्र (समाहित) नहीं है अथवा जिसका मन शान्त नहीं है ऐसे किसी को भी यह 'आत्मा' प्रज्ञा द्वारा प्राप्त नहीं हो सकता।
verses.meaning_en: None who has not ceased from doing evil, or who is not calm, or not concentrated in his being, or whose mind has not been tranquillised, can by wisdom attain to Him.
verses.verse_skt:
नाविरतो दुश्चरितान्नाशान्तो नासमाहितः।
नाशान्तमानसो वापि प्रज्ञानेनैनमाप्नुयात्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
nāvirato duścaritānnāśānto nāsamāhitaḥ |
nāśāntamānaso vāpi prajñānenainamāpnuyāt ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यस्य ब्रह्म च क्षत्रं च उभे ओदनः भवतः। यस्य मृत्युः उपसेचनं। सः यत्र  अस्ति   तत्  इत्या कः वेदः ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yasya brahma ca kṣatraṁ ca ubhe odanaḥ bhavataḥ| yasya mṛtyuḥ upasecanaṁ| saḥ yatra ( asti ) ( tat ) ityā kaḥ vedaḥ ||
verses.auro_md: He to whom the sages are as meat and heroes as food for his eating and Death is an ingredient of His banquet, how thus shall one know of Him where He abides?

glossary.meaning_en: are as food for His eating
Death, of Him where He abideth?
is an ingredient of His banquet

verses.hindi_explain: '''वह' (परतत्त्व) जिसके लिए ब्राह्मण और क्षत्रिय दोनो भोज्य पदार्थ (ओदन) मात्र हैं, और 'मृत्यु' जिसके महाभोज का एक रसाहार (उपसेचन) है। अतः ऐसे 'उसे' कौन जान पायेगा कि 'वह' क्या है और कहाँ निवास करता है?"
verses.meaning_en: He to whom the sages are as meat and heroes as food for His eating and Death is an ingredient of His banquet, how thus shall one know of Him where He abideth?
verses.verse_skt:
यस्य ब्रह्म च क्षत्रं च उभे भवत ओदनः।
मृत्युर्यस्योपसेचनं क इत्था वेद यत्र सः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yasya brahma ca kṣatraṁ ca ubhe bhavata odanaḥ |
mṛtyuryasyopasecanaṁ ka itthā veda yatra saḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: लोके सुकृतस्य ऋतम् पिवन्तौ परमे परार्धे गुहां प्रविष्टौ  तौ तिष्ठतः । ब्रह्मविदः  तौ  छायातपौ  इव  वदन्ति। ये च पञ्चाग्नयः त्रिणाचिकेताः ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: loke sukṛtasya ṛtam pivantau parame parārdhe guhāṁ praviṣṭau ( tau tiṣṭhataḥ )| brahmavidaḥ ( tau ) chāyātapau ( iva ) vadanti| ye ca pañcāgnayaḥ triṇāciketāḥ ||
verses.auro_md:
*Yama speaks:*

1) There are two that drink deep of the truth in the world of work well accomplished: they are lodged in the secret plane of being, in the highest kingdom of the most High: as of light and shade the knowers of Brahman speak of them, and those of the five fires and those who kindle thrice the fire of Nachiketas.

glossary.meaning_en: in the world of work well accomplished
in the highest kingdom of the most High
those who are of the five fires
those who have the three fires of Nachiketas

verses.hindi_explain:
यम कहते हैं ː
"सुसम्पन्न कर्म (सुकृत) के लोक में 'सत्य' का सुप्त होकर पान करने वाले जो हैं ː वे सत्ता के गुह्यलोक में अवस्थित हैं तथा 'परमोच्च' उच्च के उच्चतम धाम में जिनका निवास स्थान है। ब्रह्मवेत्ता उन्हें प्रकाश तथा छाया की तरह बताते हैं। पञ्चाग्नि का सेवन करने वाले तथा जो तीन नचिकेता-अग्नि वाले हैं वे भी ऐसा बताते हैं।
verses.meaning_en: There are two that drink deep of the Truth in the world of work well accomplished: they are lodged in the secret plane of being and in the highest kingdom of the most High is their dwelling: as of light and shade the knowers of the Brahman speak of them and those of the five fires and those who have the three fires of Nachiketas.
verses.verse_skt:
ऋतं पिबन्तौ सुकृतस्य लोके गुहां प्रविष्टौ परमे परार्धे।
छायातपौ ब्रह्मविदो वदन्ति पञ्चाग्नयो ये च त्रिणाचिकेताः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
ṛtaṁ pibantau sukṛtasya loke guhāṁ praviṣṭau parame parārdhe |
chāyātapau brahmavido vadanti pañcāgnayo ye ca triṇāciketāḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: ईजानानां यः सेतुः नचिकेतं शकेमहि।  अपि  च तितीर्षताम् अभयम् पारं यत् अक्षरं परं ब्रह्म ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ījānānāṁ yaḥ setuḥ naciketaṁ śakemahi| ( api ) ca titīrṣatām abhayam pāraṁ yat akṣaraṁ paraṁ brahma ||
verses.auro_md: May we have strength to kindle the Agni of Nachiketas for he is the bridge of those who do sacrifice and he is Brahman Supreme and imperishable, and the far shore of security to those who would cross this ocean.

glossary.meaning_en: may we have strength to kindle
to those who would cross this ocean

verses.hindi_explain: ''हम उस 'नचिकेता-अग्नि' को प्रदीप्त करने में समर्थ बनें नो यज्ञ करने वाली के लिए सेतु है तथा जो परम एवं अक्षर 'ब्रह्म' है और जो इस सागर को पार करने के इच्छुकों के लिए निर्भय-सुरक्षित तट है।
verses.meaning_en: May we have strength to kindle Agni Nachiketas, for he is the bridge of those who do sacrifice and he is Brahman supreme and imperishable, and the far shore of security to those who would cross this ocean.
verses.verse_skt:
यः सेतुरीजानानामक्षरं ब्रह्म यत्परम्‌।
अभयं तितीर्षतां पारं नाचिकेतं शकेमहि ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yaḥ seturījānānāmakṣaraṁ brahma yatparam |
abhayaṁ titīrṣatāṁ pāraṁ nāciketaṁ śakemahi ||

verses.anvaya_skt: आत्मानं रथिनं विद्धि। शरीरं तु रथं एव। बुद्धिं तु सारथिं विद्धि। मनः च प्रग्रहम् एव ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ātmānaṁ rathinaṁ viddhi| śarīraṁ tu rathaṁ eva| buddhiṁ tu sārathiṁ viddhi| manaḥ ca pragraham eva ||
verses.auro_md: Know the body for a chariot and the soul for the master of the chariot: know Reason for the charioteer and the mind for the reins only.
verses.hindi_explain: ''शरीर को रथ एवं आत्मा को रथ का स्वामी (रथी) जानो; 'बुद्धि' को सारथी एवं मन को केवल घोड़ों की रास (लगाम) जानो।
verses.meaning_en: Know the body for a chariot and the soul for the master of the chariot: know Reason for the charioteer and the mind for the reins only.
verses.verse_skt:
आत्मानं रथिनं विद्धि शरीरं रथमेव तु।
बुद्धिं तु सारथिं विद्धि मनः प्रग्रहमेव च ॥
verses.verse_tl: ātmānaṁ rathinaṁ viddhi śarīraṁ rathameva tu | uddhiṁ tu sārathiṁ viddhi manaḥ pragrahameva ca ||

verses.anvaya_skt: इन्द्रियाणि हयान् आहुः विषयान् तेषु गोचरान् आत्मेन्द्रियमनोयुक्तं  तम् आत्मनं भोक्ता इति मनीषिणः आहुः ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: indriyāṇi hayān āhuḥ viṣayān teṣu gocarān ātmendriyamanoyuktaṁ ( tam ātmanaṁ ) bhoktā iti manīṣiṇaḥ āhuḥ ||
verses.auro_md: The senses they speak of as the steeds and the objects of sense as the paths in which they move; and One yoked with self and the mind and the senses, as the enjoyer, say the thinkers.

glossary.meaning_en: as the paths in which they move
one yoked with Self and the mind and the senses

verses.hindi_explain: ''मनीषीगण इन्द्रियों को अश्व तथा इन्द्रियगोचर विषयों को उनके विचरण के मार्ग कहते हैं। तथा 'वह' जो 'आत्मा', मन तथा इन्द्रियों से युक्त है, वह भोक्ता है।
verses.meaning_en: The senses they speak of as the steeds and the objects of sense as the paths in which they move; and One yoked with Self and the mind and the senses is the enjoyer, say the thinkers.
verses.verse_skt:
इन्द्रियाणि हयानाहुर्विषयांस्तेषु गोचरान्‌।
