आत्मेन्द्रियमनोयुक्तं भोक्तेत्याहुर्मनीषिणः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
indriyāṇi hayānāhurviṣayāṁsteṣu gocarān |
ātmendriyamanoyuktaṁ bhoktetyāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यः तु सदा अयुक्तेन मनसा अविज्ञातवान् भवति सारथेः दुष्टाश्वाः इव तस्य इन्द्रियाणि अवश्यानि  भवन्ति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yaḥ tu sadā ayuktena manasā avijñātavān bhavati sāratheḥ duṣṭāśvāḥ iva tasya indriyāṇi avaśyāni ( bhavanti ) ||
verses.auro_md: Now he that is without knowledge with his mind ever unapplied, his senses are to him as wild horses and will not obey their driver of the chariot.

glossary.meaning_en: of the driver of the chariot

verses.meaning_en: Now he that is without knowledge with his mind ever unapplied, his senses are to him as wild horses and will not obey the driver of the chariot.
verses.verse_skt:
यस्त्वविज्ञानवान्भवत्ययुक्तेन मनसा सदा 
तस्येन्द्रियाण्यवश्यानि दुष्टाश्वा इव सारथेः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yastvavijñānavānbhavatyayuktena manasā sadā 
tasyendriyāṇyavaśyāni duṣṭāśvā iva sāratheḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यः तु सदा युक्तेन मनसा विज्ञानवान् भवति सारथेः सदश्वाः इव तस्य इन्द्रियाणि वश्यानि भवन्ति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yaḥ tu sadā yuktena manasā vijñānavān bhavati sāratheḥ sadaśvāḥ iva tasya indriyāṇi vaśyāni ( bhavanti ) ||
verses.auro_md: But he that has knowledge with his mind ever applied, his senses are to him as noble steeds and they obey the driver.

glossary.meaning_en: of the driver of the chariot

verses.hindi_explain: ''जो अज्ञानी है, जिसका मन सर्वदा अयुक्त रहता है, उसकी इन्द्रियाँ दुष्ट जंगली घोड़ों के समान होती हैं और वे अपने सारथी का आदेश-पालन नहीं करतीं।
verses.meaning_en: But he that has knowledge with his mind ever applied, his senses are to him as noble steeds and they obey the driver.
verses.verse_skt:
यस्तु विज्ञानवान्भवति युक्तेन मनसा सदा 
तस्येन्द्रियाणि वश्यानि सदश्वा इव सारथेः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yastu vijñānavānbhavati yuktena manasā sadā 
tasyendriyāṇi vaśyāni sadaśvā iva sāratheḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यः तु अविज्ञानवान् अमनस्कः सदा अशुचिः भवति सः तत्पदं न आप्नोति। संसारं च अधिगच्छति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yaḥ tu avijñānavān amanaskaḥ sadā aśuciḥ bhavati saḥ tatpadaṁ na āpnoti| saṁsāraṁ ca adhigacchati ||
verses.auro_md: Yea, he that is without knowledge and is unmindful and is ever unclean, reaches not that goal, but wanders in the cycle of phenomena.

glossary.meaning_en: wanders in the cycle of phenomena

verses.hindi_explain: ''वस्तुतः वह जो अज्ञानी होता है, अचेतनमना तथा सदा अशुचिमय होता है, वह उस (परम) पद को प्राप्त नहीं करता, वह संसार-चक्र में ही भटकता रहता है।
verses.meaning_en: Yea, he that is without knowledge and is unmindful and is ever unclean, reaches not that goal, but wanders in the cycle of phenomena.
verses.verse_skt:
यस्त्वविज्ञानवान्भवत्यमनस्कः सदाऽशुचिः।
न स तत्पदमाप्नोति संसारं चाधिगच्छति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yastvavijñānavānbhavatyamanaskaḥ sadā'śuciḥ |
na sa tatpadamāpnoti saṁsāraṁ cādhigacchati ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यः तु विज्ञानवान् समनस्कः सदा शुचिः भवति सः तु तत् पदं आप्नोति। यस्मात् भुयः न जायते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yaḥ tu vijñānavān samanaskaḥ sadā śuciḥ bhavati saḥ tu tat padaṁ āpnoti| yasmāt bhuyaḥ na jāyate ||
verses.auro_md: But he that has knowledge and is mindful, pure always, reaches that goal whence he is not born again.
verses.hindi_explain: ''परन्तु जो ज्ञानवान् होता है, सचेतनमना तथा सदा शुचिमान् होता है, वह उस (परम) पद को प्राप्त करता है जहाँ से वह पुनः जन्म नहीं लेता।
verses.meaning_en: But he that has knowledge and is mindful and pure always, reaches that goal whence he is not born again.
verses.verse_skt:
यस्तु विज्ञानवान्भवति समनस्कः सदा शुचिः।
स तु तत्पदमाप्नोति यस्माद्  भूयो न जायते ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yastu vijñānavānbhavati samanaskaḥ sadā śuciḥ |
sa tu tatpadamāpnoti yasmād  bhūyo na jāyate ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यः तु विज्ञानसारथि प्रग्रहवान् नरः सः अध्वनः पारम् आप्नोति तद् विष्णोः परं पदम् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yaḥ tu vijñānasārathi pragrahavān naraḥ saḥ adhvanaḥ pāram āpnoti tad viṣṇoḥ paraṁ padam ||
verses.auro_md: That man who uses the mind for reins and the knowledge for the driver, reaches the end of his road, the highest seat of Vishnu.

glossary.meaning_en: the one who uses the mind for reins
the one who uses the knowledge for the driver

verses.hindi_explain: ''जो मनुष्य मन को लगाम की तरह प्रयोग करता है तथा विज्ञान (गहन ज्ञान) को सारथी बनाता है, वह अपने मार्ग के अन्त को, विष्णु के परम-पद को प्राप्त करता है।
verses.meaning_en: That man who uses the mind for reins and the knowledge for the driver, reaches the end of his road, the highest seat of Vishnu.
verses.verse_skt:
विज्ञानसारथिर्यस्तु मनः प्रग्रहवान्नरः।
सोऽध्वनः पारमाप्नोति तद्विष्णोः परमं पदम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
vijñānasārathiryastu manaḥ pragrahavānnaraḥ |
so'dhvanaḥ pāramāpnoti tadviṣṇoḥ paramaṁ padam ||

verses.anvaya_skt: इन्द्रिभेयः अर्थाः पराः अर्थेभ्यः च मनः परम्। मनसः तु बुद्धिः बुद्धेः महान् आत्मा परः ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: indribheyaḥ arthāḥ parāḥ arthebhyaḥ ca manaḥ param| manasaḥ tu buddhiḥ buddheḥ mahān ātmā paraḥ ||
verses.auro_md: Than the senses the objects of sense are higher: and higher than the objects of sense is the Mind: and higher than the Mind is the faculty of knowledge: and than that the Great Self higher.
verses.hindi_explain: ''इन्द्रियों से उच्चतर हैं उनके विषय, उन इन्द्रिय-विषयों से उच्चतर है 'मन',  'मन' से उच्चतर है बुद्धि तथा उससे (बुद्धि से) उच्चतर है 'महान् आत्मा'।
verses.meaning_en: Than the senses the objects of sense are higher; and higher than the objects of sense is the Mind; and higher than the Mind is the faculty of knowledge; and than that is the Great Self higher.
verses.verse_skt:
इन्द्रियेभ्यः परा ह्यर्था अर्थेभ्यश्च परं मनः।
मनसस्तु परा बुद्धिर्बुद्धेरात्मा महान्परः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
indriyebhyaḥ parā hyarthā arthebhyaśca paraṁ manaḥ |
manasastu parā buddhirbuddherātmā mahānparaḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: महतः अव्यक्तं परम्। अव्यक्तात् पुरुषः परः। पुरुषात् परं न किंचित्  अस्ति । सा काष्ठा। सा परा गतिः ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: mahataḥ avyaktaṁ param| avyaktāt puruṣaḥ paraḥ| puruṣāt paraṁ na kiṁcit ( asti )| sā kāṣṭhā| sā parā gatiḥ ||
verses.auro_md: And higher than the Great-Self is the Unmanifest and higher than the Unmanifest is the Purusha: than the Purusha there is none higher: He is the culmination. He is the highest goal of the journey.

glossary.meaning_en: than the Purusha there is none higher
the highest goal of the journey

verses.hindi_explain: "उस महान् आत्मा से उच्चतर 'अव्यक्त' है, 'अव्यक्त' से उच्चतर 'पुरुष' है; 'पुरुष' से उच्चतर कुछ भी नहीं ː 'बर्ही' सत्ता की पराकाष्ठा है, वही यात्रा का परम लक्ष्य (परा गति) है।
verses.meaning_en: And higher than the Great Self is the Unmanifest and higher than the Unmanifest is the Purusha: than the Purusha there is none higher: He is the culmination, He is the highest goal of the journey.
verses.verse_skt:
महतः परमव्यक्तमव्यक्तात्पुरुषः परः।
पुरुषान्न परं किंचित्सा काष्ठा सा परा गतिः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
mahataḥ paramavyaktamavyaktātpuruṣaḥ paraḥ |
puruṣānna paraṁ kiṁcitsā kāṣṭhā sā parā gatiḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: सर्वेषु भूतेसु गूढः एषः आत्मा न प्रकासते। सुक्ष्मदर्शिभिः अग्र्यया सुक्ष्मया बुद्ध्या  एषः आत्मा  तु दॄश्यते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: sarveṣu bhūtesu gūḍhaḥ eṣaḥ ātmā na prakāsate| sukṣmadarśibhiḥ agryayā sukṣmayā buddhyā ( eṣaḥ ātmā ) tu dṝśyate ||
verses.auro_md: He is the secret Self in all existences and does not manifest Himself to the vision: yet is He seen by the seers of the subtle by a subtle and perfect understanding.

glossary.meaning_en: does not manifest Himself to the vision
by the seers of the subtle
by a subtle and perfect understanding

verses.hindi_explain: ''समस्त भूतों में गूढ 'आत्म तत्त्व' 'स्वयं' को दृष्टिगोचर नहीं बनाताː तो भी 'वह' सूक्ष्मदर्शी द्रष्टाओं के द्वारा सूक्ष्म एवं कुशाग्र बुद्धि से देखा जाता है।
verses.meaning_en: The secret Self in all existences does not manifest Himself to the vision: yet is He seen by the seers of the subtle by a subtle and perfect understanding.
verses.verse_skt:
एष सर्वेषु भूतेषु गूढोऽऽत्मा न प्रकाशते।
दृश्यते त्वग्र्यया बुद्ध्या सूक्ष्मया सूक्ष्मदर्शिभिः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
eṣa sarveṣu bhūteṣu gūḍho''tmā na prakāśate |
dṛśyate tvagryayā buddhyā sūkṣmayā sūkṣmadarśibhiḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: प्राज्ञः वाक् मनसी यच्चेत् तत् ज्ञाने आत्मनि यच्छेत् ज्ञानं महति आत्मनि नियच्छेत् तत् शान्ते आत्मनि यच्छेत् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: prājñaḥ vāk manasī yaccet tat jñāne ātmani yacchet jñānaṁ mahati ātmani niyacchet tat śānte ātmani yacchet ||
verses.auro_md: Let the wise man restrain speech in his mind and mind in Self, and knowledge in the Great-Self, and that again let him restrain in the Self that is at peace.

glossary.meaning_en: in the Self that is at peace

verses.hindi_explain: ''प्रज्ञावान् व्यक्ति अपनी वाणी को मन में नियन्त्रित रखे, उस मन को ज्ञानस्वरूप आत्मा में नियन्त्रित रखे तथा ज्ञान को 'महान् आत्मा' में नियन्त्रित रखे और उसे पुनः उस 'आत्मा' में नियन्त्रित रखे जो शान्त-स्वरूप है।
verses.meaning_en: Let the wise man restrain speech in his mind and mind in his self of knowledge, and knowledge in the Great Self, and that again let him restrain in the Self that is at peace.
verses.verse_skt:
यच्छेद्वाङ्मनसी प्राज्ञस्तद्यच्छेज्ज्ञान आत्मनि।
ज्ञानमात्मनि महति नियच्छेत्तद्यच्छेच्छान्त आत्मनि ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yacchedvāṅmanasī prājñastadyacchejjñāna ātmani |
jñānamātmani mahati niyacchettadyacchecchānta ātmani ||

verses.anvaya_skt: उतिष्ठत जग्रत वरान् प्राप्य  तत्  निबोधत। निशिता क्षुरस्य धारा दुरत्यया दुर्गं तत् पथः  इति  कवयः वदन्ति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: utiṣṭhata jagrata varān prāpya ( tat ) nibodhata| niśitā kṣurasya dhārā duratyayā durgaṁ tat pathaḥ ( iti ) kavayaḥ vadanti ||
verses.auro_md: Arise, awake, find out the great ones and learn of them: for sharp as a razor's edge, hard to traverse, difficult of going is that path, say the sages.
verses.hindi_explain: ''उठो, जागो, वरिष्ठ पुरुषों को पाकर उनसे बोध प्राप्त करो। छुरी की तीक्ष्णा धार पर चलकर उसे पार करने के समान दुर्गम है यह पथ-ऐसा ऋषिगण कहते हैं।
verses.meaning_en: Arise, awake, find out the great ones and learn of them; for sharp as a razor's edge, hard to traverse, difficult of going is that path, say the sages.
verses.verse_skt:
उत्तिष्ठत जाग्रत प्राप्य वरान्निबोधत।
क्षुरस्य धारा निशिता दुरत्यया दुर्गं पथस्तत्कवयो वदन्ति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
uttiṣṭhata jāgrata prāpya varānnibodhata |
kṣurasya dhārā niśitā duratyayā durgaṁ pathastatkavayo vadanti ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यत् अशव्दम् अस्पर्शम् अरुपम् अव्ययं तथा अरसं नित्यम् अगन्धवत् च  भवति  अनाद्यनन्तम् महतः परं धृवं तत् निचाय्य मॄत्युमुखात् प्रमुच्यते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yat aśavdam asparśam arupam avyayaṁ tathā arasaṁ nityam agandhavat ca ( bhavati ) anādyanantam mahataḥ paraṁ dhṛvaṁ tat nicāyya mṝtyumukhāt pramucyate ||
verses.auro_md: That in which sound is not, nor touch, nor shape, nor diminution, nor taste, nor smell, that which is eternal, and It is without end or beginning, higher than the Great-Self and stable,—that having seen, from the mouth of death there is deliverance.

glossary.meaning_en: It is without end or beginning

verses.hindi_explain: ''वह 'परतत्त्व' जिसमें न शब्द है, न स्पर्श और न रूप है, जो अव्यय है जिसमें न कोई रस है और न कोई गन्ध है, जो नित्य है, अनादि तथा अनन्त है, 'महान् आत्मतत्त्व' से भी उच्चतर (परे) है, ध्रुव (स्थिर) है उसका दर्शन करके मृत्यु के मुख से भुक्ति मिल जाती है।''
verses.meaning_en: That in which sound is not, nor touch, nor shape, nor diminution, nor taste, nor smell, that which is eternal, and It is without end or beginning, higher than the Great Self and stable,-that having seen, from the mouth of death there is deliverance.
verses.verse_skt:
अशब्दमस्पर्शमरूपमव्ययं तथाऽरसं नित्यमगन्धवच्च यत्‌।
अनाद्यनन्तं महतः परं ध्रुवं निचाय्य तन्मृत्युमुखात्‌ प्रमुच्यते ॥
verses.verse_tl:
aśabdamasparśamarūpamavyayaṁ tathā'rasaṁ nityamagandhavacca yat |
anādyanantaṁ mahataḥ paraṁ dhruvaṁ nicāyya tanmṛtyumukhāt pramucyate ||

verses.anvaya_skt: मेधावी  इदं  मॄत्युप्रोक्तं सनातनं नाचिकेतम् उपाख्यानम् उक्त्वा श्रुत्वा च ब्रह्मलोके महीयते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: medhāvī ( idaṁ ) mṝtyuproktaṁ sanātanaṁ nāciketam upākhyānam uktvā śrutvā ca brahmaloke mahīyate ||
verses.auro_md: The man of intelligence having spoken or heard the eternal story of Nachiketas wherein Death was the speaker, grows great in the world of the Brahman.

glossary.meaning_en: in the world of the Brahman

verses.hindi_explain: मेधावी व्यक्ति नचिकेता के इस सनातन उपाख्यान को कहकर अथवा सुनकर, जिसके वक्ता थे मृत्युदेव, ब्रह्मलोक में महिमान्वित होता है।
verses.meaning_en: The man of intelligence having spoken or heard the eternal story of Nachiketas wherein Death was the speaker, grows great in the world of the Brahman.
verses.verse_skt:
नाचिकेतमुपाख्यानं मृत्युप्रोक्तं सनातनम्‌।
उक्त्वा श्रुत्वा च मेधावी ब्रह्मलोके महीयते ॥
verses.verse_tl:
nāciketamupākhyānaṁ mṛtyuproktaṁ sanātanam |
uktvā śrutvā ca medhāvī brahmaloke mahīyate ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यः प्रयतः परमं गुह्यम् इदं ब्रह्मसंसदि वा श्राद्धकले आवयेत् तत् आनन्त्याय कल्पते। तत् आनन्त्याय कल्पते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yaḥ prayataḥ paramaṁ guhyam idaṁ brahmasaṁsadi vā śrāddhakale āvayet tat ānantyāya kalpate| tat ānantyāya kalpate ||
verses.auro_md: He who being pure recites this supreme secret at the time of the Shraddha in the assembly of the Brahmins, that turns for him to infinite existence.

glossary.meaning_en: in the assembly of the Brahmins
that turns for him to infinite existence

verses.hindi_explain: जो शुद्धचित्त होकर श्राद्धकाल में ब्राह्मणों की सभा में इस परम रहस्य को सुनाता है, वह उसे अनन्तता के लिए योग्य बनाता है।
verses.meaning_en: He who being pure recites this supreme secret at the time of the Shraddha in the assembly of the Brahmins, that turns for him to infinite existence.
verses.verse_skt:
य इमं परमं गुह्यं श्रावयेद्‌ ब्रह्मसंसदि।
प्रयतः श्राद्धकाले वा तदानन्त्याय कल्पते।
तदानन्त्याय कल्पत इति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
ya imaṁ paramaṁ guhyaṁ śrāvayed brahmasaṁsadi |
prayataḥ śrāddhakāle vā tadānantyāya kalpate |
tadānantyāya kalpata iti ||

verses.anvaya_skt: स्वयम्भूः खानि पराञ्चि व्यतृणत् तस्मात् पराङ् पस्यति। न अन्तरान्मन्। कश्चित् धीरः अमृतत्वम् इच्छन् आवृत्तचक्षुः प्रत्यगात्मानम् ऐक्षत् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: svayambhūḥ khāni parāñci vyatṛṇat tasmāt parāṅ pasyati| na antarānman| kaścit dhīraḥ amṛtatvam icchan āvṛttacakṣuḥ pratyagātmānam aikṣat ||
verses.auro_md:
*Yama said:*

1) The self-born has set the doors of the body to face outwards, therefore the soul of a man gazes outward and not at the Self within: hardly a wise man here and there, desiring immortality, turns his eyes inward and sees the Self within him.

glossary.meaning_en: hardly a wise man here and there

verses.hindi_explain: '''स्वयंभू' ने देह के द्वारों को बहिर्मुखी बनाया है, इसीलिए मनुष्य की आत्मा बाहर की ओर देखती है, 'अन्तरात्मा' को नहीं ː यत्र-तत्र विरला ही कोई ज्ञानी पुरुष (धीर पुरुष) होता है जो अमृतत्व की इच्छा करते हुए अपनी दृष्टि को अन्तर्मुखी करके 'अन्तरात्मा' को देखता है।
verses.meaning_en: The Self-born hath set the doors of the body to face outward, therefore the soul of a man gazeth outward and not at the Self within; hardly a wise man here and there desiring immortality turneth his eyes inward and seeth the Self within him.
verses.verse_skt:
पराञ्चिखानि व्यतृणत्स्वयंभूस्तस्मात्पराङ्पश्यति नान्तरात्मन्‌।
कश्चिद्धीरः प्रत्यगात्मानमैषदावृत्तचक्षुरमृतत्वमिच्छन्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
parāñcikhāni vyatṛṇatsvayaṁbhūstasmātparāṅpaśyati nāntarātman |
kaściddhīraḥ pratyagātmānamaiṣadāvṛttacakṣuramṛtatvamicchan ||

verses.anvaya_skt: वालाः पराचः कामान् अनुयन्ति ते विततस्य मॄत्योः पाशं यन्ति। अथ इह धीराः अध्रुवेषु अमृतत्वं ध्रुवं विदित्वा न प्रार्थयन्ते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: vālāḥ parācaḥ kāmān anuyanti te vitatasya mṝtyoḥ pāśaṁ yanti| atha iha dhīrāḥ adhruveṣu amṛtatvaṁ dhruvaṁ viditvā na prārthayante ||
verses.auro_md: The rest childishly follow after desire and pleasure and walk into the snare of Death that gapes wide for them. But calm souls, having learned of immortality, seek not for permanence in the things of this world that pass and are not.

glossary.meaning_en: of Death who gapeth wide for them
in the things of this world that pass and are not

verses.hindi_explain: ''अन्यान्य बालबुद्धि लोग कामनाओं तथा सुख-भोगों का अनुसरण करके उस मृत्यु के पाश में चले जाते हैं जो मुंह खोले उन्हें लेने को तैयार है। परन्तु धीर पुरुष अमृतत्व को जानकर इस लोक के अनित्य पदार्थों में नित्य (ध्रुव) तत्त्व को पाने की अभीप्सा नहीं करते है।
verses.meaning_en: The rest childishly follow after desire and pleasure and walk into the snare of Death who gapeth wide for them. But calm souls having learned of immortality seek not for permanence in the things of this world that pass and are not.
verses.verse_skt:
पराचः कामाननुयन्ति बालास्ते मृत्योर्यन्ति विततस्य पाशम्‌।
अथ धीरा अमृतत्वं विदित्वा ध्रुवमध्रुवेष्विह न प्रार्थयन्ते ॥
verses.verse_tl:
parācaḥ kāmānanuyanti bālāste mṛtyoryanti vitatasya pāśam |
atha dhīrā amṛtatvaṁ viditvā dhruvamadhruveṣviha na prārthayante ||

verses.anvaya_skt: येन एतेन एव रूपं रसं गन्धं शव्दान् स्पर्शान् मैथुनान् च विजानाति। अत्र आत्मनः अविज्ञेयं किम् परिशिष्यते। एतत् वै तत् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yena etena eva rūpaṁ rasaṁ gandhaṁ śavdān sparśān maithunān ca vijānāti| atra ātmanaḥ avijñeyaṁ kim pariśiṣyate| etat vai tat ||
verses.auro_md: By the Self one knows form and taste and smell, by the Self one knows sound and touch and the joy of man with woman: what is there left in this world of which the Self not knoweth? This is the thing thou seekest.

glossary.meaning_en: the joy of man with woman
what is there left (of which the Self not knoweth?)
this is the thing thou seekest

verses.hindi_explain: '' 'अन्तरात्मा' से ही व्यक्ति रूप, रस तथा गन्ध को जानता है, 'अन्तरात्मा' से ही वह शब्द तथा स्पर्श एवं पुरुष का स्त्री के साथ सुख (मैथुन) को जानता है; इस लोक में और क्या है जो उस 'आत्मा' को जानने के लिए शेष हो? यही है 'वह', जिसकी तुम्हें अभीप्सा है।
verses.meaning_en: By the Self one knoweth taste and form and smell, by the Self one knoweth sound and touch and the joy of man with woman; what is there left in this world of which the Self not knoweth? This is the thing thou seekest.
verses.verse_skt:
येन रूपं रसं गन्धं शब्दान्स्पर्शांश्च मैथुनान्‌।
एतेनैव विजानाति किमत्र परिशिष्यते। एतद्वै तत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yena rūpaṁ rasaṁ gandhaṁ śabdānsparśāṁśca maithunān |
etenaiva vijānāti kimatra pariśiṣyate | etadvai tat ||

verses.anvaya_skt: स्वप्नान्तं जागरितान्तं च उभौ येन अनुपश्यति  तं  महान्तं विभुम् आत्मानं मत्वा धीरः न शोचति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: svapnāntaṁ jāgaritāntaṁ ca ubhau yena anupaśyati ( taṁ ) mahāntaṁ vibhum ātmānaṁ matvā dhīraḥ na śocati ||
verses.auro_md: The calm soul having comprehended the great Lord, the omnipresent Self by whom one beholds both to the end of dream and to the end of waking, ceases from grieving.
verses.hindi_explain: ''धीर पुरुष उस 'महान्' विभु-व्यापी 'परमात्मा' को जानकर जिसके द्वारा व्यक्ति स्वप्न तथा जाग्रत् दोनों अवस्थाओं के अन्त को देखता है, शोक से विरत हो जाता है।
verses.meaning_en: The calm soul having comprehended the great Lord, the omnipresent Self by whom one beholdeth both to the end of dream and to the end of waking, ceaseth from grieving.
verses.verse_skt:
स्वप्नान्तं जागरितान्तं चोभौ येनानुपश्यति।
महान्तं विभुमात्मानं मत्वा धीरो न शोचति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
svapnāntaṁ jāgaritāntaṁ cobhau yenānupaśyati |
mahāntaṁ vibhumātmānaṁ matvā dhīro na śocati ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यः इमं मध्वदं जीवम् आत्मानं भूतभव्यस्य ईशानम् अन्तिकात् वेद  सः  ततः न विजुगुप्सते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yaḥ imaṁ madhvadaṁ jīvam ātmānaṁ bhūtabhavyasya īśānam antikāt veda ( saḥ ) tataḥ na vijugupsate ||
verses.auro_md: He that has known from the very close this Eater of sweetness, the Jiva, the self within that is lord of what was and what shall be, shrinks not thereafter from aught nor abhors any. This is the thing thou seekest.

glossary.meaning_en: lord of what was and what shall be
shrinketh not from aught nor abhorreth any
this is the thing thou seekest

verses.hindi_explain: '' जिसने इस मधुरता के भोक्ता 'जीव' को, उस अन्तःस्थ 'आत्मा' को अत्यन्त समीपता से जान लिया, जो भूत और भविष्य का ईश्वर है तत्पश्चात् वह किसी से नहीं सकुचाता अथवा उसे किसी के प्रति जुगुप्सा नहीं होती। यही है 'वह', जिसकी तुम्हें अभीप्सा है।
verses.meaning_en: He that hath known from very close this Eater of sweetness, the Jiva, the Self within that is lord of what was and what shall be, shrinketh not thereafter from aught nor abhorreth any. This is the thing thou seekest.
verses.verse_skt:
य इमं मध्वदं वेद आत्मानं जीवमन्तिकात्‌।
ईशानं भूतभव्यस्य न ततो विजुगुप्सते। एतद्वै तत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
ya imaṁ madhvadaṁ veda ātmānaṁ jīvamantikāt |
īśānaṁ bhūtabhavyasya na tato vijugupsate | etadvai tat ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यः पूर्वं तपसः जातं पूर्वम् अजायत गुहां प्रविश्य भूतेभिः तिष्ठन्तं  तं  यः व्यपश्यत  सः ब्रह्म एव पश्यति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yaḥ pūrvaṁ tapasaḥ jātaṁ pūrvam ajāyata guhāṁ praviśya bhūtebhiḥ tiṣṭhantaṁ ( taṁ ) yaḥ vyapaśyata ( saḥ brahma eva paśyati ) ||
verses.auro_md: He is the seer that sees Him who came into being before austerity and was before the waters: peep in the heart of the creature he sees Him, for there He stands by the mingling of the elements. This is the thing thou seekest.

glossary.meaning_en: deep in the heart of the creature
by the mingling of the elements
this is the thing thou seekest

verses.hindi_explain: ''सत्य-द्रष्टा ऋषि वह है जो 'उसे' देखता है जिसका तपस् के पूर्व प्रादुर्भाव हुआ, जो जलों से भी पूर्व विद्यमान था; वह 'उसे' प्राणियों की गंभीर हृद्गुहा में देखता है कारण, वहाँ 'वह' भूतग्राम (पचभूतो) सहित स्थित रहता है। यही है 'वह', जिसकी तुम्हें अभीप्सा है।
verses.meaning_en: He is the seer that seeth Him who came into being before austerity and was before the waters; deep in the heart of the creature he seeth Him, for there He standeth by the mingling of the elements. This is the thing thou seekest.
verses.verse_skt:
यः पूर्वं तपसो जातमद्‌भ्यः पूर्वमजायत।
गुहां प्रविश्य तिष्ठन्तं यो भूतेभिर्व्यपश्यत। एतद्वै तत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yaḥ pūrvaṁ tapaso jātamadbhyaḥ pūrvamajāyata |
guhāṁ praviśya tiṣṭhantaṁ yo bhūtebhirvyapaśyata | etadvai tat ||

verses.anvaya_skt: या देवतामयी अदितिः प्राणेन संभवति या भूतेभिः व्यजायत गुहां प्रविश्य तिष्ठन्तीम् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: anvayaḥ - yā devatāmayī aditiḥ prāṇena saṁbhavati yā bhūtebhiḥ vyajāyata guhāṁ praviśya tiṣṭhantīm ||
verses.auro_md: This is Aditi, the mother of the Gods, who was born through the Prana and by the mingling of the elements had her being: deep in the heart of things she has entered, there she is seated. This is the thing thou seekest.

glossary.meaning_en: by the mingling of the elements
deep in the heart of things
this is the thing thou seekest

verses.hindi_explain: ''ये हैं देवों की माता 'अदिति' जिनका 'प्राण' के माध्यम से प्रादुर्भाव हुआ, जिनका भूतग्राम सहित प्राकट्य हुआ और पदार्थों की हृद्गुहा में प्रवेश करके 'वे' वहां प्रतिष्ठित हैं। यही है 'वह', जिसकी तुन्हें अभीप्सा है।
verses.meaning_en: This is Aditi, the mother of the Gods, who was born through the Prana and by the mingling of the elements had her being; deep in the heart of things she has entered, there she is seated. This is the thing thou seekest.
verses.verse_skt:
या प्राणेन संभवत्यदितिर्देवतामयी।
गुहां प्रविश्य तिष्ठन्तीं या भूतेभिर्व्यजायत। एतद्वै तत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yā prāṇena saṁbhavatyaditirdevatāmayī |
guhāṁ praviśya tiṣṭhantīṁ yā bhūtebhirvyajāyata | etadvai tat ||

verses.anvaya_skt: गर्भिणीभिः सुमृतः गर्भः इव अरण्योः निहितः जातवेदाः अग्निः जागृवद्भिः हविष्मद्भिः मनुष्येभिः दिवेदिवे ईड्यः  भवति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: garbhiṇīībhiḥ sumṛtaḥ garbhaḥ iva araṇyoḥ nihitaḥ jātavedāḥ agniḥ jāgṛvadbhiḥ haviṣmadbhiḥ manuṣyebhiḥ divedive īḍyaḥ ( bhavati ) ||
verses.auro_md: As a woman carries with care the unborn child in her womb, so is the Master of Knowledge lodged in the tinders: and day by day should men worship him, who live the waking life and stand before him with sacrifices; for he is that Agni. This is the thing thou seekest.

glossary.meaning_en: the unborn child in the womb
by the ones who are in their waking life
by the ones who stand before him with sacrifice
this is the thing thou seekest

verses.hindi_explain: ''जिस प्रकार गर्भवती स्त्री गर्भ को धारण करती है, उसी प्रकार अरणियों में 'ज्ञानाधिष्ठाता' अग्नि (जातवेदा) निहित है। जाग्रत् जीवन जीने वाले तथा हविष्मान् मनुष्यों के द्वारा वह दिन-प्रतिदिन आराध्य है। कारण, वह आग्नि है। यही है 'वह', जिसकी तुम्हें अभीप्सा है।
verses.meaning_en: As a woman carrieth with care the unborn child in her womb, so is the Master of knowledge lodged in the tinders, and day by day should men worship him who live their waking life and stand before him with sacrifice; for he is that Agni. This is the thing thou seekest.
verses.verse_skt:
अरण्योर्निहितो जातवेदा गर्भ इव सुभृतो गर्भिणीभिः।
दिवे दिवे ईड्यो जागृवद्भिर्हविष्मद्भिर्मनुष्येभिरग्निः। एतद्वै तत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
araṇyornihito jātavedā garbha iva subhṛto garbhiṇībhiḥ |
dive dive īḍyo jāgṛvadbhirhaviṣmadbhirmanuṣyebhiragniḥ | etadvai tat ||

verses.anvaya_skt: सूर्यः यतः उदेति यत्र अस्तं गच्छति च सर्वे देवाः तम् अर्पिताः तत् न कश्चन उ अत्येति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: sūryaḥ yataḥ udeti yatra astaṁ gacchati ca sarve devāḥ tam arpitāḥ tat na kaścana u atyeti ||
verses.auro_md: He from whom the sun arises and to whom the sun returns, and in Him are all the Gods established,—none passes beyond Him. This is the thing thou seekest.

glossary.meaning_en: this is the thing thou seekest

verses.hindi_explain: '''वह' जिससे सूर्य का उदय होता है तथा जिसमें सूर्य अस्त हो जाता है, तथा 'उस'  में ही समस्त देवगण अवस्थित हैं, कोई भी 'उसका' अतिक्रमण नहीं करता। यही है 'वह' जिसकी तुम्हें अभीप्सा है।
verses.meaning_en: He from whom the sun riseth and to whom the sun returneth, and in Him are all the Gods established,-none passeth beyond Him. This is the thing thou seekest.
verses.verse_skt:
यतश्चोदेति सूर्योऽस्तं यत्र च गच्छति।
तं देवाः सर्वेऽर्पितास्तदु नात्येति कश्चन। एतद्वै तत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yataścodeti sūryo'staṁ yatra ca gacchati |
taṁ devāḥ sarve'rpitāstadu nātyeti kaścana | etadvai tat ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यत् एव इह तत् अमुत्र यत् अमुत्रे तत् अनु इह। सः मृत्योः मृत्युम् आप्नोति यः इह नाना इव पश्यति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yat eva iha tat amutra yat amutre tat anu iha| saḥ mṛtyoḥ mṛtyum āpnoti yaḥ iha nānā iva paśyati ||
verses.auro_md: What is in this world, is also in the other: and what is in the other, that again is in this: who thinks he sees difference here, from death to death he goeth.
verses.hindi_explain: ''जो इहलोक में है, वही वहाँ परलोक मे है; जो वहां परलोक में है वही यहां इस लोक में भी है; जो यह मानता है कि वह यहाँ नानात्व को देखता है, वह मृत्यु से मृत्यु को प्राप्त करता है।
verses.meaning_en: What is in this world is also in the other, and what is in the other, that again is in this; who thinketh he sees difference here, from death to death he goeth.
verses.verse_skt:
यदेवेह तदमुत्र यदमुत्र तदन्विह।
मृत्योः स मृत्युमाप्नोति य इह नानेव पश्यति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yadeveha tadamutra yadamutra tadanviha |
mṛtyoḥ sa mṛtyumāpnoti ya iha nāneva paśyati ||

verses.anvaya_skt: मनसा एव इदम् आप्तव्यम्। इह किंचन नाना न अस्ति। यः इह नाना इव पश्यति सः मृत्योः मृत्युं गच्छति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: manasā eva idam āptavyam| iha kiṁcana nānā na asti| yaḥ iha nānā iva paśyati saḥ mṛtyoḥ mṛtyuṁ gacchati ||
verses.auro_md: Through the mind must we understand that there is nothing in this world that really varies: who thinks he sees difference here, from death to death he goeth.
verses.hindi_explain: ''मनसा यह सत्य बोद्धव्य है कि यहाँ, इस लोक में, कुछ भी नाना-रूप नहीं है; जो यह समझता है कि वह यहाँ नानात्व को देखता है, वह मृत्यु सें मृत्यु को जाता है।
verses.meaning_en: Through the mind must we understand that there is nothing in this world that is really various; who thinketh he sees difference here, from death to death he goeth.
verses.verse_skt:
मनसैवेदमाप्तव्यं नेह नानाऽस्ति किंचन।
मृत्योः स मृत्युं गच्छति य इह नानेव पश्यति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
manasaivedamāptavyaṁ neha nānā'sti kiṁcana |
mṛtyoḥ sa mṛtyuṁ gacchati ya iha nāneva paśyati ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अंगुष्ठमात्रः पुरुषः मध्ये आत्मनि तिष्ठति।  सः  भूतभब्यस्य ईशानः। ततः न विजुगुप्सते। एतत् वै तत् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: aṁguṣṭhamātraḥ puruṣaḥ madhye ātmani tiṣṭhati| ( saḥ ) bhūtabhabyasya īśānaḥ| tataḥ na vijugupsate| etat vai tat ||
verses.auro_md: The Purusha who is seated in the midst of our self is no larger than the finger of a man; He is the Lord of what was and what shall be; Him having seen one shrinks not from aught nor abhorreth any. This is the thing thou seekest.

glossary.meaning_en: no larger than the finger of a man
of what was and what shall be
one shrinketh not from aught nor abhorreth any
this is the thing thou seekest

verses.hindi_explain: ''हमारी आत्मसत्ता के अन्तर् में प्रतिष्ठित 'पुरुष' अङ्गुष्ठमात्र है। वही भूत और भविष्य का ईश्वर है; उसका साक्षात्कार हो जाने से व्यक्ति किसी से सकुचाता नहीं, न ही उसे किसी के प्रति जुगुप्सा होती है। यही है 'वह' जिसकी तुम्हें अभीप्सा है।
verses.meaning_en: The Purusha who is seated in the midst of ourself is no larger than the finger of a man. He is the lord of what was and what shall be; Him having seen one shrinketh not from aught nor abhorreth any. This is the thing thou seekest.
verses.verse_skt:
अंगुष्ठमात्रः पुरुषो मध्य आत्मनि तिष्ठति।
ईशानो भूतभव्यस्य न ततो विजुगुप्सते। एतद्वै तत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
aṁguṣṭhamātraḥ puruṣo madhya ātmani tiṣṭhati |
īśāno bhūtabhavyasya na tato vijugupsate | etadvai tat ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अंगुष्ठमात्रः पुरुषः भुतभव्यस्य ईशानः अधूमकः ज्योतिः इव। सः एव अद्य सः उ श्वः  वर्तिष्यते । एतत् वै तत् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: aṁguṣṭhamātraḥ puruṣaḥ bhutabhavyasya īśānaḥ adhūmakaḥ jyotiḥ iva| saḥ eva adya saḥ u śvaḥ ( vartiṣyate )| etat vai tat ||
verses.auro_md: The Purusha that is within is no larger than the finger of a man; He is like a blazing fire that is without smoke, He is lord of His past and His future. He alone is today and He alone shall be tomorrow. This is the thing thou seekest.

glossary.meaning_en: no larger than the finger of a man
of what was and what shall be
this is the thing thou seekest

verses.hindi_explain: ''अन्तःस्थ 'पुरुष' अङ्गुष्ठमात्र ही है; 'वह' धूमरहित प्रज्ज्वलित अग्नि के सदृश है। 'वही' 'अपने' भूत और 'अपने' भविष्य का ईश्वर है। आज भी केवल 'वह' है, कल भी केवल 'वह ' होगा। यही है 'वह' जिसकी तुम्हें अभीप्सा है।
verses.meaning_en: The Purusha that is within is no larger than the finger of a man; He is like a blazing fire that is without smoke, He is lord of His past and His future. He alone is today and He alone shall be tomorrow. This is the thing thou seekest.
verses.verse_skt:
अंगुष्ठमात्रः पुरुषो ज्योतिरिवाधूमकः।
ईशानो भूतभव्यस्य स एवाद्य स उ श्वः। एतद्वै तत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
aṁguṣṭhamātraḥ puruṣo jyotirivādhūmakaḥ |
īśāno bhūtabhavyasya sa evādya sa u śvaḥ | etadvai tat 3||

verses.anvaya_skt: यथा दुर्गे वृष्टम् उदकं पर्वतेषु विधावति एवं धर्मान् पृथक् पश्यन्। तान् एव अनुविधावति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yathā durge vṛṣṭam udakaṁ parvateṣu vidhāvati evaṁ dharmān pṛthak paśyan| tān eva anuvidhāvati ||
verses.auro_md: As water that raineth in the rough and difficult places, runneth to many sides on the mountain-tops, so he that seeth separate law and action of the one Spirit, followeth in the track of what he seeth.

glossary.meaning_en: in the rough and difficult places
to many sides on the mountaintops
law and action of the one Spirit
the track of what he seeth

verses.hindi_explain: ''जिस प्रकार पर्वत-शिखरों पर टेढे़-मेढे़ एवं दुर्गम स्थलों में बरसा हुआ जल इधर-उधर विविध दिशाओं में बह जाता है, उसी प्रकार जो एकमेव 'आत्म-तत्त्व' के विधान एवं कर्म को पृथक्पृथक् देखता है, वह जैसा देखता है वैसे ही पथ का अनुसरण करता है।
verses.meaning_en: As water that raineth in the rough and difficult places, runneth to many sides on the mountaintops, so he that seeth separate law and action of the one Spirit, followeth in the track of what he seeth.
verses.verse_skt:
यथोदकं दुर्गं वृष्टं पर्वतेषु विधावति।
एवं धर्मान्पृथक्‌ पश्यंस्तानेवानुविधावति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yathodakaṁ durge vṛṣṭaṁ parvateṣu vidhāvati |
evaṁ dharmānpṛthak paśyaṁstānevānuvidhāvati ||

verses.anvaya_skt: गौतम यथा शुद्धम् उदकं शुद्धे  उदके  आसिक्तं तादृक् एव भवति विजानतः मुनेः आत्मा एवं भवति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: gautama yathā śuddham udakaṁ śuddhe ( udake ) āsiktaṁ tādṛk eva bhavati vijānataḥ muneḥ ātmā evaṁ bhavati ||
verses.auro_md: But as pure water that is poured into pure water, even as it was such it remaineth, so is it with the soul of the thinker who knoweth God, O seed of Gotama.
verses.hindi_explain: ''परन्तु जिस प्रकार शुद्ध जल में डाला हुआ शुद्ध जल वैसा ही शुद्ध रहता है जैसा था, हे गौतमवंशी! 'ईश्वर' को जानने वाले मनीषी का आत्मा भी वैसा ही होता है।''
verses.meaning_en: But as pure water that is poured into pure water, even as it was such it remaineth, so is it with the soul of the thinker who knoweth God, O seed of Gotama.
verses.verse_skt:
यथोदकं शुद्धे शुद्धमासिक्तं तादृगेव भवति।
एवं मुनेर्विजानत आत्मा भवति गौतम ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yathodakaṁ śuddhe śuddhamāsiktaṁ tādṛgeva bhavati |
evaṁ munervijānata ātmā bhavati gautama ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अजस्य अवक्रचेतसः  आत्मनः  एकादशद्वारं पुरम्  अस्ति तम्  अनुष्ठाय  नरः  न शोचति। विमुक्तः विमुच्यते च। एतत् वै तत् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ajasya avakracetasaḥ ( ātmanaḥ ) ekādaśadvāraṁ puram ( asti tam ) anuṣṭhāya ( naraḥ ) na śocati| vimuktaḥ vimucyate ca| etat vai tat ||
verses.auro_md:
*Yama said:*

1) The Unborn who is not devious-minded hath a city with eleven gates; when He taketh up his abode in it, He grieveth not, but when He is set free from it, that is His deliverance. This is the thing thou seekest.

glossary.meaning_en: having taken up his abode in it
this is the thing thou seekest

verses.hindi_explain: ''वह 'अजन्मा' जो अकुटिलमना है, उसकी एकादश द्वारोवाली पुरी है; जब 'वह' उसमें अवस्थित हो जाता है तब 'वह' शोक नहीं करता, किन्तु जब 'वह' उससे मुक्त हो जाता है तब वह मुक्ति-लाभ करता है। यही है 'वह', जिसकी तुम्हें अभीप्सा है।
verses.meaning_en: The Unborn who is not devious-minded hath a city with eleven gates; when He taketh up his abode in it, He grieveth not, but when He is set free from it, that is His deliverance. This is the thing thou seekest.
verses.verse_skt:
पुरमेकादशद्वारमजस्यावक्रचेतसः।
अनुष्ठाय न शोचति विमुक्तश्च विमुच्यते। एतद्वै तत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
puramekādaśadvāramajasyāvakracetasaḥ |
anuṣṭhāya na śocati vimuktaśca vimucyate | etadvai tat ||

verses.anvaya_skt: सः  आत्मा शुचिषत् हंसः अन्तरिक्ष्सतस् वेदिसत् होता  दुरोणसत् अतिथिः नृषत् वरसत् ऋतसं व्योमसत् अव्जा गोजा ऋतजा अद्रिजा ऋतं वृहत् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ( saḥ ) ātmā śuciṣat haṁsaḥ antarikṣsatas vedisat hotā  duroṇasat atithiḥ nṛṣat varasat ṛtasaṁ vyomasat avjā gojā ṛtajā adrijā ṛtaṁ vṛhat ||
verses.auro_md: Lo, the Swan whose dwelling is in the purity, He is the Vasu in the interregions, the Sacrificer at the altar, the Guest in the vessel of the drinking; He is in man and in the Great Ones and His home is in the Law and His dwelling is in the firmament; He is all that is born of water and all that is born of earth and all that is born of the mountains. He is the Truth and He is the Mighty One.

glossary.meaning_en: whose dwelling is in the purity
in the vessel of the drinking
the one who is in man
the one who is in the Great Ones
the one who has His home in the Law
the one whose dwelling is in the firmament
all that is born of water
all that is born of earth
the one born of the Truth
all that is born of the mountains

verses.hindi_explain: "देखो वह 'हंस' जो शुचिता में वास करता है, 'वह' अन्तरिक्ष में 'वसु' है, यज्ञवेदी पर वह 'होता' है, पानीय-पात्र में 'अतिथि' है; 'वह' मनुष्य में है, 'वह' 'वरिष्ठ' जनों में है, वह 'ऋतवासी' है, व्योमवासी है, 'वही' है वे सब, जो जल से उत्पन्न होते हैं, पृथ्वी से उत्पन्न होते हैं, पर्वतों से उत्पन्न होते हैं, ('ऋत' से उद्भूत हैं)<sup>*</sup>। 'वह 'सत्य' (ऋत) है 'महान्' (बृहद्) है।
verses.meaning_en: Lo, the Swan whose dwelling is in the purity, He is the Vasu in the interregions, the Sacrificer at the altar, the Guest in the vessel of the drinking; He is in man and in the Great Ones and His home is in the Law and His dwelling is in the firmament; He is all that is born of water and all that is born of earth and all that is born of the mountains. He is the Truth and He is the Mighty One.
verses.verse_skt:
हंसः शुचिषद्वसुरान्तरिक्षसद्धोता वेदिषदतिथिर्दुरोणसत्‌।
नृषद्वरसदृतसद्व्योमसदब्जा गोजा ऋतजा अद्रिजा ऋतं बृहत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
haṁsaḥ śuciṣadvasurāntarikṣasaddhotā vediṣadatithirduroṇasat |
nṛṣadvarasadṛtasadvyomasadabjā gojā ṛtajā adrijā ṛtaṁ bṛhat ||

verses.anvaya_skt: सः  प्राणं ऊर्ध्वम् उन्नयति अपानं प्रत्यक् अस्यति मध्ये आसीनम्  तम्  वामनं विश्वे देवाः उपासते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: (saḥ ) prāṇaṁ ūrdhvam unnayati apānaṁ pratyak asyati madhye āsīnam ( tam ) vāmanaṁ viśve devāḥ upāsate ||
verses.auro_md: This is He that draweth the main breath upward and casteth the lower breath downward. The Dwarf that sitteth in the centre, to Him all the Gods do homage.
verses.hindi_explain: '''वह' ही है जो प्राण को ऊर्ध्व दिशा में उठाता है तथा अपान को नीचे की ओर छोडता है; केन्द्र में आसीन इस 'वामन' की सभी देवगण उपासना करते है।
verses.meaning_en: This is He that draweth the main breath upward and casteth the lower breath downward. The Dwarf that sitteth in the centre, to Him all the Gods do homage.
verses.verse_skt:
ऊर्ध्वं प्राणमुन्नयत्यपानं प्रत्यगस्यति।
मध्ये वामनमासीनं विश्वे देवा उपासते ॥
verses.verse_tl:
ūrdhvaṁ prāṇamunnayatyapānaṁ pratyagasyati |
madhye vāmanamāsīnaṁ viśve devā upāsate ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अस्य शरीरस्थस्य देहिनः विस्रंसमानस्य देहात् विमुच्यमानस्य। अत्र किम् परिशिष्यते। एतत् वै तत् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: asya śarīrasthasya dehinaḥ visraṁsamānasya dehāt vimucyamānasya| atra kim pariśiṣyate| etat vai tat ||
verses.auro_md: When this encased spirit that is in the body falleth away from it, when He is freed from its casing, what is there then that remaineth? This is the thing thou seekest.

glossary.meaning_en: what is there then that remaineth
this is the thing thou seekest

verses.hindi_explain: ''जब शरीरकोष में स्थित यह आत्मा इससे निकल जाता है, जब 'यह' इस कोष से मुक्त हो जाता है, तब वहाँ क्या शेष रह जाता है? यही है 'वह', जिसकी तुम्हें अभीप्सा है।
verses.meaning_en: When this encased spirit that is in the body falleth away from it, when He is freed from its casing, what is there then that remaineth? This is the thing thou seekest.
verses.verse_skt:
अस्य विस्रंसमानस्य शरीरस्थस्य देहिनः।
देहाद्विमुच्यमानस्य किमत्र परिशिष्यते। एतद्वै तत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
asya visraṁsamānasya śarīrasthasya dehinaḥ |
dehādvimucyamānasya kimatra pariśiṣyate | etadvai tat ||

verses.anvaya_skt: कश्चन मर्त्यः न प्राणेन न अपाननेन जीवति। इतरेण तु जीवन्ति। यस्मिन् एतौ उपाश्रितौ ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: kaścana martyaḥ na prāṇena na apānanena jīvati| itareṇa tu jīvanti| yasmin etau upāśritau ||
verses.auro_md: Man that is mortal liveth not by the breath, no, nor by the lower breath; but by something else we live in which both these have their being.
verses.hindi_explain: ''मर्त्य मनुष्य न प्राण से जीता है न अपान से। किसी ऐसे अन्य तत्त्व से ही हम सब जीवित रहते हैं जिसमें इन दोनों का अस्तित्व उपाश्रित है।
verses.meaning_en: Man that is mortal liveth not by the breath, no, nor by the lower breath; but by something else we live in which both these have their being.
verses.verse_skt:
न प्राणेन नापानेन मर्त्यो जीवति कश्चन।
इतरेण तु जीवन्ति यस्मिन्नेतावुपाश्रितौ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
na prāṇena nāpānena martyo jīvati kaścana |
itareṇa tu jīvanti yasminnetāvupāśritau ||

verses.anvaya_skt: गौतम हन्त ते इदं गुह्यं सनातनं ब्रह्म प्रवक्षामि। मरणं प्राप्य आत्मा यथा भवति  तदपि  च  प्रवक्षामि ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: gautama hanta te idaṁ guhyaṁ sanātanaṁ brahma pravakṣāmi| maraṇaṁ prāpya ātmā yathā bhavati ( tadapi ) ca ( pravakṣāmi ) ||
verses.auro_md: Surely, O Gautama, I will tell thee of this secret and eternal Brahman and likewise what becometh of the soul when one dieth.
verses.hindi_explain: ''हे गौतम! गुह्य एवं सनातन 'ब्रह्म' के विषय में, तथा मृत्यु-प्राप्ति पर आत्मा का क्या होता है, अवश्य ही मैं तुम्हें बताऊँगा। <sup>*</sup>यह पद संस्कृत के मूल पाठ में है, श्रीअरविन्द के अनुवाद में नहीं है। - अनुवादक
verses.meaning_en: Surely, O Gautama, I will tell thee of this secret and eternal Brahman and likewise what becometh of the soul when one dieth.
verses.verse_skt:
हन्त त इदं प्रवक्ष्यामि गुह्यं ब्रह्म सनातनम्‌।
यथा च मरणं प्राप्य आत्मा भवति गौतम ॥
verses.verse_tl:
hanta ta idaṁ pravakṣyāmi guhyaṁ brahma sanātanam |
yathā ca maraṇaṁ prāpya ātmā bhavati gautama ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यथाकर्म यथाश्रुतम् अन्ये देहिनः शरीरत्व्याय योनिं प्रपद्यन्ते। अन्य स्थाणुम् अनुसयन्ति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yathākarma yathāśrutam anye dehinaḥ śarīratvyāya yoniṁ prapadyante| anya sthāṇum anusayanti ||
verses.auro_md: For some enter a womb to the embodying of the Spirit and others follow after the Immovable; according to their deeds is their goal and after the measure of their revealed knowledge.

glossary.meaning_en: according to the measure of their revealed knowledge

verses.hindi_explain: ''कारण, कुछ 'आत्मा' (देही) के शरीर धारण करने के लिए किसी गर्भ (योनि) में प्रवेश करते हैं; अन्य 'अचल'-स्वरूप परमात्मा, 'स्थाणु' का अनुसरण करते हैं; सभी का गन्तव्य उनके कर्म तथा श्रुतबोध (प्रकट ज्ञान) के अनुसार होता है।
verses.meaning_en: For some enter a womb to the embodying of the Spirit and others follow after the Immovable; according to their deeds is their goal and after the measure of their revealed knowledge.
verses.verse_skt:
योनिमन्ये प्रपद्यन्ते शरीरत्वाय देहिनः।
स्थाणुमन्येऽनुसंयन्ति यथाकर्म यथाश्रुतम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yonimanye prapadyante śarīratvāya dehinaḥ |
sthāṇumanye'nusaṁyanti yathākarma yathāśrutam ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यः एषः पुरुषः सुप्तेषु कामं कामं निर्मिमाणः जागर्ति तत् एव शुक्रम्। तत् ब्रह्म। तत् एव अमृतम् उच्यते। सर्वे लोकाः तस्मिन् श्रिताः। तत् उ कश्चन न अत्येति। एतत् वै तत् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yaḥ eṣaḥ puruṣaḥ supteṣu kāmaṁ kāmaṁ nirmimāṇaḥ jāgarti tat eva śukram| tat brahma| tat eva amṛtam ucyate| sarve lokāḥ tasmin śritāḥ| tat u kaścana na atyeti| etat vai tat ||
verses.auro_md: This that waketh in the sleepers creating desire upon desire, this Purusha, Him they call the Bright One, Him Brahman, Him Immortality, and in Him are all the worlds established; none goeth beyond Him. This is the thing thou seekest.

glossary.meaning_en: this is the thing thou seekest

verses.hindi_explain: ''यह 'पुरुष' जो नानाविध कामनाओं की सृष्टि करते हुए सोते हुओं में जागता रहता है, 'वही' 'ज्योतिर्मय पुरुष', 'वही' 'ब्रह्म', 'वही' 'अमृतत्व' कहलाता है। 'उसमें' ही समस्त लोक-लोकान्तर आश्रित हैं; कोई भी 'उससे' परे नहीं जाता। यही है 'वह' जिसकी तुम्हें अभीप्सा है।
verses.meaning_en: This that waketh in the sleepers creating desire upon desire, this Purusha, Him they call the Bright One, Him Brahman, Him Immortality, and in Him are all the worlds established; none goeth beyond Him. This is the thing thou seekest.
verses.verse_skt:
य एष सुप्तेषु जागर्ति कामं कामं पुरुषो निर्मिमाणः।
तदेव शुक्रं तद् ब्रह्म तदेवामृतमुच्यते।
तस्मिंल्लोकाः श्रिताः सर्वे तदु नात्येति कश्चन। एतद्वै तत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
ya eṣa supteṣu jāgarti kāmaṁ kāmaṁ puruṣo nirmimāṇaḥ |
tadeva śukraṁ tad brahma tadevāmṛtamucyate |
tasmiṁllokāḥ śritāḥ sarve tadu nātyeti kaścana | etadvai tat ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यथा एकः अग्निः भुवनं प्रविष्टः  सन्  रूपं रूपं प्रतिरूपः बभुव तथा एकः सर्वभुतान्तरात्मा रूपं रूपं प्रतिरूपः  भवति । बहिः च ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yathā ekaḥ agniḥ bhuvanaṁ praviṣṭaḥ ( san ) rūpaṁ rūpaṁ pratirūpaḥ babhuva tathā ekaḥ sarvabhutāntarātmā rūpaṁ rūpaṁ pratirūpaḥ ( bhavati )| bahiḥ ca ||
verses.auro_md: Even as one Fire hath entered into the world but it shapeth itself to the forms it meeteth, so there is one Spirit within all creatures but it shapeth itself to form and form; it is likewise outside these.
verses.hindi_explain: ''जिस प्रकार एक ही 'अग्नि' भुवन में प्रविष्ट हुआ है किन्तु यह जिस रूप के सम्पर्क में आता है उसका ही प्रतिरूप धारण कर लेता है, उसी प्रकार समस्त भूत-प्राणियों में विद्यमान 'अन्तरात्मा' एक ही है परन्तु रूप-रूप के सम्पर्क से वैसावेसा प्रतिरूप बन जाता है; इसी प्रकार वह उनसे बाहर भी है।
verses.meaning_en: Even as one Fire hath entered into the world but it shapeth itself to the forms it meeteth, so there is one Spirit within all creatures but it shapeth itself to form and form; it is likewise outside these.
verses.verse_skt:
अग्निर्यथैको भुवनं प्रविष्टो रूपं रूपं प्रतिरूपो बभूव।
एकस्तथा सर्वभूतान्तरात्मा रूपं रूपं प्रतिरूपो बहिश्च ॥
verses.verse_tl:
agniryathaiko bhuvanaṁ praviṣṭo rūpaṁ rūpaṁ pratirūpo babhūva |
ekastathā sarvabhūtāntarātmā rūpaṁ rūpaṁ pratirūpo bahiśca ||

verses.anvaya_skt: एकः वायुः यथा भुवनं प्रविष्टः  सन् रूपम् रूपम् प्रतिरूपः बभुव तथा एकः सर्वभुतान्तरात्मा रूपं रूपं प्रतिरूपः  भवति । बहिः च ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ekaḥ vāyuḥ yathā bhuvanaṁ praviṣṭaḥ ( san rūpam rūpam pratirūpaḥ babhuva tathā ekaḥ sarvabhutāntarātmā rūpaṁ rūpaṁ pratirūpaḥ ( bhavati )| bahiḥ ca ||
verses.auro_md: Even as one Air hath entered into the world but it shapeth itself to the forms it meeteth, so there is one Spirit within all creatures but it shapeth itself to form and form; it is likewise outside these.
verses.hindi_explain: "जिस प्रकार एक ही 'वायु' भुवन में प्रविष्ट हुआ है किन्तु भिन्न-भिन्न रूपों के सम्पर्क से वैसावैसा प्रतिरूप धारण कर लेता है, उसी प्रकार समस्त प्राणियों में विद्यमान 'अन्तरात्मा' एक ही है परन्तु रूपरूप के सम्पर्क से वैसा-वैसा प्रतिरूप धारण करता है; इसी प्रकार वह उनसे बाहर भी है।
verses.meaning_en: Even as one Air hath entered into the world but it shapeth itself to the forms it meeteth, so there is one Spirit within all creatures but it shapeth itself to form and form; it is likewise outside these.
verses.verse_skt:
वायुर्यथैको भुवनं प्रविष्टो रूपं रूपं प्रतिरूपो बभूव।
एकस्तथा सर्वभूतान्तरात्मा रूपं रूपं प्रतिरूपो बहिश्च ॥
verses.verse_tl:
vāyuryathaiko bhuvanaṁ praviṣṭo rūpaṁ rūpaṁ pratirūpo babhūva |
ekastathā sarvabhūtāntarātmā rūpaṁ rūpaṁ pratirūpo bahiśca ||

verses.anvaya_skt: सर्वलोकस्य चक्षुः सूर्यः यथा चक्षुषैः बह्यदोषैः न लिप्यते। तथा एकः सर्वभूतान्तरात्मा लोकदुःखेन न लिप्यते।  यतः सः  बाह्यः ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: sarvalokasya cakṣuḥ sūryaḥ yathā cakṣuṣaiḥ bahyadoṣaiḥ na lipyate| tathā ekaḥ sarvabhūtāntarātmā lokaduḥkhena na lipyate| ( yataḥ saḥ ) bāhyaḥ ||
verses.auro_md: Even as the Sun is the eye of all this world, yet it is not soiled by the outward blemishes of the visual, so there is one Spirit within all creatures, but the sorrow of this world soils it not, for it is beyond grief and his danger.

glossary.meaning_en: the eye of all this world
by the outward blemishes of the visual
there is one Spirit within all creatures
by the sorrow of this world
for it is beyond grief and his danger
for it is beyond grief and his danger

verses.hindi_explain: ''जिस प्रकार 'सूर्य' इस सकल जगत् का चक्षु है तथापि बाह्य चाक्षुष दोष उसे लिप्त नहीं करते, इसी प्रकार समस्त प्राणियों में विद्यमान् 'अन्तरात्मा' एक ही है, परन्तु सांसारिक दुːख उसे लिप्त नहीं करते इस कारण, वह दुःख तथा उसके भय से परे है।
verses.meaning_en: Even as the Sun is the eye of all this world, yet it is not soiled by the outward blemishes of the visual, so there is one Spirit within all creatures, but the sorrow of this world soils it not, for it is beyond grief and his danger.
verses.verse_skt:
सूर्यो यथा सर्वलोकस्य चक्षुर्न लिप्यते चाक्षुषैर्बह्यिदोषैः।
एकस्तथा सर्वभूतान्तरात्मा न लिप्यते लोकदुःखेन बाह्यः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
sūryo yathā sarvalokasya cakṣurna lipyate cākṣuṣairbahyidoṣaiḥ |
ekastathā sarvabhūtāntarātmā na lipyate lokaduḥkhena bāhyaḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यः एकः वशी सर्वभुतान्तरात्मा एकं रूपं बहुधा करोति। तं धिराः आत्मस्थम् अनुपश्यन्ति। तेषाम्  एव  शाश्वतं सुखं  भवति  इतरेषाम् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yaḥ ekaḥ vaśī sarvabhutāntarātmā ekaṁ rūpaṁ bahudhā karoti| taṁ dhirāḥ ātmastham anupaśyanti| teṣām ( eva ) śāśvataṁ sukhaṁ ( bhavati ) itareṣām ||
verses.auro_md: One calm and controlling Spirit within all creatures that maketh one form into many fashions; the calm and strong who see Him in the self as in a mirror, theirs is eternal felicity and 'tis not for others.

glossary.meaning_en: in the self as in a mirror

verses.hindi_explain: ''समस्त प्राणियों के अन्तर् में स्थित, शान्त एवं सबको वश में रखने वाला एकमेव 'आत्मा' एक ही रूप को बहुविध रचता है; जो धीर पुरुष 'उस' का आत्मा में दर्पणवत् अनुदर्शन करते हैं उन्हें शाश्वत सुख प्राप्त होता है, इससे इतर अन्य लोगों को नहीं ।
verses.meaning_en: One calm and controlling Spirit within all creatures that maketh one form into many fashions; the calm and strong who see Him in the self as in a mirror, theirs is eternal felicity and 'tis not for others.
verses.verse_skt:
एको वशी सर्वभूतान्तरात्मा एकं रूपं बहुधा यः करोति।
तमात्मस्थं येऽनुपश्यन्ति धीरास्तेषां सुखं शाश्वतं नेतरेषाम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
eko vaśī sarvabhūtāntarātmā ekaṁ rūpaṁ bahudhā yaḥ karoti |
tamātmasthaṁ ye'nupaśyanti dhīrāsteṣāṁ sukhaṁ śāśvataṁ netareṣām ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अनित्यानां चेतनानां चेतनः। एकः  सन्  यः बहूनां कामान् विदधाति ये धीराः तम् आत्मस्थम् अनुपश्यन्ति तेषां शाश्वती शान्तिः। इतरेषां न ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: anityānāṁ cetanānāṁ cetanaḥ | ekaḥ ( san ) yaḥ bahūnāṁ kāmān vidadhāti ye dhīrāḥ tam ātmastham anupaśyanti teṣāṁ śāśvatī śāntiḥ| itareṣāṁ na ||
verses.auro_md: The One Eternal in many transient, the One Conscious in many conscious beings, who being One ordereth the desires of many; the calm and strong who behold Him in the self as in a mirror, theirs is eternal peace and 'tis not for others.

glossary.meaning_en: in the self as in a mirror

verses.hindi_explain: ''अनेक अनित्यो में 'एक नित्य', अनेक चेतन सत्ताओं में 'एक तत्त्व' 'एकमेव' होते हुए भी जो बहुतों की कामनाओं का विधान करता है; जो धीर पुरुष 'उसका' आत्मा में दर्पणवत् अनुदर्शन करते हैं, उन्हें शाश्वत शान्ति प्राप्त होती है, इससे इतर अन्य लोगों को नहीं।
verses.meaning_en: The One Eternal in many transient, the One Conscious in many conscious beings, who being One ordereth the desires of many; the calm and strong who behold Him in the self as in a mirror, theirs is eternal peace and 'tis not for others.
verses.verse_skt:
नित्योऽनित्यानां चेतनश्चेतनानामेको बहूनां यो विदधाति कामान्‌।
तमात्मस्थं येऽनुपश्यन्ति धीरास्तेषां शान्तिः  शाश्वती नेतरेषाम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
nityo'nityānāṁ cetanaścetanānāmeko bahūnāṁ yo vidadhāti kāmān |
tamātmasthaṁ ye'nupaśyanti dhīrāsteṣāṁ śāntiḥ  śāśvatī netareṣām ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यतयः तं  अनिर्देश्यं परमं सुखं तत् एतत् इतिमन्यते। कथं नु तद् विजानीयां। किम् उ भाति वा विभाति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: (yatayaḥ taṁ ) anirdeśyaṁ paramaṁ sukhaṁ tat etat itimanyate| kathaṁ nu tad vijānīyāṁ | kim u bhāti vā vibhāti ||
verses.auro_md: "This is He," is all they can realise of Him, a highest felicity which none can point to nor any define it. How shall I know of Him whether He shineth or reflecteth one light and another?

glossary.meaning_en: which none can point to nor any define it

verses.hindi_explain: '' "यह है वह" - केवल इतना ही वे 'उस' अनिर्देश्य परम सुख अनुभव कर सकते हैं। मैं 'उसके' विषय में कैसे जानूँ कि 'वह' स्वयं आभामय है अथवा किसी अन्य आभा से प्रतिभासित होता है?
verses.meaning_en: “This is He,” is all they can realise of Him, a highest felicity which none can point to nor any define it. How shall I know of Him whether He shineth or reflecteth one light and another?
verses.verse_skt:
तदेतदिति मन्यन्तेऽनिर्देश्यं परमं सुखम्‌।
कथं नु तद्विजानीयां किमु भाति विभाति वा ॥
verses.verse_tl:
tadetaditi manyante'nirdeśyaṁ paramaṁ sukham |
kathaṁ nu tadvijānīyāṁ kimu bhāti vibhāti vā ||

verses.anvaya_skt: तत्र सूर्यः न भाति। चन्द्रतारकं न। इमाः विद्युतः न भान्ति। अयम् अग्निः कुतः  भायात् । तं भान्तं एव सर्वं अनुभाति। तस्य भासा इदं सर्वं भाति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: tatra sūryaḥ na bhāti| candratārakaṁ na | imāḥ vidyutaḥ na bhānti| ayam agniḥ kutaḥ ( bhāyāt )| taṁ bhāntaṁ eva sarvaṁ anubhāti| tasya bhāsā idaṁ sarvaṁ bhāti ||
verses.auro_md: There the Sun cannot shine and the moon has no lustre; all the stars are blind; there our lightnings flash not, neither any earthly fire. For all that is bright is but the shadow of His brightness and by His shining all this shineth.

glossary.meaning_en: the moon has no luster and all the stars are blind

verses.hindi_explain: ''वहाँ सूर्य प्रकाशमान नहीं हो सकता तथा चन्द्रमा आभाहीन हो जाता है, समस्त तारागण ज्योतिहीन हो जाते हैं; वहाँ विद्युत् भी नहीं चमकती, न ही कोई पार्थिव अग्नि प्रकाशित होती है। कारण, जो कुछ भी प्रकाशमान् है, वह 'उस' की ज्योति की प्रतिच्छाया है, 'उस' की आभा से ही यह सब प्रतिभासित होता है।''
verses.meaning_en: There the Sun cannot shine and the moon has no lustre; all the stars are blind; there our lightnings flash not, neither any earthly fire. For all that is bright is but the shadow of His brightness and by His shining all this shineth.
verses.verse_skt:
न तत्र सूर्यो भाति न चन्द्रतारकं नेमा विद्युतो भान्ति कुतोऽयमग्निः।
तमेव भान्तमनुभाति सर्वं तस्य भासा सर्वमिदं विभाति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
na tatra sūryo bhāti na candratārakaṁ nemā vidyuto bhānti kuto'yamagniḥ |
tameva bhāntamanubhāti sarvaṁ tasya bhāsā sarvamidaṁ vibhāti ||

verses.anvaya_skt: ऊर्ध्वमूलः अवाक्शाखः एषः सनातनः अश्वत्थः। तत् एव शुक्रं। तत् ब्रह्म। तत् एव अमृतम् उच्यते। सर्वे लोकाः तस्मिन् श्रिताः। तत् उ कश्चन न अत्येति। एतत् वै तत् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ūrdhvamūlaḥ avākśākhaḥ eṣaḥ sanātanaḥ aśvatthaḥ | tat eva śukraṁ| tat brahma| tat eva amṛtam ucyate| sarve lokāḥ tasmin śritāḥ| tat u kaścana na atyeti| etat vai tat ||
verses.auro_md:
*Yama said:*

1) This is the eternal uswattha tree whose roots are aloft, but its branches are downward. It is He that is called the Bright One and Brahman and Immortality, and in Him are all the worlds established; none goeth beyond Him. This is the thing thou seekest.

glossary.meaning_en: It is He the Bright One
this is the thing thou seekest

verses.hindi_explain: ''यह सनातन अश्वत्थ है जिसका मूल ऊपर है, किन्तु इसकी शाखाएँ नीचे हैं। 'वही' तेजोमय है, 'वही' एकमेव 'ब्रह्म' 'वही' 'अमृत' कहलाता है; 'उसी' में समस्त लोक आश्रित हैं, कोई भी 'उसके' परे नहीं जाता। यही है 'वह' जिसकी तुम्हें अभीप्सा है।
verses.meaning_en: This is the eternal uswattha tree whose roots are aloft, but its branches are downward. It is He that is called the Bright One and Brahman and Immortality, and in Him are all the worlds established; none goeth beyond Him. This is the thing thou seekest.
verses.verse_skt:
ऊर्ध्वमूलोऽवाक्‍शाख एषोऽश्वत्थः सनातनः।
तदेव शुक्रं तद् ब्रह्म तदेवामृतमुच्यते।
तस्मिंल्लोकाः श्रिताः सर्वे तदु नात्येति कश्चन। एतद्वै तत्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
ūrdhvamūlo'vākśākha eṣo'śvatthaḥ sanātanaḥ |
tadeva śukraṁ tad brahma tadevāmṛtamucyate |
tasmiṁllokāḥ śritāḥ sarve tadu nātyeti kaścana | etadvai tat ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यत् किंच इदं जगत् सर्वं प्राणे  सति  निःसृतम् एजति।  सः  महत् भयं उद्यतं वज्रम्। ये एतत् विदुः ते अमृताः भवन्ति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yat kiṁca idaṁ jagat sarvaṁ prāṇe ( sati ) niḥsṛtam ejati| ( saḥ ) mahat bhayaṁ udyataṁ vajram| ye etat viduḥ te amṛtāḥ bhavanti ||
verses.auro_md: All this universe of motion moveth in the Prana and from the Prana also it proceeded; a mighty terror is He, yea, a thunderbolt uplifted. Who know Him are the immortals.
verses.hindi_explain: ''यह सम्पूर्ण गतिमय जगत् 'प्राण' में गतिशील है और 'प्राण' से ही निःसृत है। महाभयङ्कर है 'वह' उद्यत वज्रसम है; जो 'उसे' जानते हैं वे अमर होते हैं।
verses.meaning_en: All this universe of motion moveth in the Prana and from the Prana also it proceeded; a mighty terror is He, yea, a thunderbolt uplifted. Who know Him are the immortals.
verses.verse_skt:
यदिदं किं च जगत्सर्वं प्राण एजति निःसृतम्‌।
महद् भयं वज्रमुद्यतं य एतद्विदुरमृतास्ते भवन्ति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yadidaṁ kiṁ ca jagatsarvaṁ prāṇa ejati niḥsṛtam |
mahad bhayaṁ vajramudyataṁ ya etadviduramṛtāste bhavanti ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अस्य भयात् अग्निः तपति।  अस्य  भयात् इन्द्रः च वायुः पञ्चमः मृत्युः च धावति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: asya bhayāt agniḥ tapati| ( asya ) bhayāt indraḥ ca vāyuḥ pañcamaḥ mṛtyuḥ ca dhāvati ||
verses.auro_md: For fear of Him the fire burneth, for fear of Him the sun giveth heat, for fear of Him Indra and Vayu and Death hasten in their courses.
verses.hindi_explain: '''इसके' भय से ही अग्नि प्रज्वलित है' इसके भय से ही सूर्य तपता है, 'इसके' भय से ही इन्द्र तथा वायु एवं मृत्यु अपने-अपने पथ पर वेगवान् हैं।
verses.meaning_en: For fear of Him the fire burneth, for fear of Him the sun giveth heat, for fear of Him Indra and Vayu and Death hasten in their courses.
verses.verse_skt:
भयादस्याग्निस्तपति भयात्तपति सूर्यः।
भयादिन्द्रश्च वायुश्च मृत्युर्धावति पञ्चमः ॥
verses.verse_tl:
bhayādasyāgnistapati bhayāttapati sūryaḥ |
bhayādindraśca vāyuśca mṛtyurdhāvati pañcamaḥ ||

verses.anvaya_skt: इह शरीरस्य विस्रसः प्राक्  तत् ब्रह्म बोद्धुम् अशकत् चेत्   संसारबन्धनात् विमुच्यते ।  न चेत्  ततः सर्गेषु लोकेषु शरीरत्वाय कल्पते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: iha śarīrasya visrasaḥ prāk ( tat brahma )boddhum aśakat cet  ( saṁsārabandhanāt vimucyate )| ( na cet ) tataḥ sargeṣu lokeṣu śarīratvāya kalpate ||
verses.auro_md: If in this world of men and before thy body fall from thee, thou art able to apprehend it, then thou availest for embodiment in the worlds that are His creations.

glossary.meaning_en: in the worlds that are His creations

verses.hindi_explain: ''यदि इस मनुष्य-लोक में शरीर-त्याग से पूर्व तुम उसका बोध प्राप्त कर सको तो तुम 'उसके' द्वारा सृष्ट विविध लोकों में शरीर धारण करने के योग्य हो जाते हो।
verses.meaning_en: If in this world of men and before thy body fall from thee, thou art able to apprehend it, then thou availest for embodiment in the worlds that are His creations.
verses.verse_skt:
इह चेदशकद्‌बोद्धुं प्राक् शरीरस्य विस्रसः।
ततः सर्गेषु लोकेषु शरीरत्वाय कल्पते ॥
verses.verse_tl:
iha cedaśakadboddhuṁ prāk śarīrasya visrasaḥ |
tataḥ sargeṣu lokeṣu śarīratvāya kalpate ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यथा आदर्शे तथा आत्मानि। यथा स्वप्ने तथा पितृलोके। यथा अप्सु तथा गन्धर्वलोके परिददृशे। ब्रह्मलोके छायातपयोः इव ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yathā ādarśe tathā ātmāni| yathā svapne tathā pitṛloke| yathā apsu tathā gandharvaloke paridadṛśe| brahmaloke chāyātapayoḥ iva ||
verses.auro_md: In the self one seeth God as in a mirror but as in a dream in the world of the fathers, and as in water one seeth the surface of an object, so one seeth Him in the world of the Gandharvas; but He is seen as light and shade in the heaven of the Spirit.

glossary.meaning_en: in the world of the fathers
as in water (one seeth the surface of an object )
so in the world of the Gandharvas
in the heaven of the Spirit

verses.hindi_explain: ''आत्मा में 'परमेश्वर' को व्यक्ति इस प्रकार देखता है जैसे दर्पण में, किन्तु पितृलोक में स्वनवत् देखता है, और गन्धर्वों के लोक में वह 'उसे' वैसे ही देखता है, जैसे जल में किसी वस्तु की ऊपरी सतह को देखता है; परन्तु 'ब्रह्मलोक' में 'वह' प्रकाश तथा छाया के सदृश दिखायी देता है।
verses.meaning_en: In the self one seeth God as in a mirror but as in a dream in the world of the fathers, and as in water one seeth the surface of an object, so one seeth Him in the world of the Gandharvas; but He is seen as light and shade in the heaven of the Spirit.
verses.verse_skt:
यथाऽऽदर्शे तथाऽऽत्मनि यथा स्वप्ने तथा पितृलोके।
यथाऽप्सु परीव ददृशे तथा गन्धर्वलोके छायातपयोरिव ब्रह्मलोके ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yathā''darśe tathā''tmani yathā svapne tathā pitṛloke |
yathā'psu parīva dadṛśe tathā gandharvaloke chāyātapayoriva brahmaloke ||

verses.anvaya_skt: पृथक् उत्पद्यमानानाम् इन्द्रियाणां पृथक् भावम् उदयास्तमयौ च यत् धीरः  एतत्  मत्वा न शोचति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: pṛthak utpadyamānānām indriyāṇāṁ pṛthak bhāvam udayāstamayau ca yat dhīraḥ ( etat ) matvā na śocati ||
verses.auro_md: The calm soul having comprehended the separateness of the senses and the rising of them and their setting and their separate emergence putteth from him pain and sorrow.

glossary.meaning_en: the rising of them and their setting
putteth from him pain and sorrow

verses.hindi_explain: ''धीर पुरुष इन्द्रियाँ की पृथक्ता को, उनके उदय तथा अस्त को तथा उनकी पृथक् उत्पत्ति को जान लेने पर दुːख-शोक को दूर हटा देता है।
verses.meaning_en: The calm soul having comprehended the separateness of the senses and the rising of them and their setting and their separate emergence putteth from him pain and sorrow.
verses.verse_skt:
इन्द्रियाणां पृथग्भावमुदयास्तमयौ च यत्‌।
पृथगुत्पद्यमानानां मत्वा धीरो न शोचति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
indriyāṇāṁ pṛthagbhāvamudayāstamayau ca yat |
pṛthagutpadyamānānāṁ matvā dhīro na śocati ||

verses.anvaya_skt: इन्द्रियेभ्यः मनः परम्। मनसः सत्वम् उत्तमम्। महान् आत्मा सत्वात् अधि। महतः अव्यक्तम् उत्तमम् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: indriyebhyaḥ manaḥ param| manasaḥ satvam uttamam| mahān ātmā satvāt adhi| mahataḥ avyaktam uttamam ||
verses.auro_md: The mind is higher than the senses, and above the mind is the thought, and above the thought is the mighty Spirit, and above the Mighty One is the Unmanifest.
verses.hindi_explain: ''मन इन्द्रियों सें ऊपर है, और मन से उच्चतर है बुद्धि (सत्त्व), बुद्धि (सत्त्व) से उच्चतर है महान् 'आत्मा', और उस 'महत्तत्त्व' से भी उच्चा है 'अव्यक्त'।
verses.meaning_en: The mind is higher than the senses, and above the mind is the thought, and above the thought is the mighty Spirit, and above the Mighty One is the Unmanifest.
verses.verse_skt:
इन्द्रियेभ्यः परं मनो मनसः सत्त्वमुत्तमम्‌।
सत्त्वादधि महानात्मा महतोऽव्यक्तमुत्तमम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
indriyebhyaḥ paraṁ mano manasaḥ sattvamuttamam |
sattvādadhi mahānātmā mahato'vyaktamuttamam ||

verses.anvaya_skt: व्यापकः अलिङ्गः एव पुरुषः तु अव्यक्तात् च परः यं ज्ञात्वा जन्तुः मुच्यते। अमृतत्वं च गछति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: vyāpakaḥ aliṅgaḥ eva puruṣaḥ tu avyaktāt ca paraḥ yaṁ jñātvā jantuḥ mucyate| amṛtatvaṁ ca gachati ||
verses.auro_md: But highest above the Unmanifest is the Purusha who pervadeth all and alone hath no sign nor feature. Mortal man knowing Him is released into immortality.

glossary.meaning_en: who alone hath no sign nor feature

verses.hindi_explain: ''अव्यक्त से उत्तम है 'पुरुष' जो सर्वव्यापक है और 'उस' अद्वितीय का न कोई चिह्न है, न कोई लक्षण। 'उस' का ज्ञान प्राप्त करके प्राणी मुक्त हो जाता है तथा अमृतत्वलाभ करता है।
verses.meaning_en: But highest above the Unmanifest is the Purusha who pervadeth all and alone hath no sign nor feature. Mortal man knowing Him is released into immortality.
verses.verse_skt:
अव्यक्तात्तु परः पुरुषो व्यापकोऽलिङ्ग एव च।
यं ज्ञात्वा मुच्यते जन्तुरमृतत्वं च गच्छति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
avyaktāttu paraḥ puruṣo vyāpako'liṅga eva ca |
yaṁ jñātvā mucyate janturamṛtatvaṁ ca gacchati ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अस्य रूपं सन्दृशे न तिष्ठति। कश्चन एनं चक्षुषा न पश्यति। मनीषा हृदा मनसा  सः  अभिक्लृप्तः। ये एतत् विदुः ते अमृताः भवन्ति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: asya rūpaṁ sandṛśe na tiṣṭhati| kaścana enaṁ cakṣuṣā na paśyati| manīṣā hṛdā manasā ( saḥ ) abhiklṛptaḥ| ye etat viduḥ te amṛtāḥ bhavanti ||
verses.auro_md: He hath not set His body within the ken of seeing, neither doth any man with the eye behold Him, but to the heart and mind and the supermind He is manifest. Who know Him are the immortals.

glossary.meaning_en: to the heart and mind and the supermind

verses.hindi_explain: 'उसने' 'अपने' शरीर को (अपने रूप को) दृष्टि की पहुँच में ग्राह्व नहीं रखा है, न कोई मनुष्य 'इसे' चक्षुओ से देख पाता है, परन्तु हृदय, मन तथा अतिमन के प्रति यह अभिव्यक्त होता है। जो 'उसे' जानते हैं वे अमर हो जाते हैं।
verses.meaning_en: He hath not set His body within the ken of seeing, neither doth any man with the eye behold Him, but to the heart and mind and the supermind He is manifest. Who know Him are the immortals.
verses.verse_skt:
न संदृशे तिष्ठति रूपमस्य न चक्षुषा पश्यति कश्चनैनम्‌।
हृदा मनीषा मनसाऽभिक्लृप्तो य एतद्विदुरमृतास्ते भवन्ति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
na saṁdṛśe tiṣṭhati rūpamasya na cakṣuṣā paśyati kaścanainam |
hṛdā manīṣā manasā'bhiklṛpto ya etadviduramṛtāste bhavanti ||

verses.anvaya_skt: यदा पञ्च ज्ञानानि मनसा सह अवतिष्ठन्ते। बुधिः च न विचेष्तति। ताम् परमाम् गतिम् आहुः ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: yadā pañca jñānāni manasā saha avatiṣṭhante| budhiḥ ca na viceṣtati| tām paramām gatim āhuḥ ||
verses.auro_md: When the five senses cease and are at rest and the mind resteth with them and the Thought ceaseth from its workings, that is the highest state, say thinkers.
verses.hindi_explain: ''जब पाँचो इन्द्रियाँ शान्त होकर स्थिर हो जाती हैं तथा मन भी उनके साथ स्थिर हो जाता है, और 'बुद्धि' की प्रक्रियाएँ भी शान्त हो जाती हैं तो वह उच्चतम अवस्था (परमा गति) होती है, ऐसा मनीषीगण कहते है।
verses.meaning_en: When the five senses cease and are at rest and the mind resteth with them and the Thought ceaseth from its workings, that is the highest state, say thinkers.
verses.verse_skt:
यदा पञ्चावतिष्ठन्ते ज्ञानानि मनसा सह।
बुद्धिश्च न विचेष्टते तामाहुः परमां गतिम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yadā pañcāvatiṣṭhante jñānāni manasā saha |
buddhiśca na viceṣṭate tāmāhuḥ paramāṁ gatim ||

verses.anvaya_skt: तां स्थिराम् इन्द्रियधारणां योगम् इति मन्यते। तदा  योगी  अप्रमतः भवति। हि योगः प्रभवाप्ययौ ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: tāṁ sthirām indriyadhāraṇāṁ yogam iti manyate| tadā ( yogī ) apramataḥ bhavati| hi yogaḥ prabhavāpyayau ||
verses.auro_md:
The state unperturbed when the senses are imprisoned in the mind, of this they say "it is Yoga". Then man becomes very vigilant, for Yoga is the birth of things and their ending.[^12]

[^12]: Shankara interprets, "As Yoga hath a beginning (birth) so hath an ending." But this is not what the Sruti says.

glossary.meaning_en: when the senses are imprisoned in the mind
the birth of things and their ending

verses.hindi_explain: ''उस स्थिर दशा को जिसमें इन्द्रियों मन की धारणा की अवस्था के अधीन हैं, 'योग' कहते हैं; उस दशा में मनुष्य सर्वथा सचेतन-जागरूक हो जाता है; क्योंकि 'योग' ही पदार्थों का उद्भव तथा लय<sup>१२</sup> दोनों ही है।
verses.meaning_en: The state unperturbed when the senses are imprisoned in the mind, of this they say “it is Yoga”. Then man becomes very vigilant, for Yoga is the birth of things and their ending.
verses.verse_skt:
तां योगमिति मन्यन्ते स्थिरामिन्द्रियधारणाम्‌।
अप्रमत्तस्तदा भवति योगो हि प्रभवाप्ययौ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
tāṁ yogamiti manyante sthirāmindriyadhāraṇām |
apramattastadā bhavati yogo hi prabhavāpyayau ||

verses.anvaya_skt: सः  आत्मा वाचा न एव। मनसा न  एव । चक्षुषाः न  एव  प्राप्तुं शक्यः।  आत्मा  असि इति ब्रुबतः अन्यत्र कथम् उपलभ्यते॥ ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ( saḥ ) ātmā vācā na eva| manasā na ( eva )| cakṣuṣāḥ na ( eva ) prāptuṁ śakyaḥ| ( ātmā ) asi iti brubataḥ anyatra katham upalabhyate
verses.auro_md: Not with the mind hath man the power to see God, no, nor by speech nor with the eye. Unless one saith "He is," how can one become sensible of Him?

glossary.meaning_en: that the man has the power to see God
can one become sensible of Him?

verses.hindi_explain: ''मनुष्य न मन के द्वारा 'परमेश्वर' को देख सकता है, न ही वाणी के द्वारा और न ही चक्षु के द्वारा। ''वह है'' इस कथन के अतिरिक्त मनुष्य 'उसके' प्रति कैसे सचेतन हो सकता है।
verses.meaning_en: Not with the mind hath man the power to see God, no, nor by speech nor with the eye. Unless one saith “He is,” how can one become sensible of Him?
verses.verse_skt:
नैव वाचा न मनसा प्राप्तुं शक्यो न चक्षुषा।
अस्तीति ब्रुवतोऽन्यत्र कथं तदुपलभ्यते ॥
verses.verse_tl:
naiva vācā na manasā prāptuṁ śakyo na cakṣuṣā |
astīti bruvato'nyatra kathaṁ tadupalabhyate ||

verses.anvaya_skt: उभयोः तत्वभावेन अस्ति इति एव उपलब्धव्यः। अस्ति इति उपलब्धस्य एव तत्वभाव प्रसी इति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: ubhayoḥ tatvabhāvena asti iti eva upalabdhavyaḥ| asti iti upalabdhasya eva tatvabhāva prasī iti ||
verses.auro_md: One must apprehend Him in the concept "He is" and also in His essential principle, but when he hath grasped Him as the Is, then the essential of Him dawneth upon a man.

glossary.meaning_en: of the one who has grasped Him

verses.hindi_explain: '''उस' का बोध ''वह है" (अस्तित्व-भाव) एवं 'उसके' 'तत्त्वभाव', दोनों रूपों में प्राप्त करना चाहिये। किन्तु जब मनुष्य 'उसको' वस्तुतः ''है"  ऐसा जान लेते हैं, तो 'उसका' तत्त्वभाव उस मनुष्य के प्रति उद्भासित हो जाता है।
verses.meaning_en: One must apprehend Him in the concept “He is” and also in His essential principle, but when he hath grasped Him as the Is, then the essential of Him dawneth upon a man.
verses.verse_skt:
अस्तीत्येवोपलब्धव्यस्तत्त्वभावेन चोभयोः।
अस्तीत्येवोपलब्धस्य तत्त्वभावः प्रसीदति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
astītyevopalabdhavyastattvabhāvena cobhayoḥ |
astītyevopalabdhasya tattvabhāvaḥ prasīdati ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अस्य हृदि श्रिताः सर्वे ये कामाः यदा प्रमुच्यन्ते अथ मर्त्यः अमृतः भवति। अत्र ब्रह्म समश्नुते ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: asya hṛdi śritāḥ sarve ye kāmāḥ yadā pramucyante atha martyaḥ amṛtaḥ bhavati| atra brahma samaśnute ||
verses.auro_md: When every desire that harboureth in the heart of a man hath been loosened from its moorings, then this mortal putteth on immortality; even here he enjoyeth Brahman in this human body.

glossary.meaning_en: has been loosened from its moorings
then; even here he enjoyeth Brahman in this human body
even here in this human body

verses.hindi_explain: ''जब मनुष्य के हृदय में आश्रित प्रत्येक कामना की जकड़ ढीली पड़ जाती है, तब यह मर्त्य (मानव) अमर हो जाता है; वह यहीं, इसी मानव शरीर में 'ब्रह्म' का रसास्वादन करता है। <sup>१२</sup> शंकर व्याख्या करते हैंː  "योग की जैसे उत्पत्ति होती है वैसे ही उसका क्षय भी होता है। किन्तु श्रुति ऐसा कथन नहीं करती।
verses.meaning_en: When every desire that harboureth in the heart of a man hath been loosened from its moorings, then this mortal putteth on immortality; even here he enjoyeth Brahman in this human body.
verses.verse_skt:
यदा सर्वे प्रमुच्यन्ते कामा येऽस्य हृदि श्रिताः।
अथ मर्त्योऽमृतो भवत्यत्र ब्रह्म समश्नुते ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yadā sarve pramucyante kāmā ye'sya hṛdi śritāḥ |
atha martyo'mṛto bhavatyatra brahma samaśnute ||

verses.anvaya_skt: इह हृदयस्य सर्वे ग्रन्थयः यदा प्रभिद्यन्ते। अथ मर्त्यः अमृतः भवति। एतावत् हि अनुशासनम् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: iha hṛdayasya sarve granthayaḥ yadā prabhidyante| atha martyaḥ amṛtaḥ bhavati| etāvat hi anuśāsanam ||
verses.auro_md: When all the strings of the heart are rent asunder, even here in this human birth, then the mortal becometh immortal. This is the whole teaching of the Scriptures.

glossary.meaning_en: all the strings of the heart
even here in this human birth
is the teaching of the Scriptures

verses.hindi_explain: '' जब यहीं, इसी मानव जीवन में हृदय-ग्रन्थियाँ छिन्न-भिन्न हो जाती हैं, तो यह मर्त्य (मानव) अमर हो जाता है। यही श्रुतियों की सम्पूर्ण शिक्षा है, अनुशासन है।
verses.meaning_en: When all the strings of the heart are rent asunder, even here in this human birth, then the mortal becometh immortal. This is the whole teaching of the Scriptures.
verses.verse_skt:
यथा सर्वे प्रभिद्यन्ते हृदयस्येह ग्रन्थयः।
अथ मर्त्योऽमृतो भवत्येतावद्ध्यनुशासनम्‌ ॥
verses.verse_tl:
yathā sarve prabhidyante hṛdayasyeha granthayaḥ |
atha martyo'mṛto bhavatyetāvaddhyanuśāsanam ||

verses.anvaya_skt: हृदयस्य शतं च एका च नाड्यः  सन्ति । तासाम् एका मूर्धानाम् अपि निसृता। तया उर्ध्वम् आयन् अमृतत्वम् एति। अन्याः विष्वक् उत्क्रमणे भवन्ति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: hṛdayasya śataṁ ca ekā ca nāḍyaḥ ( santi )| tāsām ekā mūrdhānām api nisṛtā| tayā urdhvam āyan amṛtatvam eti| anyāḥ viṣvak utkramaṇe bhavanti ||
verses.auro_md: A hundred and one are the nerves of the heart and of all these only one issueth out through the head of a man; by this the soul mounteth up to its immortal home but the rest lead him to all sorts and conditions of births in his passing.

glossary.meaning_en: are the nerves of the heart
to all sorts and conditions of births

verses.hindi_explain: ''हृदय की एक सौ एक नाड़ियां हैं, उनमें से एक मूर्धा से होकर बाहर निकलती है; इसके द्वारा अन्तरात्मा ऊर्ध्वारोहण करते हुए अपने अमृतधाम को (अमृतत्व) प्राप्त करती है, किन्तु शेष अन्य प्रयाण करने पर उसे अनेक प्रकार के जन्मों की परिस्थितियों में ले जाती हैं।
verses.meaning_en: A hundred and one are the nerves of the heart and of all these only one issueth out through the head of a man; by this the soul mounteth up to its immortal home but the rest lead him to all sorts and conditions of births in his passing.
verses.verse_skt:
शतं चैका च हृदयस्य नाड्यस्तासां मूर्धानमभिनिःसृतैका।
तयोर्ध्वमायन्नमृतत्वमेति विश्वङ्ङन्या उत्क्रमणे भवन्ति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
śataṁ caikā ca hṛdayasya nāḍyastāsāṁ mūrdhānamabhiniḥsṛtaikā |
tayordhvamāyannamṛtatvameti viśvaṅṅanyā utkramaṇe bhavanti ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अङ्गुष्ठमात्रः पुरुषः अन्तरात्मा सदा जनानां हृदये सन्निविष्ठः मुञ्जात् इषीकाम् इव स्वात्। शरीरात् तं धैर्येण प्रवृहेत्। तं शुक्रम् अमृतं विद्यात् ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: aṅguṣṭhamātraḥ puruṣaḥ antarātmā sadā janānāṁ hṛdaye sanniviṣṭhaḥ muñjāt iṣīkām iva svāt| śarīrāt taṁ dhairyeṇa pravṛhet| taṁ śukram amṛtaṁ vidyāt ||
verses.auro_md: The Purusha, the Spirit within, who is no larger than the finger of a man is seated for ever in the heart of creatures; one must separate Him with patience from one's own body as one separates from a blade of grass its main fibre. Thou shalt know Him for the Bright Immortal, yea, for the Bright Immortal.

glossary.meaning_en: the Purusha who is no larger than the finger of a man
as one separates its main fibre

verses.hindi_explain: '' 'पुरुष', 'अन्तरात्मा', जो अङ्गुष्ठमात्र है, वह सदा प्राणियों के हृदय में आसीन है। 'उसे' अपने शरीर से उसी प्रकार धैर्यपूर्वक पृथक् करना चाहिये जैसे कोई मूँज से उसकी सीक को पृथक् करता है। 'उसे' तुम  'तेजोमय' 'अमृत-तत्त्व' जानो, हां, उसी को 'तेज्जोमय' 'अमृत-तत्त्व' जानो।"
verses.meaning_en: The Purusha, the Spirit within, who is no larger than the finger of a man is seated for ever in the heart of creatures; one must separate Him with patience from one's own body as one separates from a blade of grass its main fibre. Thou shalt know Him for the Bright Immortal, yea, for the Bright Immortal.
verses.verse_skt:
अङ्गुष्ठमात्रः पुरुषोऽन्तरात्मा सदा जनानां हृदये संनिविष्टः।
तं स्वाच्छरीरात्प्रवृहेन्मुञ्जादिवेषीकां धैर्येण।
तं विद्याच्छुक्रममृतं तं विद्याच्छुक्रममृतमिति ॥
verses.verse_tl:
aṅguṣṭhamātraḥ puruṣo'ntarātmā sadā janānāṁ hṛdaye saṁniviṣṭaḥ |
taṁ svāccharīrātpravṛhenmuñjādiveṣīkāṁ dhairyeṇa |
taṁ vidyācchukramamṛtaṁ taṁ vidyācchukramamṛtamiti ||

verses.anvaya_skt: अथ नचिकेतः मृत्युप्रोक्ताम् एतां विद्यां कृस्नं योगविधिं च लव्ध्वा विरजः विमृत्युः  भूत्वा  ब्रह्मप्राप्तः अभूत्। अन्यः यः अपि एव अध्यात्मम् एव वित्  ब्रह्मप्राप्तो भवति ॥
verses.anvaya_tl: atha naciketaḥ mṛtyuproktām etāṁ vidyāṁ kṛsnaṁ yogavidhiṁ ca lavdhvā virajaḥ vimṛtyuḥ ( bhūtvā ) brahmaprāptaḥ abhūt| anyaḥ yaḥ api eva adhyātmam eva vit ( brahmaprāpto bhavati ) ||
verses.auro_md: Thus did Nachiketas with Death for his teacher win the God-knowledge; he learned likewise the whole ordinance of the Yoga: thereafter he obtained Brahman and became void of stain and void of death. So shall another be who cometh likewise to the science of the Spirit.

glossary.meaning_en: and the whole ordinance of the Yoga
to the science of the Spirit

verses.hindi_explain: इस प्रकार नचिकेता ने मृत्यु-रूपी गुरु के द्वारा कही गयी इस ब्रह्मविद्या को प्राप्त किया; उसी प्रकार उसने सम्पूर्ण योग-विधि को जानाː तदनन्तर उसने 'ब्रह्म' को प्राप्त किया एवं वह विमल तथा मृत्यु-विहीन हो गया। अन्य जो भी कोई इस अध्यात्म-विद्या को प्राप्त करेगा, वह भी उसके समान हो जायेगा।
verses.meaning_en: Thus did Nachiketas with Death for his teacher win the God-knowledge; he learned likewise the whole ordinance of the Yoga: thereafter he obtained Brahman and became void of stain and void of death. So shall another be who cometh likewise to the science of the Spirit.
verses.verse_skt:
मृत्युप्रोक्तां नचिकेतोऽथ लब्ध्वा विद्यामेतां योगविधिं च कृत्स्नम्‌।
ब्रह्मप्राप्तो विरजोऽभूद्विमृत्यु रन्योऽप्येवं यो विदध्यात्ममेव ॥
verses.verse_tl:
mṛtyuproktāṁ naciketo'tha labdhvā vidyāmetāṁ yogavidhiṁ ca kṛtsnam |
brahmaprāpto virajo'bhūdvimṛtyu ranyo'pyevaṁ yo vidadhyātmameva ||
